clean_body: Everyone from Chuck Schumer all the way down the chain knows that the Senate majority rests on the outcome of the Georgia Senate race. Everyone from Chuck Schumer all the way down the chain knows that the Senate majority rests on the outcome of the Georgia Senate race. | Fellow American, Chuck Schumer's Senate Majority PAC reserved over $23 million worth of tv ads for this fall in Georgia. That means months of non-stop attack ads against Herschel will be here soon. With polls showing the race is a dead heat, two things are certain: Senate Democrats are concerned, and they are putting their money where their mouth is. Everyone from Chuck Schumer all the way down the chain knows that the Senate majority rests on the outcome of the Georgia Senate race. WE'RE STILL OVER 7 MONTHS out from Election Day, and national Democrats are funneling nearly $60 MILLION into Georgia to drag Herschel through the mud. Yep, you read that right: between what Senator Warnock has raised for his campaign and what Democrat Super PACs have committed to spend to re-elect him, we're ALREADY NEARING the $60 million mark. Right now, we may be a point or two ahead in the polls, but that will be hard to sustain if we get outspent massively. If we don't take seriously the HUGE AMOUNT the Democrats are going to spend in Georgia,it will come at our own peril. Please stand with us. Thanks, Team Herschel | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

body:
| | | Hi there, [**I am the only candidate in this race who supports an end to the fossil fuel industry. Please help me fight for that by contributing whatever you can, so I win my election to Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43779212/338692427/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWVjMGQwOS05N2I0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CZkP14cD6jRj-ghsV27LGHZbuzZLftPQEqLSdtdLtok=) You hear a lot that “government inaction” led to runaway climate change. But that’s wrong. It’s government ACTION that helped get us here: subsidizing fossil fuel corporations, granting drilling leases and permits, and criminalizing protest. The United Nations’ IPCC latest report on climate change just came out, and the warnings it gives are dire: for warming to stay below 1.5°, global greenhouse gas emissions need to peak in the next 3 years and decrease 43% by 2030. That means stopping drilling and ending the fossil fuel industry — or facing an unlivable Earth. As one of the report’s lead scientists said, “It’s now or never.” [**“It’s Now or Never.” We have 3 years. Can you help?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43779213/338692428/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWVjMGQwOS05N2I0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CZkP14cD6jRj-ghsV27LGHZbuzZLftPQEqLSdtdLtok=) Unlike my Chevron-funded opponent, I take $0 from the fossil fuel corporations destroying our planet. I plan to fight AGAINST the government action that got us here, because our future on Earth depends on it. You remember the climate change-caused “heat dome” in the Pacific Northwest last summer? It killed 1,000 people and 1 billion sea animals. The death and devastation is only going to get worse if we don’t start taking SERIOUS — not superficial — action. We have 3 years. name: =?utf-8?Q?Jacobs=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Pain at the pump?
body:
Blame Biden | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b0f22960d453/i-was-just-at-our-southern-border-6200281?e=13f35c4add)
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| I held another press conference today with NYGOP Chairman Nick Langworthy and Congressional Candidate La’Ron Singletary calling for Joe Biden to end his policies that have forced gas prices up for your family.
---
|
---
| The fact of the matter is - Joe Biden is to blame for the price increases. His administration acted with hostility to our domestic producers. He canceled the Keystone XL pipeline, and he made new production incredibly punitive.

Just this past week, Biden released his budget - it has BILLIONS in new taxes on American energy production. He’s doubling down on the very same policies that are hurting your family right now.

This is a President focused on advancing his radical green new deal agenda no matter the costs, and you’re paying for it.

Right now in this country, we have the ability to not only produce enough energy to restore our independence, but we can increase exports to our European allies so they can end their dependence on hostile foreign nations, like Russia, as well - making the whole world safer.

We know this doesn’t matter to Joe Biden. After all, his administration’s response to concerned Americans has simply been “go buy a Tesla.” That isn’t feasible for many, many people - that is why I have been working to bring down prices right now - low prices at the pump mean a better life for you and your family.

I understand that, the NYGOP understands that, and it is the very reason we must take back the House in November. We are working on actual policies that will actually help you and your family.

We are working to bring inflation down and bring gas prices down. I want you and your family to not only be comfortable, but to thrive for years to come.

That is exactly what we are working toward, and exactly the kind of agenda you can expect when we take back the House.

Best,
Chris Jacobs

subject: Biden called, nobody answered
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
The list keeps getting bigger
Fellow American,

You know the Left is turning against Biden when Leftist commentators like Trevor Noah say things like “Apparently, Saudi Arabia won’t even pick up the phone for the president of the United States, this would have never would have never happened to Trump. Never.”

**He went on to say: “That’s why I bet in these situations; Biden actually wishes that he could hire Trump...”**

[**Do you think world leaders respect President Biden?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0b605b5366e04f7a92db5c8fb95a134d&_e=rY2pK5NR_r3m8K3VQBIX2k18o16k-lwrgfhdKtZQl9wDz3qU7ggnz6zFMLgauNEBKyrN0aobAZPr7M1Aa99rETNMfK5frUvOGoStWQWZ751uJCbvV_j2mPCckydL83bcWZ14H26_EiwoQCzDPn6vKbPoP3dX5ayrM5M4-8uG762kkEXiCR8k9lEnRxHD7AswhMd2MsCvcWvclhEYWIUnjqhcxexsUCltq3ZBgLtngIHuis26ATjb6z3BsdrLOCoIElzs3oUqDikM1NtvBv9ilub5a-Dn4x9e2b9bCmATS3h2CDe0bzRRcYc2_bzvBbCBfi3HbymJFP8YBthxZo9yRQdKaaXupXilY9NEZ0MURK58d8vRclVmWKLyjk9hDcCURDtG9cmq4wajrc1HVFX17jO7VcZ4-n7-xtJMQXC8fLXHu9oVUeQi_b6kMaf_6xvJogtdvYsUTwFx-216JHS67gtMwJQ7-9kaEeEK5cwu0uc%3D)

[**Give us Your Thoughts -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0b605b5366e04f7a92db5c8fb95a134d&_e=rY2pK5NR_r3m8K3VQBIX2k18o16k-lwrgfhdKtZQl9wDz3qU7ggnz6zFMLgauNEBKyrN0aobAZPr7M1Aa99rETNMfK5frUvOGoStWQWZ751uJCbvV_j2mPCckydL83bcWZ14H26_EiwoQCzDPn6vKbPoP3dX5ayrM5M4-8uG762kkEXiCR8k9lEnRxHD7AswhMd2MsCvcWvclhEYWIUnjqhcxexsUCltq3ZBgLtngIHuis26ATjb6z3BsdrLOCoIElzs3oUqDikM1NtvBv9ili6YUmjXvrvq67bq7Pfjs1TWHqLIhEahFLtKJAOChoZLdEE3RWFVuc3Sa4kx1Oa442u8lFpeELi9DfNepueYUNE190UA1tvmjgYLNNtl_WfLEHf7194LqcJ_1lpAtOOUY_twTbrbLNpjqXcRmQBrK8q1Gf0K6VyuZ-ZOxrAlpvR5FB_d7EsrmgqUY9UOulpTAUT2AO9biDwCSjsHNQT98YI%3D)
More and more, people on the Left are turning against President Biden. Even AOC called out Biden publicly saying that his indecision and lack of action could cause the Left the midterm elections.

And Biden’s weak image has not been ignored by world leaders. President Xi of China refuses to meet Biden in person and instead only speaks with the President on his own terms, usually on Zoom calls in the middle of the night.

Now, for the Middle East to blatantly ignore President Biden’s phone calls? I don’t know about you Friend, but it sounds to us like the world doesn’t take the USA seriously anymore.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jenni=2C=20Team=20Perdue?=
subject: Campaign Update – April 4, 2022
body:
| | | [ ](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=062458344b&e=89fb4d5220)
---
| Good evening,

We are now just 50 days away from the primary election on May 24th. With your help, we will make sure Stacey Abrams never becomes Governor of Georgia or President of the United States. Below you'll find some updates from our campaign.

Thanks,
Team Perdue

* * *

_**SECURE ELECTIONS**_

On _One America News_ , David talked about his plan to secure our elections here in Georgia.

Click [HERE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=453f543581&e=89fb4d5220) to watch. **Kemp Caved:** "Our Governor caved into Abrams with the consent decree, didn't give us a special session, denied anything happened, and would never investigate anything even to this day.”

**Enforce The Law:** "What I'm proposing is very simple. I want to establish a law enforcement agency solely dedicated to enforcing voting laws... The other thing is I want an audit system where every election before it's certified has to be audited by an outside, third-party entity. Lastly, I've told people in Georgia if I'm elected Governor, we're going to get rid of these Dominion machines. In the meantime, we've got to get out and vote."

_**KEMP'S BAD DEAL WITH SOROS**_

Kemp is giving away hundreds of millions of taxpayers’ dollars to a George Soros company that makes electric cars. Kemp has refused to disclose the full details of this back room deal. It’s no doubt good for Soros. The question is — why is the Governor hiding it from Georgians?

Click [HERE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=0f9106becf&e=89fb4d5220) to watch our new video spotlighting Kemp's bad deal with Soros-funded Rivian. [](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=abfc4118e8&e=89fb4d5220)
**_GINGRICH CAMPAIGNS FOR PERDUE_** Former House Speaker Newt Gingrich joined David on the campaign trail last week in Fayetteville, Duluth, and Marietta. Gingrich told the crowd, "Brian Kemp cost us control of the U.S. Senate and Brian Kemp took 16 electoral votes away from Donald Trump. Now don’t kid yourself, Abrams has a clear plan and Raffensperger and Kemp are dumb enough that they helped her.”

Watch Gingrich's remarks in Fayetteville [HERE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=c6b8c295b4&e=89fb4d5220).
_**ON THE TRAIL**_

David was on the campaign trail again this weekend, meeting with voters in Statesboro, Newnan, and Gainesville.

_**QUICK NOTE**_

David is looking forward to debating Governor Kemp several times before the primary election. David welcomes the opportunity to highlight his positive vision for Georgia and hold Kemp accountable for selling out conservatives. _**UPCOMING EVENTS**_

We hope to see you on the campaign trail at one of David's upcoming events!
* [Thursday, April 7: Hall County Meet & Greet](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=714033fc7a&e=89fb4d5220)
* [Thursday, April 7: Lumpkin GOP Monthly Meeting](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=94aec4c351&e=89fb4d5220)
* [Saturday, April 9: Polk County Monthly GOP Breakfast](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=56dc526cd2&e=89fb4d5220)

clean_body: | | | | Good evening, We are now just 50 days away from the primary election on May 24th. With your help, we will make sure Stacey Abrams never becomes Governor of Georgia or President of the United States. Below you'll find some updates from our campaign. Thanks, Team Perdue SECURE ELECTIONS On One America News , David talked about his plan to secure our elections here in Georgia. Click to watch. Kemp Caved: "Our Governor caved into Abrams with the consent decree, didn't give us a special session, denied anything happened, and would never investigate anything even to this day.” Enforce The Law: "What I'm proposing is very simple. I want to establish a law enforcement agency solely dedicated to enforcing voting laws... The other thing is I want an audit system where every election before it's certified has to be audited by an outside, third-party entity. Lastly, I've told people in Georgia if I'm elected Governor, we're going to get rid of these Dominion machines. In the meantime, we've got to get out and vote." KEMP'S BAD DEAL WITH SOROS Kemp is giving away hundreds of millions of taxpayers’ dollars to a George Soros company that makes electric cars. Kemp has refused to disclose the full details of this back room deal. It’s no doubt good for Soros. The question is — why is the Governor hiding it from Georgians? Click to watch our new video spotlighting Kemp's bad deal with Soros-funded Rivian. GINGRICH CAMPAIGNS FOR PERDUE Former House Speaker Newt Gingrich joined David on the campaign trail last week in Fayetteville, Duluth, and Marietta. Gingrich told the crowd, "Brian Kemp cost us control of the U.S. Senate and Brian Kemp took 16 electoral votes away from Donald Trump. Now don’t kid yourself, Abrams has a clear plan and Raffensperger and Kemp are dumb enough that they helped her.” Watch Gingrich's remarks in Fayetteville . ON THE TRAIL David was on the campaign trail again this weekend, meeting with voters in Statesboro, Newnan, and Gainesville. QUICK NOTE David is looking forward to debating Governor Kemp several times before the primary election. David welcomes the opportunity to highlight his positive vision for Georgia and hold Kemp accountable for selling out conservatives. UPCOMING EVENTS We hope to see you on the campaign trail at one of David's upcoming events! | "JOIN OUR GRASSROOTS TEAM" | | | | | | | | | | | | | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Perdue for Governor, Inc. P.O. Box 12077 Atlanta, GA 30355 * USA

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Would you mind taking a few minutes to complete my short survey?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
This week, I'll be sitting down with my team to go over our priorities and strategy for the most important months of our U.S. Senate campaign in Wisconsin. Before we do, it’s important to me that I get your feedback. **[Would you mind taking a few minutes right now to complete my brief survey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43779052/338691199/37006170?ms=em22_220404_april_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&refcode=em22_220404_april_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&source=em22_220404_april_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220404_april_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=Pj/pjS3wQCZqqrb2k6bql7qU2tJqrTV6xEt4j05tgC9ZpBaTjjos4CAeGy0N/AarFGoZp0WW2ubk3UF4p8tUjU2nduWfrH8P4bthdEbf/EGy8JNhQiWdqI084x451LJSR1RZJvrjyr716FeISYuz817YGPsgqR3jb2wgyou8ots=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDc0ZDc5ZC04NWI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G6uYAbSO-uooLDqdcjG-vw6nu5yi6LxUxcik7hn8HuU=&emci=5c74d79d-85b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=5d74d79d-85b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=18659593)**

As you know, I’m focused on setting a campaign agenda that’s tailored to our state. That's why I’ve been out on the road so much, listening to folks from all over Wisconsin, having important conversations about what’s going on in their communities, and asking how I can help.

Over the past few days alone, I’ve knocked on doors in Eau Claire, Waukesha, Green Bay, La Crosse, Oshkosh, and more to hear directly from voters. We talked about the issues folks are most concerned about right now — everything from rising gas prices to the lack of affordable childcare to the skyrocketing cost of prescription drugs.

Too many people are stretching their pocketbooks just to try to make ends meet. Instead of working to lower costs for families, Ron Johnson is more interested in lining his own pockets and the pockets of his wealthy donors. That’s why I decided to get in this race, and it’s why I’m putting in the work to make sure our campaign priorities are shaped by yours.

I like to send out these short surveys to ensure every person on this team has the opportunity to share their thoughts and suggestions with me. The more responses I receive from supporters like you, the more insight our campaign has from the ground about how we can get this Senate seat working for the people of Wisconsin again.

[**So, will you take a minute (two, tops!) to let me know what issues matter most to you right now? Your input will directly shape our campaign priorities in one of the most competitive Senate races in the country. I hope you'll take the time to answer a few quick questions.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43779053/338691200/37006170?ms=em22_220404_april_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&refcode=em22_220404_april_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&source=em22_220404_april_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220404_april_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=Pj/pjS3wQCZqqrb2k6bql7qU2tJqrTV6xEt4j05tgC9ZpBaTjjos4CAeGy0N/AarFGoZp0WW2ubk3UF4p8tUjU2nduWfrH8P4bthdEbf/EGy8JNhQiWdqI084x451LJSR1RZJvrjyr716FeISYuz817YGPsgqR3jb2wgyou8ots=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDc0ZDc5ZC04NWI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G6uYAbSO-uooLDqdcjG-vw6nu5yi6LxUxcik7hn8HuU=&emci=5c74d79d-85b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=5d74d79d-85b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=18659593)
| [Take the survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43779054/338691201/37006170?ms=em22_220404_april_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&refcode=em22_220404_april_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&source=em22_220404_april_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220404_april_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=Pj/pjS3wQCZqqrb2k6bql7qU2tJqrTV6xEt4j05tgC9ZpBaTjjos4CAeGy0N/AarFGoZp0WW2ubk3UF4p8tUjU2nduWfrH8P4bthdEbf/EGy8JNhQiWdqI084x451LJSR1RZJvrjyr716FeISYuz817YGPsgqR3jb2wgyou8ots=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDc0ZDc5ZC04NWI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G6uYAbSO-uooLDqdcjG-vw6nu5yi6LxUxcik7hn8HuU=&emci=5c74d79d-85b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=5d74d79d-85b4-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=18659593)
---

My mom always said we had two ears and one mouth for a reason: to do more listening and less talking. These surveys are my way of making sure I’m listening to all of you and fighting for the issues that are impacting you and your communities.

I appreciate you taking the time to share your response with me today. It means a lot.

— Sarah Godlewski

P.S. Feel free to forward this email to your friends or family members and let’s see if we can reach a few more people!

clean_body: This week, I'll be sitting down with my team to go over our priorities and strategy for the most important months of our U.S. Senate campaign in Wisconsin. Before we do, it’s important to me that I get your feedback. As you know, I’m focused on setting a campaign agenda that’s tailored to our state. That's why I’ve been out on the road so much, listening to folks from all over Wisconsin, having important conversations about what’s going on in their communities, and asking how I can help. Over the past few days alone, I’ve knocked on doors in Eau Claire, Waukesha, Green Bay, La Crosse, Oshkosh, and more to hear directly from voters. We talked about the issues folks are most concerned about right now — everything from rising gas prices to the lack of affordable childcare to the skyrocketing cost of prescription drugs. Too many people are stretching their pocketbooks just to try to make ends meet. Instead of working to lower costs for families, Ron Johnson is more interested in lining his own pockets and the pockets of his wealthy donors. That’s why I decided to get in this race, and it’s why I’m putting in the work to make sure our campaign priorities are shaped by yours. I like to send out these short surveys to ensure every person on this team has the opportunity to share their thoughts and suggestions with me. The more responses I receive from supporters like you, the more insight our campaign has from the ground about how we can get this Senate seat working for the people of Wisconsin again. | My mom always said we had two ears and one mouth for a reason: to do more listening and less talking. These surveys are my way of making sure I’m listening to all of you and fighting for the issues that are impacting you and your communities. I appreciate you taking the time to share your response with me today. It means a lot. — Sarah Godlewski P.S. Feel free to forward this email to your friends or family members and let’s see if we can reach a few more people! Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin

name: SCOTUS Emergency [via Voter Protection Project]
subject: Sen. Sinema BLOCKS Judge Jackson’s confirmation?!?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We're on the edge of our seats
| _To make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8073?t=1&akid=1719%2E878179%2EkKceet)._
---
Listen, we’re on the edge of our seats... _here’s why:_ [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8324?t=7&akid=1719%2E878179%2EkKceet) **Sen. Kyrsten Sinema could single-handedly SINK Judge Jackson’s nomination – _it would be a MASSIVE FAILURE for President Biden! NO!!!_**

So we’re gathering _750 Democrats_ to sign our massive letter DEMANDING Sen. Sinema steps up and votes to CONFIRM Judge Jackson to the Supreme Court!

[**We’re sending our letter to Sinema’s office at 9 AM tomorrow – so we need you to sign IMMEDIATELY. Donate to sign our letter and demand Sen. Sinema CONFIRM Judge Jackson! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8324?t=8&akid=1719%2E878179%2EkKceet) | [_DONATE $1 TO SIGN THE LETTER & CONFIRM JUDGE JACKSON »_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8324?t=9&akid=1719%2E878179%2EkKceet)
---
**_Dear Senator Sinema,_**

The entire nation is watching you – because you have a HUGE choice:

**Will you stand with President Biden, confirm Judge Jackson, and SAVE the Supreme Court from Trump’s far-right Justices?**

Or will you betray your president, BLOCK Judge Jackson’s nomination, and hand Republicans a _HUGE WIN?!?_ [I know what side I’m on, and I’m pleading with you to join us, Senator. I’m so serious that I’m donating to Voter Protection Project to DEMAND you confirm Judge Jackson »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8324?t=10&akid=1719%2E878179%2EkKceet) | [_DONATE $1 TO SIGN THE LETTER & CONFIRM JUDGE JACKSON »_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8324?t=11&akid=1719%2E878179%2EkKceet)
---
Senator, I’ll be honest: this shouldn’t be a difficult choice.

Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson is the MOST qualified Supreme Court nominee in recent history – _and blocking her nomination would be DISASTROUS for our country._

**Without Judge Jackson on the nation’s highest court, Trump’s far-right Justices will continue to STRIKE DOWN everything we care about.**

_Everything from voting rights to affordable healthcare will be on the chopping block, Senator!_
[It’s so important that I’m pitching in $1 to VPP to help them confirm Judge Jackson and SAVE President Biden’s agenda. Don’t betray us, Senator: CONFIRM JUDGE JACKSON NOW! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8324?t=12&akid=1719%2E878179%2EkKceet)
[_DONATE $1 TO SIGN THE LETTER & CONFIRM JUDGE JACKSON »_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8324?t=13&akid=1719%2E878179%2EkKceet)
---
All eyes are on you, Senator. I hope you do the right thing.

Sincerely,

**__x A Committed Democrat__**
[_DONATE $1 TO SIGN THE LETTER & CONFIRM JUDGE JACKSON »_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8324?t=14&akid=1719%2E878179%2EkKceet)
---
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

[](ckq.io/eguhtk)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1719%2E878179%2EkKceet). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1719%2E878179%2EkKceet).**

name: URGENT Border Petition
subject: 5,000 signatures needed to reinstate Title 42!
body:
If patriots don't mobilize now, the border crisis will get much worse.

|
---

| | |
**Biden paves way for surge of migrants by ending Title 42 policy**

Friend,

Biden's open borders agenda just went to a whole new level. With illegal border crossings at a 60-year high, Biden just eliminated one of the last levers of control for our Southern border!

Instead of removing Trump's Title 42 policy, Biden should be making it permanent! [**If you agree, take a stand to demand Biden reinstate Title 42 now!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60040992:JwOxcyoN3:m:1:3299561967:F256B5A5126708547978F099D274B00F:r)
| | [SIGN THE PETITION](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60040992:JwOxcyoN3:m:1:3299561967:F256B5A5126708547978F099D274B00F:r)
---

Title 42 won't be completely phased out until May 23, which means if grassroots patriots like YOU take a united stance, we have enough time to reverse Biden's disastrous course of action.
| [STOP BIDEN NOW ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60040992:JwOxcyoN3:m:1:3299561967:F256B5A5126708547978F099D274B00F:r)
---

The skyrocketing tide of illegal immigrants is about to get much worse. Even Senate Democrats are calling Biden's move a "frightening decision" that it will "likely lead to a migrant surge that the administration does not appear to be ready for." [**Now, it's time for grassroots patriots to mobilize and create the ultimate pressure campaign if we have any chance of reversing Biden's disastrous border agenda.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60040992:JwOxcyoN3:m:1:3299561967:F256B5A5126708547978F099D274B00F:r)

With 5,000 signatures, we will send a LOUD and CLEAR message to the White House for Biden to stop caving to the radical left's open borders agenda and put America's national security first. [**Will you stand up to Biden or will you let his disastrous border agenda destroy our country without a fight?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60040992:JwOxcyoN3:m:1:3299561967:F256B5A5126708547978F099D274B00F:r)

| [TAKE A STAND NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60040992:JwOxcyoN3:m:1:3299561967:F256B5A5126708547978F099D274B00F:r)
---

Donald

House Republicans

I'll keep it brief. House Democrats just posted HUGE fundraising numbers, and frankly it's much worse than I imagined.

name: American Update
subject: The 500,000
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9740%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=gkYu%2fqndkFwCPdi5if1czg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27314%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=02W%2bD4d3jwYJUZHetUnc%2fw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27325%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R42kO6Vuv%2b9nPUisYmGkkg&sysid=1)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27326%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a0F45EB9fph2glCRooqrsQ&sysid=1),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27327%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=X1pVsG1jUtJa2mEWH3T%2bNQ&sysid=1) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27326%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a0F45EB9fph2glCRooqrsQ&sysid=1)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27328%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Hn%2blaCA2K%2fLExEGo0Bm7tQ&sysid=1) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Emily Seidel
subject: The government is trying to take over your healthcare
body:
URGENT: Congress is considering price controls on prescription drugs representing a dangerous government takeover of your medici
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zok3tbp628su5lbepkekiv2ot3h5k1kd1jk2ol58_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim4o72cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65stks8o70ptmc4qb6sb2e9j66crmm3hmepr0ccqr2o34cpin6sji6lhn9ptks6rrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ap5l63g74cj66pgb6phnm2qmash5u)
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk8vn2l0rmo833bi9e3e2a0l80aj6957j16ohi4g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim4o72cph2bs)
---
**URGENT: Congress is considering price controls on prescription drugs representing a dangerous government takeover of your medicine cabinet.** When it comes to prescription drugs, we all want affordability. But lower prices are meaningless if people can’t get the drugs they need in the first place. Unfortunately, Washington is looking to enact a government takeover of prescription drugs that will lead to drug rationing and leave you with less access to the drugs you need the most. We need to know where you stand, Friend:
---
**SHOULD THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT DICTATE THE PRICE OF LIFESAVING PRESCRIPTION DRUGS?**
---
| | [**YES**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztvh3kntq5h0mhr9fjgokciu5cj1964t5clr3ap8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim4o72cph2bs)
---
| [**NO**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zromua48f11cl37uo73pog5sib5ehup7r4a47ccg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim4o72cph2bs)
---
| | [**YES**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znul8s0snavestn63jm59enr5cn8kl87f110o340_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim4o72cph2bs)
---
| [**NO**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4da6q6mrramjvnk4ekcoaajfe1g3tjef7ru3320_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim4o72cph2bs)
---
| | _Please submit your response to represent your area by midnight tonight._
---
**Friend: If you do not believe the government should control the price of prescription drugs, then you must make your voice heard. ** The pandemic has shown that the way to get Americans more and quicker access to life-saving drugs and treatments is to get the government out of the way. Innovation is driven by competition and free markets, not the government. This is a lesson Washington always forgets. The federal government has repeatedly fumbled important healthcare issues:
* Despite $83 BILLION in funding for COVID-19 testing, the government failed for almost a year to give Americans access to affordable rapid test on demand
* 1 out of every 5 Medicaid dollars was misspent by Washington over the last two years costing taxpayers $143 billion
* Obamacare has increased the average health insurance premium by over 130%. Healthcare price controls enacted by Obamacare are the reasons premiums are high and access to doctors is shrinking.

A government takeover of our medicine cabinets is a prescription for disaster. This is why we have launched a petition to force your elected officials to vote against any consideration of drug pricing controls. But we need 100,000 signatures to make them think twice about ignoring your demands. **You can make your voice heard here:[https://americansforprosperity.org/drug-pricing-petition](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoc3hbmch34j8q9vpb481cao5ocsqm59bbvstnr8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim4o72cph2bs)** We think enough is enough, but we need to know where top supporters like you stand, friend. That’s why we’re conducting a 1-question survey for readers in your area by midnight tonight.
---
**SHOULD THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT DICTATE THE PRICE OF LIFESAVING PRESCRIPTION DRUGS?**
---
| | [**YES**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5oj81aqkosmqenibho7vv22mu75p78036ssvck8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim4o72cph2bs)
---
| [**NO**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zve4nqr5kjktp486b37k4dgi42uppbas6ib424eg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim4o72cph2bs)
---
| | [**YES**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvacg90123gsj5le77choqoegc3dcim419vf2pt8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim4o72cph2bs)
---
| [**NO**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6en6rl0o395570vbdd0q67jpct1rgkppck0dd3o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim4o72cph2bs)
---
| | Please take the 1-question survey right now and sign the open letter to lend your voice to the effort to stop a dangerous government takeover of your medicine cabinet now. Thank you for all you do, —Emily Emily Seidel
President and CEO, Americans for Prosperity
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi3o3e2d6leijgvs8jhpmhq3skr8v0f0n1gr6ko8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim4o72cph2bs)
---
Americans for Prosperity 1310 N Courthouse Road Suite 700 Arlington Virginia 22201 United States
This email was sent by Americans for Prosperity.

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: When does life begin?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrqnt6033j0cqr0a5m96cij4t6esr0m1phc9g1m8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim4o72cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfco3i69gecsj36pim9d9k61q66ctimuoeed5lm1pm9p3jeuob8opgmior1dljc3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm9d9gs1p34phmc2pm9ptgmlin49fg)
I didn’t mean for the question to be so hard...

| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgpseocthujujvo1aj9n8e7mnhthnhaims643i4g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim4o72cjh2bs)
---

I didn’t mean for the question to be that hard. I didn’t. I promise. Pinky-swear.

This is all that I asked Supreme Court nominee Ketanji Brown Jackson the other day: “When does life begin?”

She responded, **“I don’t know.”**
| [**DONATE HERE TO SUPPORT COMMON SENSE ON THE SUPREME COURT**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zd9ps1p7v5ha7ia262la3h6a0sqedv9p2k435ap8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim4o72cjh2bs)
---

We’ve got to ensure that there's common sense on our Supreme Court that understands when life begins or can at least give a better answer than “I don’t know.”

**[WATCH THE FULL VIDEO BELOW](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z58rrjfd1clanqliasg6b2sd8ffqaecsuch9a6jg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim4o72cjh2bs)**
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6qv01hi49veod4oaf2ulldrdav3asdch6e732g0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim4o72cjh2bs)
I’m fighting every day in Washington to protect all life and keep as much common sense in Washington as humanly possible, and that’s asking a lot.

That’s why I need your help to continue to have the resources to keep fighting. **We cannot allow the Left to handpick their Socialist candidate who can’t answer questions like “what is a woman?” or “When does life begin?”** These are simple questions with simple answers, and that’s why I need your help to keep common sense on the Supreme Court.

**[Will you rush a donation below to help me keep common sense on the Supreme Court?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlvm2kv7n43pm1te3hsj92u7bsb3r1lt10f83580_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim4o72cjh2bs)**

name: Dr. Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
subject: Our most cherished document
body:
As a conservative, you know and feel the pressure being put on you to abandon your principles by the progressives on the radical

---
Hello, As a conservative, you know and feel the pressure being put on you to abandon your principles by the progressives on the radical Left. You know that fighting back for what you believe in is the best thing to do. In these trying times, we conservatives must turn to the greatest document in the history of the world that promises freedom and opportunity to its citizens for guidance, **our Constitution.** That’s why I’m writing personally to you today. I’d like to offer you the chance to gain [**free access to Heritage’s Guide to the Constitution today to help you defend your principles against those on the far left.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhibrok0403tm9tji01qflgei9v4shuiig0fbp98_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim4o73c3h2bs)
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhfpemlbpug2ne83dahp12dra56d95h7u4i27pc0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim4o73c3h2bs)
---
In this free digital interactive guide, you'll find:
* **Useful, clause-by-clause analysis** of the entire Constitution and each amendment
* Input from more than **100 constitutional scholars and legal experts** including President Reagan's former Attorney General Ed Meese
* **A thorough review** of what the Constitution actually says and how it applies today
* **A copy of the Constitution** and the documents that served as its foundation

This is a critical year in our nation’s history. The country is polarized and divided on a great number of issues, and roughly half of the voting population is being swayed towards greater government control over our lives through the trojan horse of “COVID safety. They want government control of anything they can get their hands on. It is for this reason we need to educate as many people as possible, of all age groups, on the freedoms safeguarded to us in the Constitution. Because if we don’t truly understand the freedoms that it protects for us as citizens, then we will not fight to defend those freedoms. To get your free access today and to help us make sure that everyone in the conservative movement has refreshed their understanding of the Constitution this year, will you activate your free access by [**clicking this link today**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp1lp8tfgbqnf852qebdagbmdds544hi6k17gmm0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim4o73c3h2bs)? If so, please use this link to activate your access to the guide today: [**https://secured.heritage.org/constitution/**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv5ip54jep61fiog3tfus51l0atvb83eh3puda88_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim4o73c3h2bs) This resource has been hailed across the nation as an "outstanding Guide," which is why I consider it one of the finest resources Heritage has ever produced. I think you'll enjoy reading it, and I know you'll find use for it each day. With this powerful Guide in hand, you'll be ready to stand up to the radical Left and confidently defend the vision of our Founding Fathers. [**I hope you'll claim your copy today.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7opjrvi3p212dbv78s5136nnm2nn12j8h0pmhc0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim4o73c3h2bs) Thank you, Dr. Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D. President, The Heritage Foundation

name: American Action News
subject: Explore these great works at home
body:
Classic children’s literature is being ignored and eliminated from our nation’s classrooms at an alarming rate.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaiiv8cbgh55e23a7ehv72b38ebmuvdjv0otk8sg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u1oj9ppmmerj1o3kshjj1dhks9pj5c9ieir6cpjkeur34t37cljb0sbimtib0o37q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchhcpob9ddicup72phkc2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1cji6aob3chg649fg)
| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zncmusgihqao9nvoee20opire5gu7vo81igoska8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim2or4c1h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Classic children’s literature is being ignored and eliminated from our nation’s classrooms at an alarming rate. Beloved classics like _The Wind in the Willows_ , _Treasure Island_ , and _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ are just a few of the books that are rarely being taught to our nation’s children today. Not only does this rob young people of classic tales of adventure and friendship, but they also rob children of fundamental lessons about the world and how best to live.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College released a free online course titled **“Classic Children’s Literature.”** Perhaps you’ve had a chance to watch a few lectures. **Today, I’m excited to tell you that the course is now available on DVD! And you can get your very own box set right now!** [**“Classic Children’s Literature”**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbgcu83sf9dvk5sd1r79he17kh92rcidc7p26d90_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim2or4c1h2bs) explores some of the greatest works of children’s literature, from Aesop and the classic fairy tales to _Treasure Island_ and _Winnie-the-Pooh_ , and so much more. When you get your box set today, you will not only delight your family, but also evoke a sense of wonder while teaching timeless lessons to the young and old alike.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhcutcmn8apq6ln4vtci8idio1me34bfe1qtnfvo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim2or4c1h2bs)
---
| | Speaking from my own experience, this course has brought great joy to my family. It has inspired us to read the classic works covered in this course together. And I hope you can share this same experience with your loved ones as you learn more about what makes these beloved stories so important. **You can get your DVD box set of “Classic Children’s Literature” by making a tax-deductible gift of $100 to Hillsdale College using this secure link:** [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-classic-childrens-literature-today**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfee7ad769a0g34tkl8ltq4g7138v2b8jgpjd9h0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim2or4c1h2bs) And when you do, you’ll also help expand nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, such as:
* Increasing the number of students taking free online courses.
* Growing the readership of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty.
* Restoring excellence to K-12 education through an American classical curriculum.
* Promoting constitutional education through social media and the radio.

Thank you again for your support of Hillsdale College and for partnering with us to educate our fellow citizens, especially our youngest citizens. Without you, Hillsdale could not offer these courses free of charge to anyone willing to learn. Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. These DVDs are an excellent gift for parents, homeschool families, and anyone who cherishes these timeless stories. **Get your DVD box-set of “Classic Children’s Literature” by making a tax-deductible gift of $100 to Hillsdale College using this secure link:** [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-classic-childrens-literature-today**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgrsflk3c9pvg5fd039qqqp9vfbp5pv1hnfr3ep8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim2or4c1h2bs)
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: REMINDER: Vote Tomorrow!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Hi Peter, on April 5th you will have the opportunity to make a difference in Wisconsin. This election is crucial.
Hi Peter,**Tomorrow on April 5th you will have the opportunity to make a difference.** School board, judicial, mayoral, and other local races will all be decided and will help determine the future of our communities.**_These local races are critical to determining how our communities are led._** For instance, **Samantha Kerkman is running for Kenosha County Executive** to ensure our communities are safe and that workers can find family-sustaining jobs. **Judge Maria Lazar is running for the Court of Appeals in District II** to restore the rule of law and oust the liberal activist who was handpicked by Governor Evers. **_There are many more critical races that will be held tomorrow and they need your help. Please remember to vote tomorrow._**_We will need all hands on deck to help them win._**To see what is on your ballot, please click[here](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zkiljhl-idtjvlhlh-r/). Please see below for voting recommendations in your county. ****Voting Recommendations**
* [If you live in Kenosha County, please check here.](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zkiljhl-idtjvlhlh-y/)
* [If you live in Racine County, please check here.](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zkiljhl-idtjvlhlh-j/)
* [I](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zkiljhl-idtjvlhlh-t/)[f you live in Walworth County, please check here.](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zkiljhl-idtjvlhlh-i/)
* [If you live in Rock County, please check here.](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zkiljhl-idtjvlhlh-d/)
* [If you live in Waukesha County, please check here. ](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zkiljhl-idtjvlhlh-h/)
* If you live elsewhere, please check with your local GOP.

Thanks,Bryan
--
**Bryan Steil**
Congressman [Help Us Fight Back](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zkiljhl-idtjvlhlh-k/) [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zkiljhl-idtjvlhlh-u/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zkiljhl-idtjvlhlh-p/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zkiljhl-idtjvlhlh-x/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-zkiljhl-l-c) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

STEIL FOR WISCONSIN
1818 MILTON AVE. #1448

name: URGENT Border Petition
subject: 5,000 signatures needed to reinstate Title 42!
body:
If patriots don't mobilize now, the border crisis will get much worse.

|
---

| | |
**Biden paves way for surge of migrants by ending Title 42 policy**

Peter,

Biden's open borders agenda just went to a whole new level. With illegal border crossings at a 60-year high, Biden just eliminated one of the last levers of control for our Southern border!

Instead of removing Trump's Title 42 policy, Biden should be making it permanent! [**If you agree, take a stand to demand Biden reinstate Title 42 now!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60044526:J8__zyoNQ:m:1:3317145305:DF350B0645D8336D97D5966A89FA923E:r)
| | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60044526:J8__zyoNQ:m:1:3317145305:DF350B0645D8336D97D5966A89FA923E:r)
---

Title 42 won't be completely phased out until May 23, which means if grassroots patriots like YOU take a united stance, we have enough time to reverse Biden's disastrous course of action.
| [STOP BIDEN NOW ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60044526:J8__zyoNQ:m:1:3317145305:DF350B0645D8336D97D5966A89FA923E:r)
---

The skyrocketing tide of illegal immigrants is about to get much worse. Even Senate Democrats are calling Biden's move a "frightening decision" that it will "likely lead to a migrant surge that the administration does not appear to be ready for." [**Now, it's time for grassroots patriots to mobilize and create the ultimate pressure campaign if we have any chance of reversing Biden's disastrous border agenda.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60044526:J8__zyoNQ:m:1:3317145305:DF350B0645D8336D97D5966A89FA923E:r)

With 5,000 signatures, we will send a LOUD and CLEAR message to the White House for Biden to stop caving to the radical left's open borders agenda and put America's national security first. [**Will you stand up to Biden or will you let his disastrous border agenda destroy our country without a fight?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60044526:J8__zyoNQ:m:1:3317145305:DF350B0645D8336D97D5966A89FA923E:r)

| [TAKE A STAND NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60044526:J8__zyoNQ:m:1:3317145305:DF350B0645D8336D97D5966A89FA923E:r)

name: Sean Themea
subject: Urgent: Help stop the woke on campus [Photo]
body:
What would you think if you walked onto a college campus and saw this sign?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8563b0lgm4jl8cp6sqkusvclk91stduii86lumg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp71djk6hqe6pliecqj9c75e5rjdcrkclq7epdl6jgrfd1le3hracrgeiqr0ptnmv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti65j71d5lmdjr4dr664ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5ie8pb3c5jm6oh5u)
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi0fn6qkph6nlvikli7qf6objlio2ha8d5fhosh0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim6ob7cdh2bs)

Hello Friend,

What would you think if you walked onto a college campus and saw this sign?

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze4k7qe3optm7mkt8q00ufv7pns9i4nkttsrsfvo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim6ob7cdh2bs)

You'd probably think it was a joke, right? After all, college is where you're supposed to encounter new ideas and different ways of thinking-even if it's not what you agree with.

But this sign is no joke.

Colorado State University put this sign up as a serious offer for students who have been "affected by a free speech event," and included 17 resources to contact!

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcmjjg36bj18lpfkijmmst3er8dh0era49ubrt78_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim6ob7cdh2bs)

The woke Marxists on campus are now coddling adults from words they don't like.

I am emailing you with an urgent request to supply students on campus with free speech kits to fight back against this madness.

[_**Friend**_ _**, can you donate $10, $25, $50, $100, or any amount to help supply resources for students as they fight back against the campus establishment. Click here to donate >>>**_](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmbldv5t84psjuq2ivrb5ld174qfmhjui6bb11g8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim6ob7cdh2bs)

But the campus establishment isn't just babying their students. They're actively firing professors who speak out against the woke regime.

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfmc5m7loqrlu3sv6p5e5m68v1jn7r2s54c0o798_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shim6ob7cdh2bs)

name: The Heritage Foundation
subject: Our most cherished document
body:
As a conservative, you know and feel the pressure being put on you to abandon your principles by the progressives on the radical Left. You know that fighting back for what you believe in is the best thing to do. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6867%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=C15jvqkqZAEirFcKIwDD1g&sysid=1)
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60577%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=L%2bXGtQ%2fdy9B5aa9O8hFfHw&sysid=1)
---
Hello, As a conservative, you know and feel the pressure being put on you to abandon your principles by the progressives on the radical Left. You know that fighting back for what you believe in is the best thing to do. In these trying times, we conservatives must turn to the greatest document in the history of the world that promises freedom and opportunity to its citizens for guidance, **our Constitution.** That’s why I’m writing personally to you today. I’d like to offer you the chance to gain [**free access to Heritage’s Guide to the Constitution today to help you defend your principles against those on the far left.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60578%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mr6NKsl4QmZ5A6DetnezgA&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60577%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=L%2bXGtQ%2fdy9B5aa9O8hFfHw&sysid=1)
---
In this free digital interactive guide, you'll find:
* **Useful, clause-by-clause analysis** of the entire Constitution and each amendment
* Input from more than **100 constitutional scholars and legal experts** including President Reagan's former Attorney General Ed Meese
* **A thorough review** of what the Constitution actually says and how it applies today
* **A copy of the Constitution** and the documents that served as its foundation

This is a critical year in our nation’s history. The country is polarized and divided on a great number of issues, and roughly half of the voting population is being swayed towards greater government control over our lives through the trojan horse of “COVID safety. They want government control of anything they can get their hands on. It is for this reason we need to educate as many people as possible, of all age groups, on the freedoms safeguarded to us in the Constitution. Because if we don’t truly understand the freedoms that it protects for us as citizens, then we will not fight to defend those freedoms. To get your free access today and to help us make sure that everyone in the conservative movement has refreshed their understanding of the Constitution this year, will you activate your free access by [**clicking this link today**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60579%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2b9ymmUBBOIJ8YFpx9wPRXg&sysid=1)? If so, please use this link to activate your access to the guide today: [**https://secured.heritage.org/constitution/**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60570%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HZVSgv8Ph1urCaaxnzZb9g&sysid=1) This resource has been hailed across the nation as an "outstanding Guide," which is why I consider it one of the finest resources Heritage has ever produced. I think you'll enjoy reading it, and I know you'll find use for it each day. With this powerful Guide in hand, you'll be ready to stand up to the radical Left and confidently defend the vision of our Founding Fathers. [**I hope you'll claim your copy today.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60571%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RQujDBRZrweJWc9t4%2bLnfA&sysid=1) Thank you, Dr. Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D. President, The Heritage Foundation
---
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60577%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=L%2bXGtQ%2fdy9B5aa9O8hFfHw&sysid=1)
---
The Heritage Foundation | 214 Massachusetts Avenue, NE | Washington, D.C. 20002
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6867%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=C15jvqkqZAEirFcKIwDD1g&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6867%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=C15jvqkqZAEirFcKIwDD1g&sysid=1)

body:

Peter, it's Daniel, Abby's husband. I need just a minute of your time to explain why you should help my wife defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley.
There are a million reasons why Abby is worth fighting for, but let me share just a few that are most on my mind right now:
Abby is worth fighting for because polling revealed that 64% of likely Iowa voters didn’t want to reelect Sen. Grassley, and **he's facing his highest disapproval ratings in nearly TWO DECADES.**
Abby is worth fighting for because if she wins in Iowa, Democrats will be practically guaranteed to maintain our Senate majority.
Abby is worth fighting for because, after nearly half a century in the Washington, Sen. Grassley has left our state – and the working families who live here – far behind.
**Abby is worth fighting for because she is the leader that Iowa deserves: caring, passionate, hardworking and ready to sit down and talk with anyone about the future of our state.**
I know you care about electing Abby, and your support means the world to both of us. Because of your belief in this campaign, Abby is able to truly compete. Because of you, she's going to defeat Sen. Grassley and expand our Senate majority.
But I'll be frank with you here: we need some pretty powerful resources to compete with the GOP's $41 million war chest. That's why it's so important that we start this quarter with strong grassroots fundraising. If you share in my belief that Abby is worth fighting for, can you rush your first donation right now?

name: The Heritage Foundation
subject: Your digital guide to the Constitution
body:
As a conservative, you know and feel the pressure being put on you to abandon your principles by the progressives on the radical
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1at1c8vkqlul6tvssnhh6i6qv2ctmv4qfefkbjg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shhm8o74cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onhctiecd1kmlp3bc74chie6spncson2phhe9j7ephkmop37dhjmtjb4pln69qjfduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cdb4mkoefcjhcor69cr66uobapbi4no)
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbgceal0csin9f2t494ta7qeihd0r2soh3ahlrs0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shhm8o74cph2bs)
---
Hello, As a conservative, you know and feel the pressure being put on you to abandon your principles by the progressives on the radical Left. You know that fighting back for what you believe in is the best thing to do. In these trying times, we conservatives must turn to the greatest document in the history of the world that promises freedom and opportunity to its citizens for guidance, **our Constitution.** That’s why I’m writing personally to you today. I’d like to offer you the chance to gain [**free access to Heritage’s Guide to the Constitution today to help you defend your principles against those on the far left.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbldl2sjgeqjl959h83tbq51i8ejrt8fsen4qo5g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shhm8o74cph2bs)
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt0t1ret8vo272iaejm53he1qc5rrpnpdq3higf0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shhm8o74cph2bs)
---
In this free digital interactive guide, you'll find:
* **Useful, clause-by-clause analysis** of the entire Constitution and each amendment
* Input from more than **100 constitutional scholars and legal experts** including President Reagan's former Attorney General Ed Meese
* **A thorough review** of what the Constitution actually says and how it applies today
* **A copy of the Constitution** and the documents that served as its foundation

This is a critical year in our nation’s history. The country is polarized and divided on a great number of issues, and roughly half of the voting population is being swayed towards greater government control over our lives through the trojan horse of “COVID safety. They want government control of anything they can get their hands on. It is for this reason we need to educate as many people as possible, of all age groups, on the freedoms safeguarded to us in the Constitution. Because if we don’t truly understand the freedoms that it protects for us as citizens, then we will not fight to defend those freedoms. To get your free access today and to help us make sure that everyone in the conservative movement has refreshed their understanding of the Constitution this year, will you activate your free access by [**clicking this link today**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr3m9n4ep71q2beqr1fuoab92elenmr0fr5utr1g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shhm8o74cph2bs)? If so, please use this link to activate your access to the guide today: [**https://secured.heritage.org/constitution/**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg0ivmtq4t7bt91p40d0jdgj6fiu9aies4ohuso8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shhm8o74cph2bs) This resource has been hailed across the nation as an "outstanding Guide," which is why I consider it one of the finest resources Heritage has ever produced. I think you'll enjoy reading it, and I know you'll find use for it each day. With this powerful Guide in hand, you'll be ready to stand up to the radical Left and confidently defend the vision of our Founding Fathers. [**I hope you'll claim your copy today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs6olpb61fh424fnjgq0ej5491kp94qn3pbmnf3g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shhm8o74cph2bs) Thank you, Dr. Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D. President, The Heritage Foundation
---

| | Peter, People often ask me why exactly I’m running for Governor. I’m running because the little boy who now lives in the house where I grew up is facing the same challenges I faced decades ago. I’m running because survivors of sexual assault are often revictimized when they go to the police – or don’t even go to the police for fear that they won’t be taken seriously. I’m running for small business owners struggling to make ends meet in an economy still recovering from Covid-19. I’m running for you. For everyone in Maryland. The little boy should have access to a good education and a good support system. The survivor should be believed and their case should be handled sensitively. The small business owner should have the resources to stay afloat. That’s why I’m running for Governor – and those are the people I’m running for. **[If you’re with us, will you chip in $25 or more to my campaign today? clean_body: | = | | Peter, People often ask me why exactly I’m running for Governor. I’m running because the little boy who now lives in the house where I grew up is facing the same challenges I faced decades ago. I’m running because survivors of sexual assault are often revictimized when they go to the police – or don’t even go to the police for fear that they won’t be taken seriously. I’m running for small business owners struggling to make ends meet in an economy still recovering from Covid-19. I’m running for you. For everyone in Maryland. The little boy should have access to a good education and a good support system. The survivor should be believed and their case should be handled sensitively. The small business owner should have the resources to stay afloat. That’s why I’m running for Governor – and those are the people I’m running for. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Laura | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. Hello,
The courage we are seeing from President Zelensky is not the kind of instantaneous courage used to charge an enemy or the self-promoting false courage of Trumpian showmanship.
Zelensky’s courage is that of thought-through deliberation, choosing to sacrifice oneself to protect others, to do one’s duty in office. That is the definition of bravery.
**Imagine what Putin must be thinking when Russian citizens and besieged Ukrainians stand up to him more fiercely than senior Republicans like Chuck Grassley ever stood up to Donald Trump.**
The Javelin missiles that Ukrainians are now bravely using to repel Russian tanks are the same ones that Trump was impeached for holding hostage – and that Republicans refused to hold him accountable for.
When I defeat Chuck Grassley this November, the Democrats will have the most senior military person ever-elected to the United States Senate. That’s fitting in the shadow of January 6th, because it’s time we had more leaders in Washington who choose sacrifice and service – versus corporate donations and personal gain.
The polls show a close race, and McConnell’s Super PACs are already queuing up millions to spend against me. I’m a hard target, but that won’t stop Fox News from fabricating some made-up tale.
**We need to raise another $50,000 before our fundraising deadline at midnight tonight to fight back, but right now, we’re still $18,932 short. The only way we’ll defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue is if grassroots donors like you chip in now:**
[**Please, may I count on you to urgently give $5 or more right now – whatever you can spare before our critical deadline at midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43782047/338703272/-42398318?refcode=em20220405am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzA1ZjU0Yy1lMGI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QoVY1eWB5e3qxDialDezvnYsEYjESTr3Q-C_MqUQ6Sc=)

I'm reaching out to see if you've heard about our **Majority Dinner** event in Dallas, Texas - it's going to be HUGE!

House Republicans have invited only the most dedicated America First Conservative supporters to join us for an incredible evening... **and I 'm saving YOU a seat!**

I've asked to have **_(2) tickets_** put on hold for you, but time is running out to RSVP. **_If you don 't claim your tickets now, we'll have to move to the next Patriot on our list._ _[Will you please RSVP in the next hour?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60046261:J80TXyonN:m:1:3317145305:7DB78449C31965F313534566A42C285A:r "Will you please RSVP in the next hour?")_**

I'm looking forward to gathering with TOP Conservative leaders to discuss our strategy to win back the House in November, but it won't be the perfect evening until I know you're coming.

_**[So what do you say? Will you RSVP NOW?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60046261:J80TXyonN:m:1:3317145305:7DB78449C31965F313534566A42C285A:r "So what do you

President Donald J. Trump
45th President of the United States

All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Sunday, May 1st, 2022. One winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) tickets to the May 9th NRCC 2022 Majority Dinner; transportation for two (2), made at the discretion of the NRCC, within the continental United States to event location and from winners home location, with an approximate retail value of $1,500; one (1) one-night hotel stay at a Dallas, Texas hotel, with an approximate retail value of $500. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $2,500. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. subject: Urgent: Help stop the woke on campus [Photo]
body:
What would you think if you walked onto a college campus and saw this sign?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze1d3o88ksspqarn3ls5s6nbsq7f5q3o3sopf28g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shhmcor6chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s74s3im2otmcir79cjgs4p68d726krredpj6oqj4pr168rj3cli6cpm6ctme4rjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ap5l63jr4sr664pb6o77m2qmash5u)
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2dobenoasbks35gigm6i1u49vnl510tqaabm2bg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shhmcor6chh2bs)

Hello Friend,

What would you think if you walked onto a college campus and saw this sign?

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb7vd90892kv5du4533c994mu678car243hg74qo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shhmcor6chh2bs)

You'd probably think it was a joke, right? After all, college is where you're supposed to encounter new ideas and different ways of thinking-even if it's not what you agree with.

But this sign is no joke.

Colorado State University put this sign up as a serious offer for students who have been "affected by a free speech event," and included 17 resources to contact!

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjkqodna6epf836vf4g8nghb662m6qkgjtm153t0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shhmcor6chh2bs)

The woke Marxists on campus are now coddling adults from words they don't like.

I am emailing you with an urgent request to supply students on campus with free speech kits to fight back against this madness.

[_**Friend**_ _**, can you donate $10, $25, $50, $100, or any amount to help supply resources for students as they fight back against the campus establishment. Click here to donate >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj0fe77m7mjknk1fln3ln4140mojd408ndf05jb0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shhmcor6chh2bs)

But the campus establishment isn't just babying their students. They're actively firing professors who speak out against the woke regime.

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgjvifj25r9kc5dr21it306rtpgdqct727tnj5f0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shhmcor6chh2bs)

You might be wondering what Shapiro said. The professor had tweeted that the "objectively best pick" to replace Supreme Court Justice Stephen Breyer is Sri Srinivasan, an Indian-American judge on the U.S. Court of Appeals

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq010tfc5o062kmlgm9lfs3j4mkjcgf32oce1oj0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shhmcor6chh2bs)

It's bad-woke Marxists control the campus.

**But I have good news for you,****Friend****. **

There are thousands of students who aren't brainwashed. Thousands of students fighting for liberty. _**Tens of thousands of students have joined the YAL Revolution. **_

Students are using YAL's Free Speech kit to start conversations with other students.

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6gnd894vacg2lrt8pri5rfqr7htt3ignionevko_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shhmcor6chh2bs)

These students are relying on your support as they fight for your and my liberties, Friend. **Click any link below to donate >>>**
[_**Donate $20.22 >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z28i779omhlpc5ghji3dv2qd8d0vlq4rjeut6jv0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shhmcor6chh2bs)

[_**Donate $400 and Sponsor 2 Kits >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdc4rkp4h7ra6knnfc9fv9ha5seiikr3rtrg4sf0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shhmcor6chh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 and Sponsor 5 Kits >>>**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze60ei934niuhpg7ajad9hivl3e6utj1jkavb9do_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shhmcor6chh2bs)

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: We’re holding school boards accountable
body:
School boards hold massive sway over the education of our children and the future of our country, but no conservative organization has been holding them accountable. Until now. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9744%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=4%2bM6xZiKn96b0JySh2Mmjw&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27321%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dtVgkR%2ba1y9CWhqXl%2bXLnQ&sysid=1) [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27321%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dtVgkR%2ba1y9CWhqXl%2bXLnQ&sysid=1) Fellow American, School boards hold massive sway over the education of our children and the future of our country, but no conservative organization has been holding them accountable. **_Until now_.** I’m proud to announce the newest initiative of Turning Point USA (TPUSA) -- our **_School Board Watchlist_**. **To help us stand up against Marxist teachers, radical superintendents, and anti-American curricula on behalf of the 50,600,000 students shaped by their school boards’ decisions, I need your immediate support. ** [**My goal is to raise $24,000 by the end of this month. Will you help me protect students from left-wing indoctrination -- and put control of their futures back in the hands of parents -- with your gift of $12, $25, $50, $100, or more?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27322%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=r97dovIyew88ZzsaWNZS1A&sysid=1) [**Support the School Board Watchlist**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27323%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fq3PcAokPGcBM3HxlAl9LQ&sysid=1) Leftists have taken over the vast majority of school districts in every state -- likely even your district! The 13,500+ school boards across the United States ultimately determine how our children’s minds will be shaped ... and whether they learn the truth about America’s powerful history, Founding Fathers, and role in the world or whether they embrace the toxic, socialist, America-hating lies of the radical Left. Turn on the nightly news and you’ll see the horrors of what K-12 “learning” has become in modern America. As socialism and “woke” culture infiltrate our society, leftist school boards across the country are:
* **adopting Critical Race Theory (CRT) curriculum** , ensuring students are indoctrinated with this dangerous Marxist vision of race;
* requiring teachers participate in **discriminatory professional development disguised as “diversity training”** and putting Leftist ideology before education;
* **renaming schools because of their “racist” namesakes** , which include national heroes like Abraham Lincoln and George Washington; and
* continuing to **use COVID as an excuse to maintain online learning** , despite extensive evidence that in-person learning poses little to no risk to students -- and knowing that online learning leaves many students underserved.

[**That’s why TPUSA’s School Board Watchlist will expose the corrupt and radical decisions school boards are making, and then equip parents and community members with the information they need to demand a better education for their students! But I need your support to do it.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27324%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UKPk2NTRSaaYXTd16X9IgQ&sysid=1) Right now, TPUSA is assembling the nation’s **FIRST EVER** school district ranking system of any kind, focusing exclusively on school districts’ acceptance or rejection of radical Leftist and anti-American curricula, textbooks, and policies. TPUSA’s School Board Watchlist will expose: >>> Radical agendas being pushed by the nation’s largest school districts >>> Leftist, anti-American, Marxist, and CRT curricula and textbooks >>> Corrupt boards and individuals who pursue anti-American policies >>> And more! We’ve published all of our findings at **[SchoolBoardWatchlist.com](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27335%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YrU7FG2%2bjjeTNQzrqnKbOg&sysid=1)** ... and we’re using our TPUSA megaphones -- online, on campus, and over the airwaves -- to bring national attention to the secretive, disturbing agendas being pushed by Leftist school boards so they can no longer hide in the shadows. [**But to have the biggest possible impact, I’m asking for your support of $12 or more. Please help us reach our goal of raising $24,000 by the end of this month.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27336%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ovLgsZVy%2bMAwxRyxlN%2bSTA&sysid=1) [**Support the School Board Watchlist**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27323%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fq3PcAokPGcBM3HxlAl9LQ&sysid=1) The time to fight back is right **NOW** -- before it’s too late. Thank you for your support to put public education back in the hands of parents and the community, **NOT** politicized school boards. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9744%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=4%2bM6xZiKn96b0JySh2Mmjw&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9744%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=4%2bM6xZiKn96b0JySh2Mmjw&sysid=1)
