name: Seth Dillon, Babylon Bee
subject: Twitter just locked The Babylon Bee's account for 'hateful conduct'
body:
Our account will remain locked until we delete the tweet they deem hateful.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4rm9u6qs7vf6ark48jsb7cnpqbr6o7abrndgip8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uep6ctb5ckqj0t3nc5r72clmm8qb8o5ncoob4o9km5g69dj3cqr6ac30e3ij5c37q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchhcpob1ddm6urm6phhm2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1cji66pj0spim49fg)
Our account will remain locked until we delete the tweet they deem hateful. | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z74u9iu50bp66fn5cc2pqq21aqi7bhn8n3efmqbg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shhmco76clh2bs)
---
|
---
| Fellow free speech lover,

We received a notice from Twitter over the weekend informing us that we've been locked out of our account for engaging in "hateful conduct." Our crime? We jokingly selected Rachel Levine — a prominent transgender government official — as our pick for "Man of the Year." (This was our satirical response to Levine's being named one of the top women of the year by USA Today. Yes, that _[actually happened](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbbsdheon3as2rhakgkatao8rl62offct6ai1rbo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shhmco76clh2bs).)_

We've been told our account will be restored in 12 hours, but the countdown won't begin until we delete _[the tweet that violates Twitter Rules](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0ug1kqv65lbpvv9lfeuaajlgnb1to0ognj100qg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shhmco76clh2bs)_.

| | [Subscribe and Support The Babylon Bee](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcrl1tv50krtg7derm4bovu2cra0r2dtf522q308_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shhmco76clh2bs "Subscribe and Support The Babylon Bee")
---

Here's Twitter's statement to the media regarding our account's suspension: "The account you referenced has been temporarily locked for violating our hateful conduct policy. The account owner is required to delete the violative Tweet before regaining access to their account."

Twitter could, of course, delete the tweet themselves. But they won't. It's not enough for them to just wipe it out. They want us to bend the knee and admit that we engaged in hateful conduct.

I can promise you that's not happening.**Truth is not hate speech.** If the cost of telling the truth is the loss of our Twitter account, then so be it. We won't compromise the truth just to keep our account.

The media has _[picked up the story](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqqmi7c2ag2mem1ji5im9qt6ojb6hlv254br0570_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shhmco76clh2bs)_ now. Even left-wing sites are _[covering it](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcjo002a6qrl1h4kg8ushpqgltb2h06v4lt5pu8o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shhmco76clh2bs)_. I was on Tucker Carlson Monday night to talk about it. But a couple of days of media attention doesn't make up for what could potentially be the permanent loss of our Twitter account and the traffic it generates. [**_To put it very bluntly, we need your support_.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zir8rfsbm1sq286s7rqsfp38ejt4nei2kag43peo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shhmco76clh2bs) Here's a couple of things you can do:

First, commit to never censoring yourself. Insist that 2 and 2 make 4 even if Twitter tries to compel you to say otherwise. Make them ban tens of millions of us if they want to remove objective truth from their platform.

Second, _[**become a premium subscriber to the Babylon Bee**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z91k9h5s7cec3gudnpunao9875gno4720rhejs28_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shhmco76clh2bs)_. You'll get some great perks, but, more importantly, you'll provide us with the critical financial support we need to keep going in the face of ongoing censorship.

I've said it before and I'll say it again: The greatest accomplishment on Twitter isn't going viral, or building a huge following, or getting verified — _it's getting banned for saying something true_. We're proud to stand up for the truth, and we're deeply appreciative of each and every one of you who commits to standing with us.

Thank you for your loyal readership and support of The Babylon Bee.

Seth Dillon
CEO

Our crime? We jokingly selected Rachel Levine — a prominent transgender government official — as our pick for "Man of the Year." The account owner is required to delete the violative Tweet before regaining access to their account." Twitter could, of course, delete the tweet themselves. But they won't. He’s met with folks from every corner of the Sunshine State, from every walk of life, and from every political party. Because – unlike DeSantis – Charlie will be a governor who governs for every Floridian. name: Team Kulla
subject: Endorsements matter!
body:
Do endorsements matter? Yes. For a candidate you don’t know, the sum total of public support can give you a sense of their range of knowledge, advisors, and those that they surround themselves with. | | | [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=624c55fc728fba2db5344fbd&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kullafororegon.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D624bbcaa728fba2db532abf4%26ss_email_id%3D624c55fc728fba2db5344fbd%26ss_campaign_name%3DEndorsements%2Bmatter%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-04-05T14%253A45%253A41Z&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=8H_8LxtfhsQd73nfhPpmZWtHBco%3D)
---
|
## Endorsements matter!
---
---
|
---
#### Do endorsements matter?
**_Yes._** For a candidate you don’t know, the sum total of public support can give you a sense of **their range of knowledge** , **advisors** , and those that they surround themselves with.Which is why I am so honored to have the prominent [endorsements](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=624c55fc728fba2db5344fbd&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kullafororegon.com%2Fendorsements%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D624bbcaa728fba2db532abf4%26ss_email_id%3D624c55fc728fba2db5344fbd%26ss_campaign_name%3DEndorsements%2Bmatter%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-04-05T14%253A45%253A41Z&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=7EO2LlskTj93hpFN4Za5OWBLDsg%3D) I have. They represent the range of experiences and perspectives in Oregon, from **Ted Kulongoski’s** history of Governor-Chief Justice of the Supreme Court-Attorney General-legislator and **Lynn Peterson** , Metro Council President-Director, Washington State Department of Transportation-Clackamas County Commission Chair-Executive Director, Thousand Friends of Oregon to Morrow County Commissioner and rancher **Jim Doherty** and the **Tribal Council at Confederated Tribes of Grand Ronde**. Urban and rural, young and old, and past and future, the endorsers for my race for Labor Commissioner **represent everyone in Oregon** at some level.Representing everyone is important to me because I believe that **civil rights are for everyone** and that the Bureau of Labor and Industries work needs to reflect a deep commitment to the rights of **_everyone_** , across Oregon._My endorsers know that I have the common-sense leadership to protect the rights of everyone._**Join me publicly!** If you want your name alongside endorsers like Cassie Wilson, Mohamed Alyajouri, and Randy Knop, just reply to this email with your name and preferred title/work/passion. I’ll add you to our list of public supporters.With gratitude,**Casey Kulla**
---
|
---
[_ _**Donate now!**_ _](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=624c55fc728fba2db5344fbd&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kullafororegon.com%2Fdonate%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D624bbcaa728fba2db532abf4%26ss_email_id%3D624c55fc728fba2db5344fbd%26ss_campaign_name%3DEndorsements%2Bmatter%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-04-05T14%253A45%253A41Z&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=lVW1ql9ZK7_BVYiPI9cIrrnG50M%3D)

**AS YOU KNOW, the Trump Patriot movement is unstoppable.** From Florida to California, millions of freedom-loving Americans have shown their support for President Trump. But only the most dedicated were invited to join the 1776 Donor Club: **including you!**

Will you decide to step up to the plate one more time for Trump and for America and renew your 1776 Donor Club Membership? **We are ONLY inviting our TOP Trump Patriots to re-up their status as a member.**

Left’s attacks. ")**
245 years ago, our Founding Fathers declared independence and embarked on the greatest experiment in history: _**AMERICA**_. They laid the plans for a new nation built on the ideals of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. _**But now, those freedoms are under attack. And the Radical Left will not stop until they have dismantled this great nation from the inside out.**_

That's why we're asking top patriots, like yourself, to fight the good fight and keep America free from Pelosi's socialist agenda. We will not win this fight alone. We are depending on you to renew your membership...

name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: Another Big Endorsement
body:
Former Texas Gov. Rick Perry Endorses Erik Aadland
---
| | | | | | Press Release | April 4, 2022
---
|
---
| Thumbs up for Erik Aadland
---
| | |
---|---
|
Here is the latest from the Aadland for Congress newsroom:

(April 4, 2022) Today, Republican candidate for Congress Erik Aadland, announced the endorsement from one of America's most distinguished leaders, former Governor of Texas and U.S. Secretary of Energy Rick Perry.

Erik Aadland, a two-time Bronze Star--one for valor--earning combat veteran, and former energy sector executive is running in Colorado Congressional District 7.

Former Governor Perry is an expert on issues impacting Coloradans, such as the energy sector's affect on U.S. citizens, ways to improve production (and its importance internationally), the results of failed border policy and other issues.

In a statement sent to Aadland's campaign, former Governor Perry stated:

"Erik Aadland embodies the servant-leadership mentality Washington so desperately needs. Erik is the right choice for Congress in Colorado's 7th District. He has an impressive track record as a decorated combat veteran as well as a successful career as an energy policy expert. Erik has proven himself on the battlefield, and I know he will prove himself to be a champion in Congress for Colorado and America. I'm proud to endorse Erik Aadland for Congress."

"I am deeply honored by Governor Perry's endorsement," said Aadland. "His impressive political resume, distinguished military career in the Air Force, and tireless work in service to this country, including his impactful time as part of the Trump Administration as Secretary of Energy, leaves me humbled and encouraged to have his support."
|
---
| | |
---
| | | [Send Erik your Feedback](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001k-6_guA37KNoUi36QKU_bBH-7B67Yha0xO7odBZIJ3lVP4FUA7I-cuLujK2_gJY-MfcThi5i7nLknCVoZvM_em620HoNRa7obr1KsmyVkwkYdoOkvdQm9ppbOePykBbrgXGOlhTvsQKpUUTJ2VuP74CrVA2n99JXIUMTtvSnk-JDzPSGBByVy7RBhvfzAnKi-gbVN5wEA6JmQfASp3mPmEDue20xsWf7&c=JowIOLOoX4w8cuDrGAo3iuP1_sO4eimvQuHC-ayI48SqPSWeWfvpOQ==&ch=6gschKxoWyBtaNob9zN2CRC6xW_0byIGCUtlsBUo9sErE7bQ5mCrzg==)
---
| | |
---
| Complete list of Erik Aadland's Endorsement
---
* Rick Perry-Former Governor of Texas and Former Secretary of Energy (Trump Administration)
* Ryan Zinke-Former Secretary of Interior (Trump Administration) and Chair of SEAL PAC
* Jack Bergman-Congressman/Lieutenant General (retired)
* Don Bacon-Congressman
* Robert Simmons-Congressman
* Paul Broun-Congressman
* Kerry Bentivolio-Former Congressman
* Fred Padilla-USMC Major General (retired)
* Fred Padilla-USMC Major General (retired)
* Anders Aadland-US Army Major General (retired)
* Tom Duhs-Marine Colonel (retired)
* Combat Veterans for Congress PAC-Organization
* Sheriff Allen Cooper-Fremont County Sheriff
* Andres Pico-Colorado State Representative
* Rob Fairbank-Former Colorado State Representative
* Steve Schuck-Colorado Businessman
* Denny Gillem-Host of the Frontlines of Freedom, Vietnam Veteran

---
| |
---
| About Erik Aadland
---
Pine, CO-resident Aadland is a West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor--from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children.
---
| |
---
| About Aadland For Congress:
---
Erik's effort to represent Colorado District 7 (CD7) is a true grass-roots campaign.
There is no family fortune behind this drive. No generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization.
Volunteers and professionals began joining the cause to help send Erik to Washington in June of 2021. Staff personnel now cross the spectrum of political pundits, professional people and neighbors.
If you are interested in an Area Coordinator opportunity with Erik's campaign, use the link below to send your information, or contact
[staff@aadlandforcolorado.com](mailto:staff@aadlandforcolorado.com)
---

This isn’t your typical political ad, because Tom isn’t your typical candidate.
Tom is the son of immigrants. His first job was on the back of a garbage truck. Because of his work ethic and commitment to his community, he worked his way up to being President Obama’s Secretary of Labor.
It shows who Tom is as a person, and who he’ll be as a leader.
We want as many Maryland voters to see this ad as possible – so we’re asking you for help to keep in on the air.

name: ICYMI News
subject: Counter false history and anti-American teaching
body:
There is a powerful movement in our culture to teach young Americans that our nation’s history is oppressive and shameful.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zaoqnagi1b6mc8bh1gc1358bv7gr99d3j6epp0b0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shjm0o75cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tpjcuqe0p5gsppmad9l6ti3cc70m5p62dtlm5qn0t346eo67d77m1g6bdlgcdjrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup32pjgmaqr0ptnclj30s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5om7o4u7d771fgbrn67ss80cd1clhs5h7ve537o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shjm0o75cph2bs)
---
| |
Fellow American, There is a powerful movement in our culture to teach young Americans that our nation’s history is **oppressive** and **shameful**. Sometimes, this effort goes under the name “critical race theory.” Other times, activists advance these ideas through works like _The_ _New York Times_ ’ __ “1619 Project.”

This radical movement pushes a narrative that slavery, not freedom, is the defining characteristic of American history. They teach our children that we should replace equal individual rights with the idea of unequal rights based on group identity.
---
| | **Hillsdale College is committed to countering this destructive ideology. That’s why we have produced a new, free online course titled[“Civil Rights in American History.”](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6qkom7k2idg1f8qssvf6gm23e8j335fg7ui8ehg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shjm0o75cph2bs) And right now, it is available in a special, limited DVD box set.** When you take this course, you’ll learn about:
* How our Founding Founders understood equality, natural rights, and civil rights.
* The quest for justice in America through the Civil War, during Reconstruction, and in the 20th century.
* The danger posed to freedom and civil rights today by identity politics.

---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0lhno3amtbkdu3jjsb2qr4onp13npfgvv5umph8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shjm0o75cph2bs)
---
| | **You can help promote “Civil Rights in American History” and receive your very own DVD box set of this timely and important new course by giving a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more today.** As we do all of our work, we produce free online courses while refusing to accept _any_ government funding. We don’t even receive indirect funding in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. At Hillsdale, we rely entirely on the support of private citizens like you who agree with our mission on behalf of liberty. Please help promote Hillsdale’s free online courses and other educational outreach efforts during this critical time by making your best gift today. And don’t forget. When you give $100 or more, you’ll receive your very own DVD box set of **“Civil Rights in American History.”** You can make your tax-deductible donation using the secure link below: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-civil-rights-in-american-history-dvd**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zurj0hl0p9doeu1tk1rmeas3pghnmk8kbogalvqo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shjm0o75cph2bs) But please don’t wait. There are only a limited number of “**Civil Rights in American History** ” DVD box sets available, so reserve your copy before they’re gone. Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its educational mission on behalf of liberty. Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Congresswoman Val Demings
subject: a few minutes to spare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda
| | |
---
I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare.
So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate.
Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was _destined_ for something bigger.
So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader who understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win.
So, I decided to run. And now, I'm 2 points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups.

It's critical that we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida.
My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: I hate to ask this, but if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you donate $5 today? Here's the best link to contribute: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43794949/338758176/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2840-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGNiNjdmMy1mNWI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mhRyeaa3wDcC5q6SSI5dXEfuyx0kgn0JqKAX5LgizBg=)**
All the best,

Val Demings

clean_body: I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda | | | I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare. So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate. Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was destined for something bigger. So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader who understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win. So, I decided to run. And now, I'm 2 points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups. It's critical that we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida. My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: I hate to ask this, but if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you donate $5 today? Here's the best link to contribute: = All the best, Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. | Friend
Under Biden and the Socialists, America has been put on the back burner. The Leftist Elites only come out of their swamp holes when they need to pass legislation that pads their bank accounts and their pet projects. Meanwhile, Americans are struggling to make it by.
The Biden administration has been a revolving door of non-stop, self-made crises. Their weak leadership and radical agenda are dragging our nation to one of its lowest points.
Americans deserve real solutions to the real problems we face, not more socialist nonsense.
---
| | | [GET CONSERVATIVES IN CONGRESS TO END THE BIDEN CRISES](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wRJN1kxNhN9WiR_BI1q4b9Hi9ST3vtUNdMaT7ufnBdeiZLN5PkJS0irZEbQDN7bPU95qIN2B_H_iIU92CxT2WQjy5UdSb8lF8UipeI6jIpauGoO1JCKlm1LiRfKAEgkE9p_2Ut9F0KNQH5BjKZz6cK48EgYQBY3BqsElwR43y32yDb6dOt-3E0wGEbr6nB-VWmSs5z8o7-0=&c=1nLMR3Sf1rtkqEocJu1Km5UPxxxIEb3BAj-gu85FpvScxtp7jhK4TA==&ch=_SKzXhys1uZfgjrQjFRD9Qfu-OSQzACxQuXgZVjhK4iW4ikUs_xS-Q==)

| Under the America First agenda, Kat will do her part to fight for:

* American energy independence to lower our gas prices.
* A secure southern border to end the illegal immigration and drug crisis.
* More funding for law enforcement to combat rising crime.
* Stopping excessive spending on Socialist policies to combat inflation.
* Ensuring our children and parents are supported in the classroom.

She needs the support of patriots like you to help bring these real solutions that the American people deserve. The Radical Left had their chance to make our country better, now it's time for the Red Wave to take over in November to actually get it done.
[Can Kat count on your support to end the Radical Left majority?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wRJN1kxNhN9WiR_BI1q4b9Hi9ST3vtUNdMaT7ufnBdeiZLN5PkJS0irZEbQDN7bPU95qIN2B_H_iIU92CxT2WQjy5UdSb8lF8UipeI6jIpauGoO1JCKlm1LiRfKAEgkE9p_2Ut9F0KNQH5BjKZz6cK48EgYQBY3BqsElwR43y32yDb6dOt-3E0wGEbr6nB-VWmSs5z8o7-0=&c=1nLMR3Sf1rtkqEocJu1Km5UPxxxIEb3BAj-gu85FpvScxtp7jhK4TA==&ch=_SKzXhys1uZfgjrQjFRD9Qfu-OSQzACxQuXgZVjhK4iW4ikUs_xS-Q==)

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43796038/338759358/-74008005?refcode=20220405_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGM0YmE3ZC1mN2I0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lfDVQiIJ2SsQPj-CJAwltA7ujRpipxJ_d1Fm0PlQjfM=) Friend, I'm Val Demings, and I'm running for the U.S. Senate to defeat Marco Rubio and win better, stronger leadership for the people of Florida. Just 10,033 votes (0.2 percentage points) decided Florida's last Senate race – so I'll tell you the plain truth: **I cannot win this without you.** [**That's why I'm asking you to become one of the donors to my campaign for Senate by splitting a contribution between me and Serve America right now. Every dollar you can spare will help us build the strongest grassroots operation to defeat Rubio, flip Florida blue and defend our Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43796039/338759359/-74008005?refcode=20220405_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGM0YmE3ZC1mN2I0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lfDVQiIJ2SsQPj-CJAwltA7ujRpipxJ_d1Fm0PlQjfM=) Every day, I carry with me that I am a descendent of enslaved people, people who knew that they would not make it, but dreamed and prayed that one day I would. Their prayers carried me to this day – carried me through a life of public service as a social worker, as a law enforcement officer, the first Black woman to serve as Orlando's police chief, and as the proud representative of Florida's 10th Congressional district. **So hear me when I say this: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the ’60s, have an amazing story of opportunity like mine.** The prayers of my parents propel me forward, even now, giving me the strength and courage it takes to do what's right. To impeach and prosecute a corrupt president. To never stop fighting for gun safety reform. To push for truth, accountability, justice. [**I stand on the side of our democratic institutions, on the side of everyday working Floridians – but I need your help to win this race. Will you split a contribution of $20 or more to Serve America and me to defeat Marco Rubio, win in Florida and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43796040/338759360/-74008005?refcode=20220405_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGM0YmE3ZC1mN2I0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lfDVQiIJ2SsQPj-CJAwltA7ujRpipxJ_d1Fm0PlQjfM=) In my decades of public service, I've worked with some truly incredible individuals – champions of civil rights like my friend John Lewis, who said, "Each generation must do its part to create an even more fair, more just society." We're at an inflection point for our democracy that will decide if we live up to John Lewis' dream, friend. The modern-day Republican Party is committed to the exact opposite of what Congressman Lewis stood for. Marco Rubio and Senate Republicans grow more extreme by the day, more committed to a dangerous, anti-democratic agenda. Putting party over the future of our democracy, over the wants and needs of Florida's working families. You have my word, that when it comes to winning this race and delivering better leadership for Florida, I will fight like never before. Because when your friends and neighbors put their trust in you to be their voice, you work for them – and that's just not what we're seeing from Sen. Rubio. But it's only together that we'll have a shot at winning – so here's what I'm counting on: **6,112 donations, before 11:59 p.m. tonight. Are you in, friend?** [**Split a contribution between Serve America and me of $20 or more right now – whatever you can spare to fuel our battleground Senate race – so we can defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43796041/338759361/-74008005?refcode=20220405_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGM0YmE3ZC1mN2I0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lfDVQiIJ2SsQPj-CJAwltA7ujRpipxJ_d1Fm0PlQjfM=) From the bottom of my heart, friend, thank you for being on my team. —Congresswoman Val Demings name: Rep. Elissa Slotkin (D-MI)
subject: Keeping the House runs thru Michigan
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_slotkin?refcode=20220405_CGVA_Slotkin [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_slotkin?refcode=20220405_CGVA_Slotkin]
"My race is the most competitive House race in Michigan, and one of the most competitive in the entire country." - Rep. Elissa Slotkin [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_slotkin?refcode=20220405_CGVA_Slotkin]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_slotkin?refcode=20220405_CGVA_Slotkin [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_slotkin?refcode=20220405_CGVA_Slotkin]
Derek,
Let me introduce myself: I'm Congresswoman Elissa Slotkin. I currently represent Michigan's 8th district, one of only seven seats in the entire U.S. House that voted for Donald Trump for President AND a Democrat for the House. I'm running to represent the newly drawn 7th district, now more rural and 3k square miles, for my third term in Congress.
My race is the most competitive House race in Michigan, and one of the most competitive in the entire country. As a result, I'm a top target for national Republicans.
But, I’m still pretty new to politics. I've spent my life in public service. After 9/11, I dedicated my career to national security. I served at the CIA, the White House, and the Pentagon under presidents of both parties – while also serving three tours in Iraq alongside our military. I decided to run for Congress in 2017 after watching my then-Congressman vote to gut the Affordable Care Act.
Healthcare is a deeply personal issue for me. When my mother was diagnosed with Stage IV ovarian cancer in 2009, she couldn’t afford health insurance due to her pre-existing condition.
So when the U.S. House voted to cut protections for people with pre-existing conditions and held a big party to celebrate at the White House, something inside me broke. I said, "No. You don't get to do this. You don't get to ignore your constituents, vote against their interests, and keep your job." I flipped the seat in 2018 and won it again in 2020 – an election where my district also voted for Donald Trump.
Now, as we head into an election season with a razor-thin Democratic majority in the House, I've got my work cut out for me.
In 2018, Republican groups spent over $7 million against me and my campaign, and this time around, it's only going to be worse as the other side hurls baseless attack ads, again and again. I'm the only Democrat still left in the House who won a seat that went for Romney in 2012, Trump in 2016, and Trump again in 2020. And my new seat is a lot bigger and a lot more rural.
This is all to say, the path to keeping the House runs directly through my new district . That’s why I’m showing up in your email today. I would be so grateful if you considered splitting a contribution between my campaign and Common Good to help me and other candidates across the country keep the House blue in 2022. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_slotkin?refcode=20220405_CGVA_Slotkin]
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20211212_CGVA_Kelly]DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_slotkin?refcode=20220405_CGVA_Slotkin&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_slotkin?refcode=20220405_CGVA_Slotkin&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_slotkin?refcode=20220405_CGVA_Slotkin&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_slotkin?refcode=20220405_CGVA_Slotkin&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_slotkin?refcode=20220405_CGVA_Slotkin&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_slotkin?refcode=20220405_CGVA_Slotkin&amount=35]
Thank you for considering it!
Elissa

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Bad new for Hillary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz_
body:
Dear Peter:

Special Counsel John Durham just dropped another bombshell that is bad news for Hillary Clinton.

Durham unearthed another smoking gun text message that showed the Clinton campaign formed a "joint venture or conspiracy" with other Deep State goons to frame Donald Trump for colluding with the Russians.

**You and I already know that Hillary Clinton spied on Donald Trump.**

Donald Trump's former Director of National Intelligence remarked this scandal runs so deep that Durham can indict multiple Clinton allies and Deep State conspirators.

"Russia-gate" is worse than Watergate, and it's time to demand the entire Durham report be made public.

**But if Nancy Pelosi remains Speaker of the House,_the truth will stay buried forever_.**

**That's why I need your help to elect an _America First_ majority in Congress so that I can vote for Donald J. Trump as Speaker of the House.**

Will you help me fire Nancy Pelosi and **[expose the truth about Hillary Clinton's crimes against Donald Trump](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59915344:sS4XCSHNv:m:1:2365227053:B5214B1F04E1E027472130D1195F9368:r)** by **[chipping in a contribution of $10, $25, or $50 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59915344:sS4XCSHNv:m:1:2365227053:B5214B1F04E1E027472130D1195F9368:r)?**

Speaker Donald Trump will subpoena Joe Biden's corrupt Justice Department and force the Deep State to cough up the Durham report.

And Speaker Trump will subpoena Crooked Hillary Clinton to appear before Congress and answer under oath what she knew and when she knew about the Russian collusion hoax.

**Holding Hillary Clinton accountable for her campaign's crimes against Donald Trump and the American people in 2016 requires _proven _America First_ fighters_.**

But the real "coup" and the real "insurrection" came when Hillary Clinton and her agents conspired with the Deep State to falsely accuse Donald Trump of colluding with the Russians.

get away with the crime of the century.**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59915344:sS4XCSHNv:m:1:2365227053:B5214B1F04E1E027472130D1195F9368:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59915344:sS4XCSHNv:m:1:2365227053:B5214B1F04E1E027472130D1195F9368:r) **That's why I need your help to elect an _America First_ majority and support Donald Trump for Speaker of the House.**

Shontel Brown
As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**

Team Sykes

subject: This is not what Ohioans want
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | "Members of the public present yelled 'cheater' and 'no' as the commission approved the maps in a 4-3 vote." -- _The Columbus Dispatch_

**This process has been hijacked. Help us fight back >> ** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43805829/338776000/1375374031?refcode=em22_220404_Maps_fndd_gq_act___TODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220404_Maps_fndd_gq_act___TODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzdiMGNkNC0wMWI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aULKEJtRxo4GbPWn3H_wKPZvEmM8Y3sdykozcKOIlgg=)
---
The Ohio Supreme Court struck down three versions of Republican gerrymandered state legislative maps. But now a fourth map has been approved by Republicans on the Ohio Redistricting Commission in a 4-3 vote.

Ohio Republicans have blatantly ignored the maps created in the public eye and have disregarded the voices of Ohioans who want fair representation and to end gerrymandering.

When Democrats take one step forward, the GOP is only interested in taking three steps back.

**[But this fight is far from over. We need your help to fight for fair maps in Ohio. name: Emily Seidel
subject: The government is trying to take over your healthcare
body:
URGENT: Congress is considering price controls on prescription drugs representing a dangerous government takeover of your medici
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkkf7vo54duo711til1ismdu2mc002kdnrga9ab0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbq6aplicph79ptjclqm5crn6gqr1cr0ccpnat73cgpb0pb4s3hb4tj7mepnas30sv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66libac70e9o6ct30mdg6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5ie8pr0s1h60oh5u)
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuk9qjbtt6b0cpbu4lmeeghr8sk110ognhsgp75o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shjm1o32c1h2bs)
---
**URGENT: Congress is considering price controls on prescription drugs representing a dangerous government takeover of your medicine cabinet.** When it comes to prescription drugs, we all want affordability. But lower prices are meaningless if people can’t get the drugs they need in the first place. Unfortunately, Washington is looking to enact a government takeover of prescription drugs that will lead to drug rationing and leave you with less access to the drugs you need the most. We need to know where you stand, Friend:
---
**SHOULD THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT DICTATE THE PRICE OF LIFESAVING PRESCRIPTION DRUGS?**
---
| | [**YES**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn2qf0u19bmsuu4pp8sa6tvctkrbnjaa8shfogq8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shjm1o32c1h2bs)
---
| [**NO**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zp51ekqn2urupstsrb7opq62i84970n7k9kl2ir8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shjm1o32c1h2bs)
---
| | [**YES**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8pfk361fvlq5ihq3009q26ni660t96h3sa7l55g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shjm1o32c1h2bs)
---
| [**NO**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpco53vn2sujrghg639d1k1flgv0qd7t375k0960_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shjm1o32c1h2bs)
---
| | _Please submit your response to represent your area by midnight tonight._
---
**Friend: If you do not believe the government should control the price of prescription drugs, then you must make your voice heard. ** The pandemic has shown that the way to get Americans more and quicker access to life-saving drugs and treatments is to get the government out of the way. Innovation is driven by competition and free markets, not the government. This is a lesson Washington always forgets. The federal government has repeatedly fumbled important healthcare issues:
* Despite $83 BILLION in funding for COVID-19 testing, the government failed for almost a year to give Americans access to affordable rapid test on demand
* 1 out of every 5 Medicaid dollars was misspent by Washington over the last two years costing taxpayers $143 billion
* Obamacare has increased the average health insurance premium by over 130%. Healthcare price controls enacted by Obamacare are the reasons premiums are high and access to doctors is shrinking.

A government takeover of our medicine cabinets is a prescription for disaster. This is why we have launched a petition to force your elected officials to vote against any consideration of drug pricing controls. But we need 100,000 signatures to make them think twice about ignoring your demands. **You can make your voice heard here:[https://americansforprosperity.org/drug-pricing-petition](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7j84ashlpvsgph4h79uufe71cnq3vpeth74t390_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shjm1o32c1h2bs)** We think enough is enough, but we need to know where top supporters like you stand, friend. That’s why we’re conducting a 1-question survey for readers in your area by midnight tonight.
---
**SHOULD THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT DICTATE THE PRICE OF LIFESAVING PRESCRIPTION DRUGS?**
---
| | [**YES**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi61bc7t7psdoup6m84j0bm696ck8q05f51hosj0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shjm1o32c1h2bs)
---
| [**NO**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zldvmkkr9901vmv5jogpkvm8se5ncpj40bed0lm8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shjm1o32c1h2bs)
---
| | [**YES**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4mndkcnsvnkgf8ilosi0p0ul8kbmte5v1irq5oo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shjm1o32c1h2bs)
---
| [**NO**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8lv7njeguagkm2on564eao925escn6m8u8mtj80_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shjm1o32c1h2bs)
---
| | Please take the 1-question survey right now and sign the open letter to lend your voice to the effort to stop a dangerous government takeover of your medicine cabinet now. Thank you for all you do, —Emily Emily Seidel
President and CEO, Americans for Prosperity
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zv0krambluqr801k9rn4129c237btl5gjedbthfg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shjm1o32c1h2bs)
---
Americans for Prosperity 1310 N Courthouse Road Suite 700 Arlington Virginia 22201 United States
This email was sent by Americans for Prosperity.
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Blue Iowa 2022
subject: Ike Eisenhower was president when Grassley was first elected
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Peter – when Sen. Chuck Grassley first started serving in public office it was 1959. President Eisenhower was in office and Alaska had only just become a state.
Since then, he’s come out in support of term limits. But sixty-three years after he was first elected to office, he still hasn't tried to actually make them happen. Now he’s running for an EIGHTH term in the U.S. Senate and it doesn’t seem like he’s too worried about those term limits he once promised to fight for.
**So this year, let's finally retire Chuck Grassley and elect someone who will truly fight for term limits.**
Democrat Abby Finkenauer – the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue – is running to end Sen. Grassley's decades-long grip on power. She's announced her support for term limits, and unlike Sen. Grassley, she actually means it. **Abby has pledged to only serve two terms in the Senate, because if you're doing your job right, 12 years is more than enough time to get things done for the people you serve.**
Abby has what it takes to defeat Sen. Grassley and fight for term limits in the Senate, but she needs you with her. [Can you join our team of grassroots donors with a $5 donation? Every dollar helps us flip this seat blue and expand our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43806154/338777832/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk857-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTBiOTQ4NS0wMmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RRqvq0_8UzG0gj_ZUeM-k_Mp4ZZKzY2aHSi0rp3OWug=)
Plain and simple: eight terms in the United States Senate is too damn long for anybody – especially someone like Sen. Grassley who's spent his time in Washington cozying up to lobbyists and owning a near-million dollar house while fighting against policies that would improve the lives of working Iowans.
He's failed Iowans and he's left working families behind – and now voters are ready to show him the door. Polling shows that he's facing his highest disapproval rating on record! **After so many decades in Washington, Sen. Grassley has some powerful allies with deep pockets.****** Republicans have already raised more than $130 MILLION to defeat Democrats like Abby and take back the Senate. You can bet they'll be lining up to defend vulnerable incumbents like their long-time buddy, Sen. Grassley.
**Abby's got the momentum here on the ground to win, but she needs powerful grassroots resources to capitalize on it.[If you think that eight terms in the Senate is too damn long, can you make your first $5 donation to defeat Sen. Grassley and expand our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43806163/338777839/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk857-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTBiOTQ4NS0wMmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RRqvq0_8UzG0gj_ZUeM-k_Mp4ZZKzY2aHSi0rp3OWug=)**

clean_body: | | | Peter – when Sen. Chuck Grassley first started serving in public office it was 1959. President Eisenhower was in office and Alaska had only just become a state. Since then, he’s come out in support of term limits. But sixty-three years after he was first elected to office, he still hasn't tried to actually make them happen. Now he’s running for an EIGHTH term in the U.S. Senate and it doesn’t seem like he’s too worried about those term limits he once promised to fight for. So this year, let's finally retire Chuck Grassley and elect someone who will truly fight for term limits. Democrat Abby Finkenauer – the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue – is running to end Sen. Grassley's decades-long grip on power. She's announced her support for term limits, and unlike Sen. Grassley, she actually means it. Abby has pledged to only serve two terms in the Senate, because if you're doing your job right, 12 years is more than enough time to get things done for the people you serve. Abby has what it takes to defeat Sen. Grassley and fight for term limits in the Senate, but she needs you with her. = Plain and simple: eight terms in the United States Senate is too damn long for anybody – especially someone like Sen. Grassley who's spent his time in Washington cozying up to lobbyists and owning a near-million dollar house while fighting against policies that would improve the lives of working Iowans. He's failed Iowans and he's left working families behind – and now voters are ready to show him the door. Polling shows that he's facing his highest disapproval rating on record! After so many decades in Washington, Sen. Grassley has some powerful allies with deep pockets.** Republicans have already raised more than $130 MILLION to defeat Democrats like Abby and take back the Senate. You can bet they'll be lining up to defend vulnerable incumbents like their long-time buddy, Sen. Grassley. Abby's got the momentum here on the ground to win, but she needs powerful grassroots resources to capitalize on it.=** If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Yesli Vega
subject: Vega Update: You Can’t Keep Americans Down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yesli Vega for Virginia
body:
|
---
We all know the last two years, **and especially the last fifteen months** have been arguably the most difficult stretch in recent American history.

To make matters worse, many politicians seized the opportunity to limit your freedoms and push through legislation and policies that they otherwise would have never gotten away with.

One of the few bright spots of the last couple years is that it’s been a reminder for many of just how fragile and precious our freedoms are and that they must be fought for and protected every day.

This past weekend I had the opportunity to meet with entrepreneurs from across the Seventh District that haven’t let the virus keep them down, and despite the government’s best efforts, are trudging along and serving as shining examples of American ingenuity and the can-do spirit that defines our nation.

I visited with small business owners, the backbone of our country and economy along Main Street in Culpeper (the same people Barack Obama and Joe Biden once famously said “didn’t build” their companies). Any time I talk to an entrepreneur I’m left motivated and better than I was before. The stories are different, but at the same time, almost exactly the same. Americans that started their business because they had no other option to put food on the table or because they wanted something more. Risk-takers who help to employ our neighbors and provide a quality of life in their specific communities unsurpassed anywhere else in the world.

From lockdowns and mandates, high taxes and over-regulation, these folks have been beaten down - but are still standing.

They embody the American Spirit that comes as a result of the free-enterprise system put into place by our Founders. This past weekend was a reminder that even if the temporary holders of power abuse their power, Americans aren’t giving up, they’re not giving in, and this November will be a reward for those that just got out of the people’s way and let America, be America.

**On The Ballot!**

On March 21st, the Vega campaign turned in well above the required number of signatures from Seventh district voters to make the ballot for the June 21st primary. Special thanks to all the voters across the Seventh who took the time to sign and have allowed me the opportunity to earn your votes in this must-win election to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi and Abigail Spanberger!

**Lake Ridge Rotary Breakfast**

On March 23rd I was invited to address the members of the Lake Ridge Rotary Club. Lake Ridge is an active and engaged census designated place and neighborhood in eastern Prince William County which regularly touts one of the highest voter turnout rates in the Commonwealth. While there, I discussed and answered questions on the proposed Prince William County budget _and my fight to provide Prince William County homeowners with the first cut to their real estate tax bill in fourteen years_ in addition to a newly proposed 4% meals tax at county restaurants, which I also staunchly oppose. Most in this bipartisan group agreed they were taxed enough already. Thank you to the Lake Ridge Rotary Club for allowing me to address your group and breakfast!

**Interviewed by CBS Evening News in Orange County**

On March 24th, I had the privilege of speaking to the wonderful Republicans of the Orange County Republican Committee at The Silk Mill Grille. While there, I was also interviewed by CBS Evening News on the importance of this race and the spin Abigail Spanberger and the Democrats are trying to put on rising gas prices and inflation. As you’ll see in the clip [**HERE**](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=ca8cb71f06374f9c9ceca4fc264047f6&_e=-jR90Zg5VGC_-nAEZ05Y2ydL_4Gc3ei_7vHU23SfOJqlLfiQZyX8lF8WL1gEp9ab_2h7NLjOG7D-v7z3ZNOLy08hyLMQhKv7GmdzcihuWoWGllkY94Izbi1ZKlrOmkova_pt6b3obHTwHzFBhc8R2pXAXXUwOzyaUyzH4d2kqPUk4ukM86QV0MA7BRPGz6L01i0TXEW_LehXBCEbfoV9rgIIHYRR5xgy4Lu3JnJ81vS1xanqiZLuUEuWq19wmf8fwRtRcvf2_wq96S8CsYIppaB3XokBiP8nMaEPm746Ra0%3D), I will not let Spanberger off the hook while she and her party try to blame the invasion of Ukraine for the increase in oil prices. We all know the price of gas hit $3.50 a gallon well beforehand. This was a direct result of this Administration’s war on American energy independence and we’re not going to let the voters of the Seventh district have the wool pulled over their eyes.

**In The House of The Lord**

The last two Sunday’s I was fortunate enough to have been invited to join the congregations at Heritage Baptist Church in Woodbridge and Trinity Bible Church in Fredericksburg.

One of my favorite verses of scripture is found in the second part of 2 Corinthians 3:17, **_“Where the Spirit of The Lord is, there is freedom.”_** This of course applies to our souls, but we’ve seen this play out time and time again throughout our nation’s history. It’s no coincidence that a country founded upon religious freedom ended up producing the greatest opportunity for, and example of, individual freedom the world has ever known. And it’s not surprising that as our leaders attempt to push God out of the public square we have similarly seen our individual liberties beginning to be usurped. As the preamble to our Declaration states, we are made in the image of God Himself, and because of that we are entitled to the dignity of living as a free person.

In Congress, I will be a defender of religious liberty and the ability of a free people to live out their lives according to their conscience. Jefferson’s famous letter to the Danbury Baptists, the one many on the left cite to prevent faith in the public square, was anything but. Any wall between church and state was not to prevent people from practicing their faith, privately or publicly. **But to specifically prevent the government from enacting such prohibitions.**

**The Prince William GOP Isn’t Tired of Winning**

On Monday night I had the pleasure of visiting with my fellow committee members of the Prince William County Republican Committee as we welcomed in our new Chairman, Denny Daugherty. Denny has been a longtime Republican activist in the county and is dedicated to making sure a Republican is not only elected in the 7th Congressional District, but the 10th as well.

**This was the same core of activists that helped me to win a seat by 13 points in 2019 that Ralph Northam won by 8 just two years prior.** We’re blessed to have one of the best committees in Northern Virginia.

Special thanks to outgoing Chairman Tim Parrish for his leadership and commitment to advancing our party and our cause over these last two challenging years.

**End of Quarter Fundraising Deadline**

Through the end of December, Democrat Congresswoman Abigail Spanberger had nearly $3 million in liberal, special interest cash sitting in her campaign coffers with a recent commitment by Nancy Pelosi **to spend at least $3 million additional to keep her loyal foot soldier in office.** Make no mistake - taking back the Seventh is going to require the financial resources necessary to do so.

That’s why I spent a large part of the week fundraising and calling folks like yourself to invest into this critical campaign to defeat Spanberger and take back the House. I’m so grateful and thankful to the hundreds of modern-day John Hancock’s who stepped up to support our campaign.

**Life First Gala**

On Friday evening I attended the annual Life First Fundraiser in Manassas with over 600 defenders of life and couples dealing with unplanned pregnancies. While there I bumped into my friend and our fantastic pro-life Attorney General, Jason Miyares. Attorney General Miyares has proven a passionate voice for the innocent and voiceless, which has extended to the unborn. I was honored to play a small role on his transition team and have been overjoyed by his leadership as our top lawman.

Life First has helped thousands of women and couples to choose life and I’m proud to support such a fine and literal life-giving organization. Together, we will be the Pro-Life Generation!

**Other Events Around the Seventh**

As previously mentioned, this past weekend was a great time meeting and connecting with voters at meet and greets and business tours around the Seventh.

On Saturday morning, my Culpeper County Campaign Chair, Dewey McDonnell, hosted a meet and greet with voters in Culpeper at the Reformation Lutheran Church. The City and County of Culpeper is going to be critical to defeating Abigail Spanberger and our campaign is locked in to earn and fight for every vote out of Culpeper.

We followed up the meet and greet with a small business tour where we visited 4 C’s Restaurant, Culpeper Cheese Company, Shenandoah Garden Spot, Botanical Dwellings, Moving Meadows Farm, and The Beer Hound Brewery. Thanks to all these amazing small business owners for opening up their doors. Our local small business owners can be assured they have a friend in Yesli Vega.

Finally, we capped the day with a meet and greet with over 40 new Vega for Virginia voters at the Basilico New York Deli in Fredericksburg. The diverse crowd consisted of small business owners, faith leaders, and back the blue supporters excited about our message of defending the American Dream, religious liberty, and support for our men and women in law enforcement.

Team Vega was also present the last couple weeks at local GOP Committee meetings in Greene and Madison Counties.

**Media Buzz**

On March 25th I took time to interview with David Webb of Patriot Radio on SiriusXM. You may know David as the host of “Reality Check with David Webb” on FoxNation. To listen to our full interview which touched on border security, Abigail Spanberger’s weaknesses, and the path to taking back the Seventh, [**please click here.**](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=ca8cb71f06374f9c9ceca4fc264047f6&_e=-jR90Zg5VGC_-nAEZ05Y2xtSX6GUghWXelQ7O--MVzLn-X-R56Desp_AsMOkrwA7b0ORQ17ABAiZPlOCoyDreconIRQEsoQSa4d_pc7uw29qW1dAcWZvCkahRC9Vp32Imdp02jTfNMko2Rs2sKFiebB2EgqoiWENgm5Bp3N5l_tuFItIJwvpahw1wN6YiARQGQrQHanBnToWl2-e3KqGW7YsTNJSnHqbA2N-08MpIH8H1C0KzyuCqMWIuv0Xe83yocb7vJ8N6NIbSudKt7taIV641XyyhKJPzR1PmyevUPO_9kA_kf7G0BNJGZT1NcogiRk6fXsYoTyg_rGJG5e4_EOv3qMIfzosuGVYZb5phJQ%3D)

The week upcoming will be another busy one on the trail as the primary candidate field is officially set and the 7th District Convention taking place on April 9th in Caroline County, amongst other GOP meetings. I look forward to meeting you on the trail!

For Liberty,

Yesli Vega
_Prince William County Sheriff’s Deputy_
_Prince William County Supervisor_
_Conservative Republican for Congress_ | [**DONATE NOW** ](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=ca8cb71f06374f9c9ceca4fc264047f6&_e=-jR90Zg5VGC_-nAEZ05Y25s4a-Tt9VSKZ5JEWZmPHd9tfnnpbxJBffKVZIutnAbnnTs7khdHM0U_XpcdGwXExM4z2h8yKIDgem9LRToFOps_8UY8BZPBPfn662W1CC_p0DuJyB-ZAeDWPHgxlLxJF47hKG48DEXtXX-DuTbFERJ3KCzoR8OuZtDVkc8dLF5BmjmipR_YOh5eNw3eV5wDWIe0uG9OaWRDU0oatilLEhXmYXpY2fvOc5-k8JxvowT39mkAebeYljK8mGyQxXiFgqvJqcvHQk8gcxZuksauVfHOxyfmVR-rrZVg3j9SG3izX2JallxdrTCW_PRh-lM2gx9llVVF3rqIRB-3rt9RZYzoydnE1u8nXdz_P9p30ircythXIFOLfvqO6ZDFysTaruIlMf_Sbmx7aGUdkYYa0XoLrmIcTymcS2ojQFAR9UIkG2teUfPnnEv5q5kqhVcfr2i7_hu0kP0qWc6ViUB8FHo7wkyIBMgKvRkJcusuxMcH)
---

[](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=ca8cb71f06374f9c9ceca4fc264047f6&_e=-jR90Zg5VGC_-nAEZ05Y2zWrbGzWUwBet1fYmlUHkZX_XbgImL2QZ2bFld9Vr_m2Kaxy8RSwj0LUr8p92n2ljfN7xoZlqQpr2Lu9RItLr7lt-ed-7U6VO5rAJ120Es8t_YVHOu0VdjQq1T7fV9IbuK0d-UwcW-ca3Th8MC0ijtomGwoBgEqQsXGru_pTpXlHBg35zLbO8f8RU_j7f9f-as5__FVAjgm2x4GyiKodJ3uxvRblQ-W0HIcomqAwyQ0YdoYJ-JWo8-5IjN5apfNWEQ%3D%3D)[](http://links.yeslivega.com/u/click?_t=59c0f017400946ec807e855a5aba0785&_m=ca8cb71f06374f9c9ceca4fc264047f6&_e=-jR90Zg5VGC_-nAEZ05Y2xnvNvfo4adgXdpK_1FcD2Q0RD9K4iVhcQeXLxcqrfdgibu3Q02UoyoX558nou1X-v8k72nNUdYZjXlgiU5doFwRySlmxw6OLUIcM-RH5SiMdCUmp90kpwGW0e6uPW54LTr5IEDVrqqDE2ImL3eIK8UddG1b1qUIQDilLEmXr-LYCVuxbytv4sHo1QIfs3s-vEO-kL_XgKmx3joA-1-Qgf06EdemOvhUyXR_DPesBkiUQ6WxQRTzZjUR4x_uCWA3ig%3D%3D) | **Military Wife. Mother. Law Enforcement Officer.**

This was a direct result of this Administration’s war on American energy independence and we’re not going to let the voters of the Seventh district have the wool pulled over their eyes. In The House of The Lord The last two Sunday’s I was fortunate enough to have been invited to join the congregations at Heritage Baptist Church in Woodbridge and Trinity Bible Church in Fredericksburg. One of my favorite verses of scripture is found in the second part of 2 Corinthians 3:17, “Where the Spirit of The Lord is, there is freedom.” This of course applies to our souls, but we’ve seen this play out time and time again throughout our nation’s history. It’s no coincidence that a country founded upon religious freedom ended up producing the greatest opportunity for, and example of, individual freedom the world has ever known. And it’s not surprising that as our leaders attempt to push God out of the public square we have similarly seen our individual liberties beginning to be usurped. As the preamble to our Declaration states, we are made in the image of God Himself, and because of that we are entitled to the dignity of living as a free person. In Congress, I will be a defender of religious liberty and the ability of a free people to live out their lives according to their conscience. Jefferson’s famous letter to the Danbury Baptists, the one many on the left cite to prevent faith in the public square, was anything but. Any wall between church and state was not to prevent people from practicing their faith, privately or publicly. But to specifically prevent the government from enacting such prohibitions. The Prince William GOP Isn’t Tired of Winning On Monday night I had the pleasure of visiting with my fellow committee members of the Prince William County Republican Committee as we welcomed in our new Chairman, Denny Daugherty. Denny has been a longtime Republican activist in the county and is dedicated to making sure a Republican is not only elected in the 7th Congressional District, but the 10th as well. This was the same core of activists that helped me to win a seat by 13 points in 2019 that Ralph Northam won by 8 just two years prior. We’re blessed to have one of the best committees in Northern Virginia. Special thanks to outgoing Chairman Tim Parrish for his leadership and commitment to advancing our party and our cause over these last two challenging years. End of Quarter Fundraising Deadline Through the end of December, Democrat Congresswoman Abigail Spanberger had nearly $3 million in liberal, special interest cash sitting in her campaign coffers with a recent commitment by Nancy Pelosi to spend at least $3 million additional to keep her loyal foot soldier in office. Make no mistake - taking back the Seventh is going to require the financial resources necessary to do so. That’s why I spent a large part of the week fundraising and calling folks like yourself to invest into this critical campaign to defeat Spanberger and take back the House. I’m so grateful and thankful to the hundreds of modern-day John Hancock’s who stepped up to support our campaign. Life First Gala On Friday evening I attended the annual Life First Fundraiser in Manassas with over 600 defenders of life and couples dealing with unplanned pregnancies. While there I bumped into my friend and our fantastic pro-life Attorney General, Jason Miyares. Attorney General Miyares has proven a passionate voice for the innocent and voiceless, which has extended to the unborn. I was honored to play a small role on his transition team and have been overjoyed by his leadership as our top lawman. Life First has helped thousands of women and couples to choose life and I’m proud to support such a fine and literal life-giving organization. Together, we will be the Pro-Life Generation! Other Events Around the Seventh As previously mentioned, this past weekend was a great time meeting and connecting with voters at meet and greets and business tours around the Seventh. On Saturday morning, my Culpeper County Campaign Chair, Dewey McDonnell, hosted a meet and greet with voters in Culpeper at the Reformation Lutheran Church. The City and County of Culpeper is going to be critical to defeating Abigail Spanberger and our campaign is locked in to earn and fight for every vote out of Culpeper. We followed up the meet and greet with a small business tour where we visited 4 C’s Restaurant, Culpeper Cheese Company, Shenandoah Garden Spot, Botanical Dwellings, Moving Meadows Farm, and The Beer Hound Brewery. Thanks to all these amazing small business owners for opening up their doors. Our local small business owners can be assured they have a friend in Yesli Vega. Finally, we capped the day with a meet and greet with over 40 new Vega for Virginia voters at the Basilico New York Deli in Fredericksburg. The diverse crowd consisted of small business owners, faith leaders, and back the blue supporters excited about our message of defending the American Dream, religious liberty, and support for our men and women in law enforcement. Team Vega was also present the last couple weeks at local GOP Committee meetings in Greene and Madison Counties. Media Buzz On March 25th I took time to interview with David Webb of Patriot Radio on SiriusXM. You may know David as the host of “Reality Check with David Webb” on FoxNation. To listen to our full interview which touched on border security, Abigail Spanberger’s weaknesses, and the path to taking back the Seventh, The week upcoming will be another busy one on the trail as the primary candidate field is officially set and the 7th District Convention taking place on April 9th in Caroline County, amongst other GOP meetings. I look forward to meeting you on the trail! For Liberty, Yesli Vega Prince William County Sheriff’s Deputy Prince William County Supervisor Conservative Republican for Congress | | Military Wife. Mother. Law Enforcement Officer. * | Paid for by Yesli Vega for Virginia Copyright © 2022 Yesli Vega for Virginia, All rights reserved.

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Not again! Politicizing Tragedy . . .
body:
We see this EVERY time there's a mass shooting . . . Democrats run to the nearest podium to call for gun control!
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/HBvRdEMsTmULIwDrxzTEwA/1Q6JzDKRPrVPvZSM2usg2g)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/XmiUKziHrG763q6uKOGBKOsQ/1Q6JzDKRPrVPvZSM2usg2g)We see this EVERY time there's a mass shooting . . . Democrats run to the nearest podium to call for gun control!

This time, following the shooting in Sacramento over the weekend, yesterday Joe Biden told the media, "We must do more than mourn; we must act. That is why my administration has taken historic executive action to implement my comprehensive gun crime reduction strategy."

We've heard that before, and it's why we need strong leaders in Congress to stop Biden, the Democrats and their Communist, Anti-Gun Agenda.

When you look at history, **disarming the citizenry is the favorite tactic of communist dictators, because when they come for you and your family, they can 't be stopped.**

[Help me stand against Biden and his gun-grabbing tactics by sending me to Congress.](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/HBvRdEMsTmULIwDrxzTEwA/1Q6JzDKRPrVPvZSM2usg2g)

Biden's "solutions" wouldn't have stopped the shooting in Sacramento, as the shooter's gun was reportedly stolen.

Who knows? It could have been one of Obama's guns from his Fast and Furious scheme! I guess Joe Biden will just have to call in his goons from the FBI to do another "investigation".

The bottom line is that gun control is not only unAmerican and unconstitutional, it DOES NOT WORK.

As the head of the NRA has said, the "**only thing that stops a bad guy with a gun is a good guy with a gun**."

And California, just like Chicago, Baltimore and other places in America that have the highest levels of gun violence, despite also having the most restrictive gun laws, needs more good guys with guns.

[Support my campaign today, and help me make sure our Second Amendment Right remains protected and uninfringed.](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/HBvRdEMsTmULIwDrxzTEwA/1Q6JzDKRPrVPvZSM2usg2g)

Thank you so much!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

name: Vernon Jones for Congress
subject: Newt Gingrich endorses Vernon Jones for Congress in GA-10
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jones for Georgia JonesforGeorgia
body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---
Newt Gingrich flips GA-10 Endorsement; endorses Vernon Jones For Congress
---
| |
---
|
---
| Madison, Georgia (April 5, 2022) Today, former Georgia Congressman and Speaker of the House Newt Gingrich announced his endorsement of Vernon Jones for his campaign to become the next Congressman from Georgia's 10th Congressional District.
In a video statement, Speaker Gingrich remarked: "Vernon's a leader. He's the kind of legislative experienced person who can get things done. It's not just about winning a seat. It's about representing the people, fighting for the people, changing Washington. We need leaders like Vernon Jones."
"I couldn't be more honored to have the support of such a bold conservative leader like Newt Gingrich. Like Newt, I will never stop fighting for the America First Agenda, never back down to the Left, and never give an inch to the political establishment," said Rep. Vernon Jones
Newt Gingrich had previously supported the Mike Collins campaign but has since rescinded his endorsement. The former Speaker now joins President Donald J. Trump, Mayor Rudy Giuliani, and General Michael Flynn in endorsing the only true America First candidate in the GA-10 race: Vernon Jones.
[Watch: Newt Gingrich endorses Vernon Jones](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_-D2n0JYn1nYijr4_yHHI6lmX1Jx7POVMmuvzPxllsTJdAsOu1RM_JeJb3cGpcFU_OmPiPOpsMBc1eEhoTTXbdIZDSxZotBcuSzHffhEpEUYFN1Gno4FH0h354WxsMSrcPwsF-Fqg2rWg57vtPQ4DQ==&c=n0TsV2cpk21v62-WWsh8KiJetTb9S1jMT5m-1x5rTICFGhoXVxUy2w==&ch=3QF1jisL9s8UucTomHg0meaSE8_25CKdcXpe2hzv_J-HapvKa96gZQ==)
[jonesforgeorgia.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_-D2n0JYn1nYijr4_yHHI6lmX1Jx7POVMmuvzPxllsTJdAsOu1RM_BDNzy7a0jGlpUkrs7vfbUI8ylzM0BfwzwwWhzlY6Ymq0ezHCAN5aBX6AJyO5KAGKB8PN52RK0mdMLvwSfMsAXq1RGXdXxg0Yu_wiL2hHOCy&c=n0TsV2cpk21v62-WWsh8KiJetTb9S1jMT5m-1x5rTICFGhoXVxUy2w==&ch=3QF1jisL9s8UucTomHg0meaSE8_25CKdcXpe2hzv_J-HapvKa96gZQ==)

---
| |
---
About Vernon Jones
---
| |
---
Vernon Jones is running for Georgia's 10th Congressional District. He is a former member of the GA House of Representatives (1993-2001, 2017-2021) and former Chief Executive Officer of DeKalb County, GA. A former Democrat, Jones officially switched parties in January 2021 after endorsing Donald J. Trump for President and speaking at the 2020 Republican National Convention. The proud Republican is now running in GA10, as a Pro-Trump candidate who will fight for free and fair elections, and always put Georgia and America First.

Peter,

Biden's open borders agenda just went to a whole new level. With illegal border crossings at a 60-year high, Biden just eliminated one of the last levers of control for our Southern border!

Instead of removing Trump's Title 42 policy, Biden should be making it permanent! [**If you agree, take a stand to demand Biden reinstate Title 42 now!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60049064:JHAA0yoNS:m:1:3253819041:E6F6CE72A4001EBAED2FE02F4FD4FBE2:r)

[**Now, it's time for grassroots patriots to mobilize and create the ultimate pressure campaign if we have any chance of reversing Biden's disastrous border agenda.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60049064:JHAA0yoNS:m:1:3253819041:E6F6CE72A4001EBAED2FE02F4FD4FBE2:r)

With 5,000 signatures, we will send a LOUD and CLEAR message to the White House for Biden to stop caving to the radical left's open borders agenda and put America's national security first. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWp3kuSHrN

State of education

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWp3kuSHrN

From the
Desk of Dr. Ben Carson:
Hello,
I don't
believe the majority of the public really knows what is being
taught to our children and grandchildren.
They
assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing
up-that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone
has a chance at success.
From what
I've seen, this isn't always the case. However, I want to know
what you've seen.

Dr. Ben
Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute
I believe
that children as young as elementary age are being taught to
reject our American values.
They are
told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it
overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our
Constitution is "out of date" and needs to be "modernized."

Progressives are rewriting our nation's history and they are
doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let
this happen!
This year
I'm going to be meeting with political leaders and educational
"experts" across the country. I'm going to make sure people know
what is really happening in our schools.
I want to
be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest
to the issue. Specifically, I would like to include your
thoughts.
The
American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded,
has created a unique survey. We're trying to gauge the state of
America's Educational System by surveying people like you.
I'd like
to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better
understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You
can access the survey here...

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59915515:Wp3kuSHrN:m:3:2532013465:37B9CC9263A23D38A70D8B85391ABD8C:r
Thank you
for your consideration.
Regards,

Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder &
Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2021 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.

clean_body: State of education From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don't believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up-that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I've seen, this isn't always the case. However, I want to know what you've seen. Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute I believe that children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values. They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is "out of date" and needs to be "modernized." Progressives are rewriting our nation's history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! This year I'm going to be meeting with political leaders and educational "experts" across the country. I'm going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools. I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts. The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We're trying to gauge the state of America's Educational System by surveying people like you. I'd like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here... Thank you for your consideration. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.
