name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Biden’s War on American Energy is Killing the Middle Class
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Joe Biden’s policy of attacking the fossil fuel industry is wreaking havoc on
lower and middle income Americans. Let’s be clear, it’s Biden, not Putin, who
is responsible for the national average of gas being $4.22 per gallon. Despite
what he and his radical allies might try to sell to the American people, the
230% increase in gas prices since 2020 is not because of Putin’s invasion of
Ukraine, it's because Joe Biden shut off our domestic oil and gas production.

On the campaign trail, candidate Biden repeatedly guaranteed the socialist
wing of his party that he would ban fracking if he were president. As
promised, United States Crude Oil production has fallen by nearly 3 million
barrels per day, or 23%, since Joe Biden took office. As a result of Biden’s
war on American energy, gasoline prices, home energy prices, and prices for
everyday household goods have all increased, affecting almost every single
American across our country.

Biden’s assault on American oil and gas has also significantly contributed to
the record inflation we’ve seen over the past 16 months. If Biden and the
Democrats do not divorce themselves from their obsession with the Green New
Deal, then American families will continue to suffer tremendously. According
to Bloomberg, the average U.S. family now has to spend an extra $5,200 this
year because of inflation. Some Americans now have to choose between gas in
their tank or life-saving insulin.

This energy crisis was self-inflicted and there will be no resolution until
Biden and his radical allies step away from their fantasy of zero carbon
emissions by the next decade. Let us not forget that under President Trump,
America was energy independent.

In order to confront the leftist policies which led to this moment, it’s also
important to tell the truth about the oil and gas industry. Fossil fuels do
more than just produce gasoline to power our commute.

The smartphone, Ipad, or computer you are reading this article on was made
with petrochemicals. The water bottle you drink from is made with
petrochemicals. Even the brand new Tesla Model 3 is made almost entirely from
petrochemicals. Everything we rely upon is in large part dependent on
petrochemicals.

Democrats are married to the Green New Deal, and will say anything, besides
the truth, to pass the blame for record energy prices. Joe Biden and Jen
Psaki’s current fairytale is that oil and gas companies are price gouging to
line their greedy pockets. In addition to Biden's outrageous claim, Nancy
Pelosi has now threatened to subpoena the CEO’s of Shell, Exxon, BP, and
Chevron, and is forcing them to testify on Wednesday.

This price gouging narrative is blatantly false. In fact, the average federal
and state gas tax combined is over $.31 cents per gallon, which is greater than
the average profit oil and gas companies make per gallon, according to industry
experts.

Nancy Pelosi and AOC know full well the importance these companies provide our
country, but rather than tell the truth, they are going to vilify them and drag
them through the mud on Wednesday to appease their socialist donors and special
interest groups.

The reality is that our country would look like something out of the
Flintstones if Biden eliminated oil and gas. The inconvenient truth for the
left is that batteries store power, they don’t create it, and at the end of the
day, you still have to plug your EV into a coal or natural gas powered grid.

It is time we stop allowing the Biden Administration to villainize the
American oil and gas industry and instead applaud domestic oil and gas
producers for the work they do to continue powering our country during these
historically difficult times. It’s also time to applaud them for the work
they’ve done to decrease our country’s carbon emissions and decrease our
reliance on Russian and Venezuelan oil.

Joe Biden’s deal with the Green Energy Cartel is killing the middle class and
we must end it. America is ready. Texans are ready. President Biden, on
behalf of the millions of struggling Americans across our country, stop this
obtuse agenda, come to terms with reality, and give our oil and gas industry
the green light to power our country. American families can’t wait much longer.

Sincerely,
Wesley Hunt

endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: photos: (mom and dad)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43807897/338785641/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDY0MjkzNi0wYWI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-H2H1GncT3xSE2lILxL9bUSqxhWLRzvOK5S3wQlD7d0=&emci=9f223296-d0b3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=e0642936-0ab5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43807898/338785644/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDY0MjkzNi0wYWI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-H2H1GncT3xSE2lILxL9bUSqxhWLRzvOK5S3wQlD7d0=&emci=9f223296-d0b3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=e0642936-0ab5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
My mother worked alongside my dad in Lebanon Farm Shop well into their 70s. They refused assistance from their many children even after they lost their life savings in the Savings and Loan debacle of the 1980s. My mom in coveralls, petite as she was, handing tools to my dad is an indelible image I carry with me to this day.
My dad built a business repairing farm implements. In a way, I think he hoped that I’d stick around and take it over, but that wasn’t to be. I joined the Navy after getting a scholarship and my life as a machinist and welder came to a close.
Dad said very little about his service in the Second World War. He had the burns and shrapnel of his first ship sinking, and would provide some quips about surviving a night amongst the flotsam and death off Guadalcanal, but he didn’t dissuade me from enlisting. My mom had the bravery in saying quite simply, “The healthy bird flees the nest.” She wiped her eyes on her apron as I drove up the hill on my way to ‘boot camp.’ It took me some time to understand why.
You could say my mom and dad embodied rural Iowa values in their unique ways: Family, hard work, sacrifice, education, and honesty. And I think of them every day on the campaign trail, because it’s those values that drove me to run for political office.
**After nearly 4 decades serving in the United States Navy, I’m running for Senate against Chuck Grassley because it’s time politicians in Washington fight for everyday people like my folks.**
The early polls all show this will be a close race, so of course, I’m facing down millions of dollars in Super PAC attacks. I don’t come from some political dynasty, and I’m not taking corporate PAC money. Instead, I’m relying entirely on the donations of generous grassroots donors like you.
**There’s just 11 hours until our next critical fundraising deadline, and right now we’re still short of our $50,000 goal and what we need to defeat Chuck Grassley and win. So I have to ask:**
[**Please, may I count on you to make a donation to my campaign today – before our fundraising deadline at midnight tonight? Every dollar you can give today will help me build a campaign to defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43807899/338785645/-42398318?refcode=em20220405mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDY0MjkzNi0wYWI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-H2H1GncT3xSE2lILxL9bUSqxhWLRzvOK5S3wQlD7d0=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Neil=20Kumar=20for=20Congress?=
subject: We have to close the Southern Border
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEIL FOR ARKANSAS
body:
We are being invaded. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/jan6-5066261?e=eda539b26b)
---
| | [ ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=83e345265e&e=eda539b26b)
---
| | Fellow Patriot:

_Our Southern Border isn’t just wide open, it’s gone. It’s been erased._

Remember: A nation without borders is no nation at all. _Millions _of aliens are invading _our _home, and they’re bringing drugs, crime, trash, and the Third World.

**If you have a Third World population, you have a Third World country.**

The Great Replacement is underway. Our government is engaged in ethnic cleansing against the majority population of our nation.

The Regime _hates_ the American people, so it has decided to _replace _us and elect a new people, a nation of aliens.

200, 300, 400, 500 thousand invaders pour into our country _every month_ , and those are just the official numbers.

The truth is even _worse_ than we know. We don’t have any idea how many people are in our country. They’re turning _our _country into a _stinking slum_ from coast to coast.

Just using the official numbers, America’s foreign-born population soared to over 46 million as of November. That means that Third World invaders now comprise over 14% of the population, a number which has tripled since 1970 and doubled since 1990.

_In Swing States like Florida, Michigan, New Hampshire, Pennsylvania, and Nevada, the number of new, foreign-born voters already exceeds the 2016 margins of victory._

Last year, more people than the entire population of the City of Dallas and almost equal to that of San Diego illegally entered America. _If they were all held in one place, they would constitute the 9th largest city in America._

Last year’s illegal border crossers—the ones we know about—could completely displace the citizens of Irvine, Pittsburgh, Orlando, and St. Louis, all put together.

**Enough illegal aliens entered America in 2021 alone to equal or exceed all the Americans who live in each of ten U.S. States: Alaska; Delaware; Maine; Montana; New Hampshire; North Dakota; Rhode Island; South Dakota; Vermont; and Wyoming.**

And 2022 is already showing exponential increases over last year. This death spiral is rapidly accelerating, and if it is not stopped _now_ , America as a singular polity will be lost.

_**_All _immigration into our homeland, legal and illegal, _must_ end. We need a Total Immigration Moratorium, _yesterday_. We’ve got to build the Wall and deport every single illegal in this country—all _thirty_ _plus million_ of them. **_

[If elected, my very first priority will be introducing legislation for a 20-year Total Immigration Moratorium..](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=1e7262ce6c&e=eda539b26b)

**[_Our Republican politicians have had DECADES to solve the immigration crisis, only for it to continue __spiraling_ _ out of control_ _._](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=44e330b4af&e=eda539b26b)**

[**_Help me, an __Immigration_ _ Patriot, defeat the Bipartisan Establishment __\-- Chip into my election campaign right away and show them the power of the America First movement_**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=02958e034e&e=eda539b26b) _._

_We need PATRIOTS who will**FIGHT** for the **AMERICAN** people, not limp-waisted frauds who never miss an opportunity to stab us in the back._

clean_body: We are being invaded. | | | | | | | Fellow Patriot: Our Southern Border isn’t just wide open, it’s gone. It’s been erased. Remember: A nation without borders is no nation at all. Millions of aliens are invading our home, and they’re bringing drugs, crime, trash, and the Third World. If you have a Third World population, you have a Third World country. The Great Replacement is underway. Our government is engaged in ethnic cleansing against the majority population of our nation. The Regime hates the American people, so it has decided to replace us and elect a new people, a nation of aliens. 200, 300, 400, 500 thousand invaders pour into our country every month , and those are just the official numbers. The truth is even worse than we know. We don’t have any idea how many people are in our country. They’re turning our country into a stinking slum from coast to coast. Just using the official numbers, America’s foreign-born population soared to over 46 million as of November. That means that Third World invaders now comprise over 14% of the population, a number which has tripled since 1970 and doubled since 1990. In Swing States like Florida, Michigan, New Hampshire, Pennsylvania, and Nevada, the number of new, foreign-born voters already exceeds the 2016 margins of victory. Last year, more people than the entire population of the City of Dallas and almost equal to that of San Diego illegally entered America. If they were all held in one place, they would constitute the 9th largest city in America. Last year’s illegal border crossers—the ones we know about—could completely displace the citizens of Irvine, Pittsburgh, Orlando, and St. Louis, all put together. Enough illegal aliens entered America in 2021 alone to equal or exceed all the Americans who live in each of ten U.S. States: Alaska; Delaware; Maine; Montana; New Hampshire; North Dakota; Rhode Island; South Dakota; Vermont; and Wyoming. And 2022 is already showing exponential increases over last year. This death spiral is rapidly accelerating, and if it is not stopped now , America as a singular polity will be lost. All immigration into our homeland, legal and illegal, must end. We need a Total Immigration Moratorium, yesterday. We’ve got to build the Wall and deport every single illegal in this country—all thirty plus million of them. . We need PATRIOTS who willFIGHT for the AMERICAN people, not limp-waisted frauds who never miss an opportunity to stab us in the back. Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America, Neil Robinson Kumar Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03 P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. . | | | Copyright © 2022 NeilforArkansas.com, All rights reserved.

subject: Campaign Update!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marc McMain for Congress, Inc
body:
Here's what we have going on the campaign trial this month!

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/b939d840ede0/campaign-update?e=2429acb6f7)

** Momentum Is In Our Favor
------------------------------------------------------------

Incase you didn't see, I was lucky to have received FIVE new endorsements over the last few weeks. Walton County Commissioner's Bo Warren, Timmy Shelnutt, and Mark Banks all endorsed me. As well as Barrow County Commissioner's Billy Parks and Ben Hendrix. I am so blessed to have received the endorsements of these fine men. From day one I've only sought after endorsements from our leader within the 10th district.

** April 23rd Rally
------------------------------------------------------------

I am excited to announce that on Saturday April 23rd we will be holding a huge rally for my campaign! The rally will be held at 1025 Church in Monroe at 5P.M. Please come out and show your support! We will be announcing our speaker lineup in the weeks to come.

** Jackson County GOP
------------------------------------------------------------

I will be one of the speakers this Saturday April 9th for the Jackson County Republican Party meeting. The meeting will be held at the Jackso County Ag Facility. Doors open at 8A.M. Would love to see you there!

** Want a Yard Sign?
------------------------------------------------------------
Click the link below and my campaign staff will make sure you have one in your hard by the end of the week!

CLICK HERE (https://marcforcongress.com/yard-sign-request/)

** Want To Contribute To My Campaign?
------------------------------------------------------------
CLICK HERE (https://secure.winred.com/marc-for-congress/donate?exitintent=true)

subject: What Will I Do On Day 1 In The US Senate? I Have Added Something New - Jackson Lahmeyer
body:

## Day 1 In The US Senate
---
Day 1 is **significant**. It sets the tone. When I get elected to the US Senate on Day 1, I will have have **3 objectives to accomplish**. **1** I will sponsor legislation in the Senate that will cutoff ALL Federal funding to any school district in America that teaches **Critical Race Theory** as well as **_Woke Sexuality_**. The amount of confusion being indoctrinated into the children of our country is one word... **EVIL**. I am thinking the _Millstone Act_ might be a good title (Luke 17:2). **2** I will sponsor legislation in the Senate that will BAN **Chinese nationalists** or any other foreign entity from owning American farmland. This is a HUGE problem (30 million acres across America is owned by the Red Chinese; 300k acres in Oklahoma). American farmland belongs to Americans. **PERIOD**. **3** I will join forces with Senator Rand Paul in the Senate to bring justice to **Anthony Fauci**. Fauci needs to be **FIRED** , **ARRESTED** and **CONVICTED** of crimes against humanity. I will ALWAYS put America First. Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on TruthSocial, GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6131866.4918.1.46197b986ce2fb1148082d7d991138eb), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6131866.4919.1.dd77a1c513780da3373124c49bf81a96), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6131866.4920.1.9c747d8c533d4d73d89dd4553da1bddf), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6131866.4921.1.4121d9c795c8435ef9fd332f064011f3), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=6131866.4922.1.508a4e4226af9b55537432f4f0c30acc)).

---
---

**Real America's Voice News** is bringing the **Tour Bus** to hold a TownHall in Tulsa, Ok on Thursday, April 14 at 6pm CT.
**Real America's Voice News** will livestream this event all across the country.

name: Tom Van Horn
subject: Reminder: Join Doug for a special evening in DC!
body:
This is an exciting opportunity for Doug to speak with you directly about the biggest issues facing Maryland and how the Gansler-Hollingsworth Administration will create a safer state. | Hi friends, **I wanted to make sure you saw this invitation to an exciting upcoming event!** On April 10th, Doug will be in Washington, DC at the home of his good friends, Kristin and Mark Handwerger, for an evening reception with a great group of supporters. This is a special opportunity for Doug to speak with you directly about the biggest issues facing Maryland and how the Gansler-Hollingsworth Administration will create a safer state. name: Laura Nevitt,  Keystone Progress
subject: Three days until the summit. Have you registered?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress, www
body:
Dear Friend,

This is a major weekend for progressives!

Only three days until the 13th annual Keystone Progress Summit -- Pennsylvania's Progressive Summit.

REGISTER [https://hopin.com/events/keystone-progress-summit-2022?utm_source=email&utm_campaign=040522]

Are you ready to fight? We are. Even if you're weary, together we can build our energy and momentum and create a progressive Pennsylvania.

Our rights and democracy are under intense attack. Now is the time to come together and build up our movement through organizing Pennsylvanians, hearing from our elected officials and candidates, planning for tomorrow, and speaking out. Join Keystone Progress and our 2022 KP Summit sponsoring partner, the ACLU of Pennsylvania.

We will do all of that at the virtual summit. Do not wait. SIGN UP NOW. [https://hopin.com/events/keystone-progress-summit-2022?utm_source=email&utm_campaign=040522]

We need you to stand with us, shoulder to shoulder, in these trying times. We can make a change when we work together.

Laura Nevitt
Keystone Progress

Sponsored by
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/EA/EA015/1/91628/images/Logos/ACLU_PA_email_Logo.png]

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress, www.keystoneprogress.org.

Keystone Progress
354 S Atlantic Ave
Pittsburgh, PA 15224

name: Chairman Michael Whatley
subject: it’s you and me, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by North Carolina Republican Party ([nc
body:
I’m glad to have you by my side.

| Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, As one of the **TOP REPUBLICANS** in Englewood, FL, I’m _**proud**_ to have you by my side. Now, I’m **URGING** you to accept my offer and join my exclusive Chairman’s Club. [I’ve asked several times -- and my offer still stands. But if you want to ACCEPT YOUR INVITATION and join the Chairman’s Club, now is the time to do it.](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9ZoTZNeVkUW8bigk_kgmqoYBiMLyGzm_3y3cASnhF-R1gQqEkYG5DLjHkybhbVYyOn5_dTnCIj1QCPnxWMoeolb8JVGhQ9dpQr9wKp3Ij-Wb399RXAYpm6BOr7f0_SceNl2mQmt1UxtTCVCsufrpMZ_cIC1-H1ZlM7AebUzlxQ4mW6J31Yc4l1vhbCQUqBgERBk8x0wxhICIxT8qYpxMKufJW4-BennMRh4fGf65hK-CyLBB4hyExZgdz1f2IQ6GN_JlGbhKtKEdBlIbIHQSLGcTiRW5MileFY9xj9ZHkVyyXrfILlXsgbs4FWcErcb6LoI2BKKR4uDkz5sAQE76R4w&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=212806342280235356&n=1) I’m opening the Chairman’s Club to new members in 2022, and it’s so very important to me for you to be on the official supporters list. So if you have been thinking of joining, now is the time. **[CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT immediately to accept this formal invitation and join the my Chairman’s Club today. I’ll put your name right at the top of the list of the most dedicated and loyal Republicans in Englewood, FL.](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9ZoTZNeVkUW8bigk_kgmqoYBiMLyGzm_3y3cASnhF-R068CC-JPAi2hM9O1MSUZXkfjrSInlrq3C-zIIpJz_GFAHJ20OE_7jqfN_fmKJxDzU9DYTvBYYPDj5GxbOtxk_g9q5HYPi_IZOaeH-gI8vVQcdOKjOWkg4I5CDFxnfivZpsQuhVT3vkG9EyYTGjCMiulYdMJcEPQVAgtkYIUbjlDApQl4lNTdn2mhyndfhmwse0g47WbffYQuCFMa1bhemxYAiyXaaclrri7L9rwcSkGRzTimYoI9L1PZC0eKCyiy_YeMAqWsY7urkrtIi8gNXqI26LH1wEWSz3IUidDQdrRd3TGo157r0bjtOLXKejlSM&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=212806342280235356&n=2)** |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Russell=20Fry?=
subject: The Russell Roundup
body:
Stay up to date on the latest from Russell Fry's campaign for Congress | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/russellfrysc/russellroundup-8863390?e=7aa6ac5965)
---
| | [ ](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=22d93964ef&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
| | It’s the begining of the week, and that means another installment of **_Russell’s Roundup_** , your weekly source for the latest information on Russell Fry’s campaign to send a true conservative to Congress.
---
|
---
---
| | | [ ](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=93f91812e0&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
**New Commercial**

If you’ve been online or watched TV lately, you’ve probably seen Russell’s new commercial. It launched last week, and we’re already getting encouraging feedback on it. If you haven’t had a chance to catch it, [**_click here_**](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=b115b8a8b6&e=7aa6ac5965) and listen as Russell shares some of his life stories.
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=45aed965e2&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
**Cheraw Spring Festival**

Warm weather, blooming flowers, and lots of smiling faces: The perfect ingredients for last Saturday’s Cheraw’s Spring Fest.

Russell enjoyed meeting lots of good folks and sharing with them his vision for how the American First agenda can rescue our country from the mess Nancy Pelosi and DC Democrats are making.
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=c1a32e3c51&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
**Give**

Every day closer June 14 gets, the more the need for resources to fund Russell’s campaign increases. It’s vitally important that we make sure his conservative message reaches every corner of the Grand Strand and Pee Dee. But he needs your help to make it happen.

Any amount you can share is both desperately needed and much appreciated. [_Click here to donate_](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=50628286a3&e=7aa6ac5965) right now!
---
|
---
| **We Want YOU!**
Looking to get involved in Russell’s campaign? With plenty of opportunities available, there’s something for everyone. [_Click here_](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=1e3cf74a64&e=7aa6ac5965) to volunteer, and we’ll be in touch with you soon.

**Pssst! Pass it On!**
Help spread the word of what Russell is doing here in the 7th Congressional District. Please take a moment and forward this newsletter to 10 of your neighbors, relatives, co-workers, and friends. They’ll be glad you did!
---
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=95d53db8c1&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
| | [](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=950008a144&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
| | [](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=a5e61c1fe8&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Fry For Congress, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Fry For CongressPO Box 14641Surfside Beach, SC 29587-4641
[Add us to your address book](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=721c56c6d9)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=721c56c6d9&e=7aa6ac5965&c=fc003fad86) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=721c56c6d9&e=7aa6ac5965&c=fc003fad86).

name: Team Oakley
subject: “Ambitious” 🙄
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oakley for Congress
body:
Peter,

First, Rep. Donald Payne Jr. called Imani unqualified. Now, he’s doing what all men do when they feel threatened by a supremely qualified, outspoken woman: he’s trying to paint her as “too ambitious.”

You know as well as we do that being ambitious is only a flaw when a woman does it, particularly a Black woman like Imani.

And you can bet that no one has EVER called Payne Jr. “too ambitious” — for good reason, too.

Payne Jr. hasn’t shown a single ounce of ambition during his 10 years in Congress. He’s barely lifted a finger to help our community through the challenges of the last decade. All he’s done is take corporate PAC money, do what special interests tell him to do, and ignore his constituents.

And you know what? Given the choice, we’d rather have a Congresswoman who’s ambitious — ambitious about securing housing as a human right, ambitious about securing universal healthcare, and ambitious about protecting our democracy — than a do-nothing Congressman who isn’t ambitious enough to put on pants for work, much less fight for our community.

If you agree that it’s time to elect a proud, ambitious, and outspoken progressive to fight for our community in Congress, click here to chip in $27 and help elect Imani Oakley. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?refcode=405ambitious]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $7 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=405ambitious] Express Donate $27 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=405ambitious] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=405ambitious] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=405ambitious] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=405ambitious] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?refcode=405ambitious]

Imani has worked for everything she’s earned. She earned three degrees, spent years working as an advocate for marginalized communities, and delivered critical victories in the fight against New Jersey’s corrupt political machine.

And if that makes her “ambitious”, then so be it.

It’s time for us to shake things up and elect a leader who has the ambition to deliver progressive change for our communities. Can you chip in $27 to help us do it? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?refcode=405ambitious]

Thank you for your support.

— Team Oakley

Now, he’s doing what all men do when they feel threatened by a supremely qualified, outspoken woman: he’s trying to paint her as “too ambitious.” You know as well as we do that being ambitious is only a flaw when a woman does it, particularly a Black woman like Imani. And you can bet that no one has EVER called Payne Jr. “too ambitious” — for good reason, too. Payne Jr. hasn’t shown a single ounce of ambition during his 10 years in Congress. He’s barely lifted a finger to help our community through the challenges of the last decade. All he’s done is take corporate PAC money, do what special interests tell him to do, and ignore his constituents. And you know what? Given the choice, we’d rather have a Congresswoman who’s ambitious — ambitious about securing housing as a human right, ambitious about securing universal healthcare, and ambitious about protecting our democracy — than a do-nothing Congressman who isn’t ambitious enough to put on pants for work, much less fight for our community. If you agree that it’s time to elect a proud, ambitious, and outspoken progressive to fight for our community in Congress, click here to chip in $27 and help elect Imani Oakley. [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. Express Donate $7 [] Express Donate $27 [] Express Donate $50 [] Express Donate $100 [] Express Donate $250 [] Another Amount [] Imani has worked for everything she’s earned. She earned three degrees, spent years working as an advocate for marginalized communities, and delivered critical victories in the fight against New Jersey’s corrupt political machine. And if that makes her “ambitious”, then so be it. It’s time for us to shake things up and elect a leader who has the ambition to deliver progressive change for our communities. Can you chip in $27 to help us do it? ## Today's the day Friend!
We all have been hard at work to prepare for this election. Running for office, helping knock doors for those candidates, signing up to be a poll worker, all that effort will pay off today! Don't forget to remind your friends and family to **vote today**! Send them to **[myvote.wi.gov](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=6tHPUOz_QyJBsFbb3HDnJj2oXbbIoglmEkF7rO8ZMAeBuay5CGbW87_VUow_ACcN&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=reportinged&n=2)** for info on what districts they are located in and redirect them to the appropriate county party website/Facebook for their voter guide. Our election teams across the state are hard at work monitoring the election process and reporting back to our legal team to deliberate and take action on. **Even if you haven't signed up to be an election observer, we want to hear from you if you see anything you think you might be off at the polls****.**
## **Election Reporting Information:**

| | Folks, Remember Jarome Bell? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43792263/338747851/1980268870?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_220405_FR_JaromeBell_A1_other_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjRiZDMxMS1mMWI0LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HJX__f4nubJSwxYiIvW40wT0J-oWYsxqQ6pgOxCNb5k=) This is the far-right extremist vying to unseat Elaine. The one who once suggested that we should execute those involved in election fraud... _election fraud that didn’t happen._ Why should you care about this unhinged Republican? He’s gaining attention and endorsements from other powerful members of the far-right who want to see an extremist takeover of Congress. Most recently, Jarome Bell was endorsed by Bob Good – ultra-conservative Virginia Congressman and member of the Freedom Caucus. Good joins Trump loyalists like Congressman Paul Gosar, who just attended a white nationalist convention with Marjorie Taylor Greene, and Trump’s disgraced former National Security Adviser Michael Flynn. Yep, that Michael Flynn. The one Trump pardoned after he was convicted for lying to the FBI about his contact with Russia. You know what they say, folks, you are the company you keep. And if we didn’t like Jarome Bell before, we certainly aren’t fans of his now. name: Tom Fitton
subject: We can’t ever do enough to fight for the rule of law
body:
Judicial Watch just announced a major victory for cleaner elections! We settled our federal lawsuit against North Carolina after the state removed over 430,000 ineligible names from its voter rolls!

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I'll be short and direct....
[If you will give Judicial Watch your support today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58508&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)...we can have an even greater impact.
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58508&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)
---

Because with your help today, I promise to continue to fight hard on issues you care most about like the following:

* Our ongoing FOIA document requests and litigation to expose the use of taxpayer dollars to promote the indoctrination of public school students with the Marxist, racist teachings of Critical Race Theory.
* Our civil rights lawsuits on behalf of three public school teachers who were fired solely because they dared to express opposition to Critical Race Theory and other woke programs in their schools and school districts.
* Our highly successful mission to keep elections honest and help reduce the incidence of voter fraud by compelling states to comply with federal law to take reasonable steps to keep their voting rolls accurate. We are currently suing Colorado and Pennsylvania following successful lawsuits in several other states, including our recent settlement with North Carolina in which a Judicial Watch lawsuit caused that state to remove over 430,000 ineligible names from its voter rolls... _and more lawsuits are coming_!

As far as I'm concerned, we can't ever do enough to fight for the rule of law and honest and open government. When it comes to using the courts to support the rule of law and government transparency, Judicial Watch is still the "only game in town."

But we weigh carefully each of our investigations and lawsuits against our actual resources, because we take our budget realities very seriously.

And since we are routinely opposed by taxpayer-funded lawyers and bureaucrats in the Deep State "permanent government" who fight against us and for government secrecy with bottomless resources it's essential that we're always prepared.

[That's why your support is so important](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58508&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)...because knowing that we are strong financially makes it easier for us to commit to aggressive legal and investigative agendas.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58508&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)
---

Personally, I can't think of a time in our twenty-eight-year history that a strong Judicial Watch has been more important to our nation. That's why [I hope you will make a contribution and join with us today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58508&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)

Sincerely,

Tom Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58508&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)

subject: Press Release: Matt Jacobs Raises Over $320,000 in Q1 2022 and Nearly $1.2 Million to Date
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress
body:
This is Matt Jacobs for Congress' biggest fundraising quarter of the campaign. [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=a379307c677f42dbb97df0617ddbdd87&_e=4tIa83t4fgPx-anBLb9UgODzCeetyIGLvmbrmSwBUzEwn2T59L20pmLMnUxcSZoFhcaERad6_mlSWfJAcIEYLL_IZQlyVoQnVAwvPipf36ESJTNJnDGovu1jBoJE7QeqtXLvTO6X3YgDt77Fl56db15m3Iu5EVzZcgV9pRxipfhTDIIYFc5D-aMQwkHrHtolFZTDpEFcIfZTSbX1HBt6_EgFL1d4c0f6xw5pKbZjrAKE5BiApCkailrRB5RBWxy4RkOjAjaHJiVb0VxltzEpjQ%3D%3D) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** **April 5, 2022** **Contact:[press@mattjacobsforcongress.com](mailto:press@mattjacobsforcongress.com "press@mattjacobsforcongress.com")** **Website:[www.mattjacobsforcongress.com](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=a379307c677f42dbb97df0617ddbdd87&_e=4tIa83t4fgPx-anBLb9UgODzCeetyIGLvmbrmSwBUzEwn2T59L20pmLMnUxcSZoFBLpDmgm5qPPZL8Q2rQK-jMwDe7jOKprvp89tQv3d9CDdvUZC5s-FUquM--XbqElAo4wsW_P3XHnPE8jMo-y6LsV9OHY8tf8b5RHHu-xr8907v8hgt9tnvDqdTf449M5a-4v1C6EIQ6vJO_a8na2jty_yF0T0IfREMlkiUJuLBrUphfrLS4f6c-15hAsqZkQF-jn6pHCArBhufRDi21fGLw%3D%3D)** **Contact:[press@mattjacobsforcongress.com](mailto:press@mattjacobsforcongress.com "press@mattjacobsforcongress.com")** **Website:[www.mattjacobsforcongress.com](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=a379307c677f42dbb97df0617ddbdd87&_e=4tIa83t4fgPx-anBLb9UgODzCeetyIGLvmbrmSwBUzEwn2T59L20pmLMnUxcSZoFcS7cWLQCBB5W5hDlnJXPSV4XV1JrA88v7x56ucRE_Egs5UUtvnTYWCoaZHivCMP_8GDy5xEBPP2rc5LFAYe1KqkEYlPAcPNDWgWwU3ig8M1C-y4_RKyzmrqJN4ORC_bAZtvlwzSzcqunnCzANBJSs9qqCXuqcbkjRy1AcyPTLZz-Q7_bggiJQOdzAgHO5BoF0gtXnXvoSCofry_Zwo0p1g%3D%3D)** **MATT JACOBS RAISES OVER $320,000 IN Q1 2022** **AND NEARLY $1.2 MILLION TO DATE** **Thousand Oaks, CA -** The campaign of former Federal Prosecutor Matt Jacobs today announced it had raised over $320,000 in the first quarter ending March 31, with just shy of $1.2 million raised to date. This is Jacobs’ biggest fundraising quarter of the campaign, and it comes on the heels of last week’s news that the National Republican Congressional Committee has [added the 26th congressional district](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=a379307c677f42dbb97df0617ddbdd87&_e=4tIa83t4fgPx-anBLb9UgMWd5aAx-xE7gSCI2Gxg2bx92HMtFEP6DUQbaE6OnsNM4HwgO1sy6bFqgFEGxO7nAmyh1W3XxAfKTiljpfm8ZOSZYaa4SYxjEpPhc0DEEtNAUTrVui1ba70n_4CHtFlR_xwtr7lWoegEtQ00pDijYexfplr0FMj9duJxuNzqodnPgsVonNmBvfn6rCRo5qWMt10jvvCxMEe_zrwlEfNn-mFTLB1K-Q-AaAR8auyZW-caLL4U17rdWpBVn3Rz3pz9M98dmXPtf5-BPztdm006xdExNY8LhtsF6X3OUapuuS4l) to its list of targeted seats. With months to go until November, Jacobs has already raised over $400,000 more than the last 3 GOP challengers to Julia Brownley combined. “Our hard work is paying off,” said Jacobs. “I cannot thank our donors and supporters enough for their faith in our campaign. Our message is simple: stop the out-of-control inflation, fight for good schools, and make our communities safer by supporting our police. That message is resonating across this district and across the country. I will continue to make the case that Julia Brownley’s record of voting with Nancy Pelosi 100% of the time is simply out of step with this district.” Jacobs has been endorsed by numerous law enforcement organizations, and has been recognized nationally as a top Republican pickup opportunity as part of the [NRCC Young Guns program](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=a379307c677f42dbb97df0617ddbdd87&_e=4tIa83t4fgPx-anBLb9UgPt_nO6PFStXZ59eAu541qKB78gHY39ZBTCTDHBxp-gX5u9iMZC1IxJDoSZEECFzjJkxUxb99S0DPokDdwfO9HQTggf8pQe9_Za-Vz2UZl_w06IVdyW0bd-oU3QSq8im-rBNYPae8b3khl_U-SvMleo_72Ut7lqfievVcpPwTpMpAUwjWn2vqHbhBid-O9gW14V5DXa9RvECXhmz7r5H2MGi3oB-T7Hgdr8Fj6H2uxq_6O3XYsZ_ztMdZ3lrn9CiTdZTtBT9Yqk40QNAgUUx3nNcR72mm3DGs78lRrd1eGRO8zIrkBumuqYSdm49-D8x_HYGOGMlCcKnqCAngZdEXKRF8ynQq9_rzNYL7iqd2fEA). ** ** **###** | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE April 5, 2022 Contact:mailto:press@mattjacobsforcongress.com "press@mattjacobsforcongress.com" Website: Contact:mailto:press@mattjacobsforcongress.com "press@mattjacobsforcongress.com" Website: MATT JACOBS RAISES OVER $320,000 IN Q1 2022 AND NEARLY $1.2 MILLION TO DATE Thousand Oaks, CA - The campaign of former Federal Prosecutor Matt Jacobs today announced it had raised over $320,000 in the first quarter ending March 31, with just shy of $1.2 million raised to date. This is Jacobs’ biggest fundraising quarter of the campaign, and it comes on the heels of last week’s news that the National Republican Congressional Committee has to its list of targeted seats. With months to go until November, Jacobs has already raised over $400,000 more than the last 3 GOP challengers to Julia Brownley combined. “Our hard work is paying off,” said Jacobs. “I cannot thank our donors and supporters enough for their faith in our campaign. Our message is simple: stop the out-of-control inflation, fight for good schools, and make our communities safer by supporting our police. That message is resonating across this district and across the country. I will continue to make the case that Julia Brownley’s record of voting with Nancy Pelosi 100% of the time is simply out of step with this district.” Jacobs has been endorsed by numerous law enforcement organizations, and has been recognized nationally as a top Republican pickup opportunity as part of the . ### | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress Contributions are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Gerry Austin
subject: April Message
body:
Friends,

You are receiving this email because you signed up to help change the direction of our country.

April is such a wonderful time. The Dogwoods and Azaleas bloom and we rejoice in the season of Easter.

We are excited to announce, coming soon is a campaign video! Watch Facebook and Rumble for it's release!

The primary is Tuesday, May 17!!!

Against their own rules, certain GOP organizations (including the Caswell County GOP) have endorsed one of my opponents. We all know this is wrong.

I am asking this, please pray for the campaign. Please tell three of your friends about us and ask them to pray and tell three friends.

We need donations!!!

Thank you for supporting the campaign. Together, let's get America back.

**Gerry Austin**

AustinNC@protonmail.com

Sent with [ProtonMail](https://protonmail.com/) secure email.

clean_body: | = | | Trump’s Michigan rally confirmed what we already know, folks. One, he doesn't know how to pronounce Meijer. And two, the fate of our Democratic House majority runs directly through Michigan. Democrats cannot keep control of the House without MI-11 and we cannot win our race without you. = We don’t want to be caught off guard in the wake of outside spending that will follow Trump’s rally. It's clear our opponent is critical to Trump's plan of installing far-right candidates and seizing the House majority. Haley’s already on national Republicans’ radar and our far-right opponent even received a boost from Trump himself at a Mar-a-Lago fundraiser. If we don’t stand up to them now, we’ll be pawns in a GOP takeover. But the bottom line is, this election isn’t about Trump, our opponents, or even Haley – it’s about you and your family. So instead of fretting over this rally, we’re going to stick to our game plan and stay focused on the issues that matter most. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Your grassroots dollars are helping Haley hold her seat and defend the Democratic House majority. name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: Personally thanking you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard
body:
Thank you so much for your effort during our first end of quarter push of the election year. Peter, Thank you so much for your effort during our first end of quarter push of the election year. Everything we’ve achieved so far would not have been possible without you, and every day I’m so thankful for the amazing team of patriots by my side. You have been an incredible member of our team, and I am eternally grateful. However, just because we’ve come this far doesn't mean we're going to stop anytime soon. We still have months to go until Election Day, and we have to give 110% to every mission up
until then. _I know you’re up to the challenge, and I can’t wait to get to work._ In Service, Col. Mike Waltz
Special Forces Green Beret

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: ⏰Now is the time to fight! ⏰
body:
I don’t want to alarm you, but we’re running out of time. The Ohio Republican Primary is May 3rd, less than a month away. The good news is that our campaign is still ahead of Josh Mandel.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013WIJO2SM9y5L6K4YPYA9OUKiQKawP1klxZWK4ehAiUet4uYAyhO_i8xOmAtwQ4BZ-MoPaxKFIwD7H03dkwJS2ijZq6lo7SXQSwrfmX3VNMAX4LD0vad3YA7sIaVRbdfllliaxDz4K8OGbSSgONbzDA177lti_nOdGJh6hGBQo1emeWVtAfpN6A==&c=IWW-SlligKms6-sNG5B_cONCFyPIyFQOnaXndhcIeLuk5qhFKiGqnA==&ch=O6lgGZDYTSGDHWlbUxokloeLWIeWA6Yybr_xzR3CXW3OAbB4ZEufsQ==)

| Peter,
I don't want to alarm you, but we're running out of time. The Ohio Republican Primary is May 3rd, less than a month away.
The good news is that our campaign is still ahead of Josh Mandel.
But being a step ahead isn't enough to win this race--we can't stop until the polls are closed.
That's why I've set a goal to raise $50,000, so I can keep reaching Ohioans and continue spreading our message of freedom.

name: Josh Harder
subject: Who could use $500 for gas?
disclaimer_text: paid for by their Big Oil donors
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/e4sw6MFugtg0FtcUNXEhouU3Nr9d70ikYRRv913hCo8=/pbpAq1OkXs1Mxpro3heEb_kT55qNs8fP8QhAgWZzUEA=) | Hey team, If your representative isn't fighting to lower gas prices right now, I'd recommend you check their financial records and see if they're scared to lose their Big Oil donors. I'm proud to not take a cent from Big Oil PACs and that means I can say the following: _Big Oil companies are price gouging our families._ The cost of oil is actually going down right now, but oil executives see the conflict in Ukraine as an opportune time to get rich and increase the prices of gas at the pump. It's disgusting. In tandem with holding these executives accountable (more on that coming soon), I also know we have to get our families help to tackle these crazy prices. So, last week I introduced a new bill, the Putting Gas Money Back In Your Pocket Act, which will send $500 to every taxpayer in America to help cover the cost of these higher prices. You can read more about it [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/e4sw6MFugtg0FtcUNXEhouU3Nr9d70ikYRRv913hCo8=/Y19NvvPkAEBkyshKi5MB_rQilu3PAsXnxOLc9_owKRU=). [**If you agree we need to do more to get gas prices down and hold oil executives accountable, will you add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of this legislation?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/e4sw6MFugtg0FtcUNXEhouU3Nr9d70ikYRRv913hCo8=/pbpAq1OkXs1Mxpro3heEb_kT55qNs8fP8QhAgWZzUEA=) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.myngp.com/el/e4sw6MFugtg0FtcUNXEhouU3Nr9d70ikYRRv913hCo8=/pbpAq1OkXs1Mxpro3heEb_kT55qNs8fP8QhAgWZzUEA=) Within a month of passing my new bill, every taxpayer will get a check worth $500 so no parent has to choose between putting food on the table and gas in their car to get to work. **This is something every single Member of Congress should all be able to get behind if they 're not being bought and paid for by their Big Oil donors.** [**Add your name in support of my new bill to put gas money back in your pocket today!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/e4sw6MFugtg0FtcUNXEhouU3Nr9d70ikYRRv913hCo8=/pbpAq1OkXs1Mxpro3heEb_kT55qNs8fP8QhAgWZzUEA=) Let's get this done,
\- Josh

I'm proud to not take a cent from Big Oil PACs and that means I can say the following: Big Oil companies are price gouging our families. The cost of oil is actually going down right now, but oil executives see the conflict in Ukraine as an opportune time to get rich and increase the prices of gas at the pump. It's disgusting. In tandem with holding these executives accountable (more on that coming soon), I also know we have to get our families help to tackle these crazy prices. name: Nan Whaley
subject: The first votes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
My conversations with people around the state have shown me exactly what Ohioans need, and I’m ready to fight for it as governor.

Team,
Today, early voting officially opens in Ohio. Across the state, people are getting ready to cast their first ballots. The countdown to making history has begun.
The last twelve months have been leading up to this moment. Now, we’re closer than ever to a stronger Ohio – a state where our families can thrive, where the government supports our communities instead of hurting them, and where the public can trust their elected officials.
**[We only have four more weeks until the official primary day, and we can’t waste a single second if we want to win. Every day is more crucial than the last, which is why I’m hoping you’ll donate $5 to help me in this next chapter.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43810704/338798457/-857966602?refcode=nw_em_220405_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmNjZjZmMy0xNWI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tM34ODen-mg8Vx_GnKcq-cnCx2kLQ_1i6Dn6XQCYVp4=)**
Last week, I wrapped up my tour of all 88 counties in Ohio. When I announced my candidacy, I knew I needed to speak to people in every corner of the state. For too long, the status quo in Ohio has prioritized helping a few specific people and ignoring everyone else.
When I’m elected governor, with your help, we’re going to change that. Everything we’ve been able to accomplish has been because of the support of this grassroots movement. My conversations with people around the state have shown me exactly what Ohioans need, and I’m ready to fight for it as governor.
**[Will you help me in this fight? The primary is only 4 weeks away, but people are already voting. We need to ramp up our campaigning every day if we want to win this. Across the state, people are getting ready to cast their first ballots. The countdown to making history has begun. The last twelve months have been leading up to this moment. Now, we’re closer than ever to a stronger Ohio – a state where our families can thrive, where the government supports our communities instead of hurting them, and where the public can trust their elected officials. = Last week, I wrapped up my tour of all 88 counties in Ohio. When I announced my candidacy, I knew I needed to speak to people in every corner of the state. For too long, the status quo in Ohio has prioritized helping a few specific people and ignoring everyone else. When I’m elected governor, with your help, we’re going to change that. Everything we’ve been able to accomplish has been because of the support of this grassroots movement. My conversations with people around the state have shown me exactly what Ohioans need, and I’m ready to fight for it as governor. = Onward, Nan P.S. I have one more ask to make! name: =?utf-8?Q?Shawn=20Hyland?=
subject: The end game of campaigning is to govern
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/shawnhyland.com/abetteramericastartstoday-8870430?e=5167ed8367)
---
| | | | | | _Peter,_ Politics is the art and strategy of winning an election, just as there is an art and strategy to winning a football game. It takes physical and mental endurance to stand up to opponents. It’s not for the weak or the faint of heart. Though football is rough, and injuries occur, there are regulations and rules that must be followed for fair competition. If a player was to violate a rule intentionally or mistakenly, officials will enforce a penalty.But who throws a flag in campaign activities? The Federal Elections Commission regulates campaign financing, but they do not settle disputes regarding underhanded tactics that deliberately deceive voters. I sense today there are voices on the hard Left and Right that manipulate people with anger, fear, and lies.Good candidates who faithfully want to represent the people they are called to serve are urged to abandon their principles for pragmatic voter turnout efforts. The end justifies the means. Victory at all costs, including distorting the facts for personal ambition and gain.I believe this catabolic toxic energy weakens our political debate and strains the moral fabric that holds our union together. Polarizing hype in our political discourse makes legislators hesitant to legislate. They want to avoid unfair criticisms to common good solutions. **America suffers in the process.** Remember, the end game of campaigning is to govern. Political parties want wins, but people want results. Concrete policy positions must be stated on a campaign website to inform the voter how the candidate will approach the issue. But an openness to discuss nuanced complexed issues should not be perceived as a sign of weak and ineffective leadership.In other words, you can fully support and fund law enforcement while reforming our policing and justice system. You can secure the border to stop the flow of illegal immigration while sensibly finding solutions to undocumented families and workers in this country. You can immediately return America to energy independence while investing in cleaner renewable sources over the next 20-30 years. You can teach students to be kind, respectful and have a fuller understanding of our nation’s history, without indoctrinating them with radical gender and divisive racial ideology.**We need a clear positive vision for this country rooted in our conservative values.** Victory without that vision may produce a 51% majority on election day, but a 40% approval rating months later. I reject the idea that our political discourse must be driven by passion over reason. James Madison warned us that uncivil times and men would damage our enduring hope of freedom. **I believe the evidence that conservative policies benefit our nation should be persuasive enough to win over voters.**
---
|
---
| | | | | |
# Working for a Better America,
Shawn Hyland|
---
[www.ShawnHyland.com](https://shawnhyland.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fadf394130a92311f650e3e36&id=9ec9e7bd93&e=5167ed8367)

clean_body: | | Hola Friend, This is a critical time where we get to decide the direction of our future. I am fighting for meaningful policies that protect families, protect trans youth, expand economic security, protect our land, air, and water, and empower communities across this district. The right-wing incumbent has a million dollar war chest courtesy of his oil & gas and House Freedom Caucus donors that want him to continue racist, pro-lynching, anti-Veteran, xenophobic, and anti-worker policies. I am fighting for a better tomorrow TODAY, and I cannot do this alone. We have a real chance of winning, and we need your financial support to reach and empower voters across the district. We see the path to victory so clearly, but we need people who believe in the power of this campaign. Is that person you? Become a recurring donor starting at $10 a month. A million thank-yous for believing in us, Team Zapata | | Claudia Zapata is a practical, progressive Democrat running for Congress in Texas’ 21st congressional district in Central Texas. # **The King's Chronicle:
****_April 5, 2022_**
---
| | Hi Team, Welcome to April! We are proud to be starting this new month on a high, after closing out the last month with such a strong finish to our end-of-quarter deadline —which was made possible by supporters like you. Before we dive into what John and Michelle have been up to over the last few weeks we wanted to address and make sure that all of you are aware that **the Maryland Democratic primary has been pushed from June 28th to July 19th.** While we look forward to this extra time to grow our winning coalition, the date change also means we need to ramp up our fundraising so we have the resources to stay up on TV and reach more voters. If you are able, please consider making a donation of whatever you can today: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king-eday-fund**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43811063/338799943/-1565146818?utm_source=email&utm_campaign=newsletter&utm_medium=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWQ4NWZjYS0xNmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mcm13h6Z3qJS1jyUapl-XPm7fyigYu9r04Ok1GFRxQg=) We hope you keep scrolling to catch up on the latest news updates, check out some event recaps, and find out more ways to get involved with the campaign. As always, thank you for your continued support of this campaign — it means everything to John, Michelle, and the rest of our team. Thank you for all that you do! Onward,
Team King

clean_body: On this edition of the King's Chronicle, find out what John & Michelle have been up to, read about upcoming events, and more! | | | = | | | | | | = | mailto:info@johnkingforgovernor.com "info@johnkingforgovernor.com" | | | The King's Chronicle: April 5, 2022 | | Hi Team, Welcome to April! We are proud to be starting this new month on a high, after closing out the last month with such a strong finish to our end-of-quarter deadline —which was made possible by supporters like you. Before we dive into what John and Michelle have been up to over the last few weeks we wanted to address and make sure that all of you are aware that the Maryland Democratic primary has been pushed from June 28th to July 19th. While we look forward to this extra time to grow our winning coalition, the date change also means we need to ramp up our fundraising so we have the resources to stay up on TV and reach more voters. If you are able, please consider making a donation of whatever you can today: = We hope you keep scrolling to catch up on the latest news updates, check out some event recaps, and find out more ways to get involved with the campaign. As always, thank you for your continued support of this campaign — it means everything to John, Michelle, and the rest of our team. Thank you for all that you do! Onward, Team King | | | Team King Updates | | #GRASSROOTSGOALS : Thanks to this amazing grassroots team, last month we crushed our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline! Over 550 supports chipped in – and nearly one half were first-time donors! WHAT YOUR LAWN HAS BEEN WAITING FOR : We have BRAND NEW yard signs available on our web store, and what better way to show your support for John and Michelle by displaying your very own sign! Claim yours today before they sell out>> NEW ENDORSEMENT : Last week the Lower Shore Progressive Caucus endorsed John King for governor! We are so excited by this major endorsement from Eastern Shore leaders and activists as it signals that John has the statewide support to win. You can read more about it = | | | John in the News | | TALBOT SPY: Election 2022 Profiles: John King for Governor “We ask King about his top priorities, and if elected, how he would lead the economic recovery from the pandemic." WYPR: On the Record with John King, Democratic candidate for Maryland governor "King says his top priority is education, and the Blueprint -- a multi-billion dollar education reform package -- is a good start, 'We should see it as the floor, not the ceiling.'" FORBES: Obama Education Secretary Says Biden Should Cancel Student Debt “Asked what would happen if President Joe Biden doesn’t cancel student debt, King told CNBC, ‘There would be tremendous disillusionment from key constituents who are crucial for the health of the Democratic Party.’" “On Saturday, the Talbot County Free Library hosted John King, a Democrat running for governor. King, having spent eight years as an educator, said that education is his top priority. King also served as the Secretary of Education under President Barack Obama during Obama’s second term in office. He gave a speech that outlines the issues he’s most passionate about, which include education, economic development, the environment and racial justice.” | | | John on the Road On Thursday, March 24 John and Michelle joined a packed room in Towson to discuss their vision for Maryland’s future. = On Friday, April 1 John got back in the classroom and shared the story of how public education saved his life and put him on the path to becoming US Secretary of Education under President Obama with high schoolers in Howard County. | | = On Monday, April 4 Michelle hit the road and joined dozens of new supporters in Eldersburg! = | | | Upcoming Events | | Bethesda Fundraiser for John King Monday, April 18th @ 6pm Full address provided upon RSVP Baltimore Breakfast Fundraiser for Michelle Siri Thursday, April 28th @ 8am Full address provided upon RSVP Silver Spring Meet & Greet with John King and Michelle Siri Saturday, May 7th @ 11:30am Location provided upon signup St. Mary’s County DemocratsSkipjack Gala Friday, April 8th @ 6pm = | Rockville Mid County Democratic Breakfast Club Monday, April 18th @ 7:30am Email ben@johnkingforgovernor.com for information to join Montgomery County Young Dems Meeting Tuesday, April 19th @ 7pm Montgomery County Democratic Central Committee HQ Rockville, MD Email ben@johnkingforgovernor.com for information to join Meet & Greet with Jewish Community Relations Council of Greater Washington Monday, April 25th @ 8:30am Interested in future events? Text MEET to 48178 or sign up below! | | | Ways to Get Involved | | | | | | = | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, TreasurerJohn King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | |
---
**BREAKING via CNN: Nearly 23,000 votes were just THROWN OUT in Texas!**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/7286?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220405-VotingRightsAlert-TexasVotingRightsRR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220405-VotingRightsAlert-TexasVotingRightsRR-Pros-sl1&akid=3676%2E9716520%2ED60NIZ)
**[We can’t let the GOP attack our right to vote! Stand with President Obama and stand up for voting rights by signing our URGENT petition today>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/7286?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220405-VotingRightsAlert-TexasVotingRightsRR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220405-VotingRightsAlert-TexasVotingRightsRR-Pros-sl1&akid=3676%2E9716520%2ED60NIZ)**
| | [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/7286?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220405-VotingRightsAlert-TexasVotingRightsRR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220405-VotingRightsAlert-TexasVotingRightsRR-Pros-sl1&akid=3676%2E9716520%2ED60NIZ)
---

We can’t let up, team -- Republicans in Texas and across the country are **ATTACKING our sacred right to vote.**

CNN reports that Texas' new voting law -- the one Democrats broke quorum trying to stop -- caused nearly 23,000 lawful voters to have their mail-in ballots THROWN OUT. That's nearly one in seven!

More restrictions like that are on the way, too: This year alone, Republicans in 14 states have advanced **36 _more_ restrictive voting bills** \-- and with the midterms just months away, we have to act NOW!

**We just launched an URGENT petition to answer President Obama's warning and protect voting rights. We’re still missing your signature, so please:**

**[Show President Obama we'll NEVER back down from this fight. Add your name TODAY to help gather our first 50,000 signatures by MIDNIGHT>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/7286?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220405-VotingRightsAlert-TexasVotingRightsRR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220405-VotingRightsAlert-TexasVotingRightsRR-Pros-sl1&akid=3676%2E9716520%2ED60NIZ)**

name: Markwayne Mullin
subject: Joe Biden tried to kill me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mullin for America
body:
But I'm still here, and my fight isn't over.

| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60050331:JlcgjCobN:m:1:3317145305:54C720C4A1EBC15B56D098663FFA081A:r)
When the Biden administration left Americans behind in Afghanistan, the team and I went to get Americans out. And what did the Biden administration do in response?

**Without question, they tried to kill me. **

They released information about my location while I was in Afghanistan. They didn't care if I got killed. They just didn't want anyone to know that they left Americans behind.

To be quite frank, I didn't do it for political clout or popularity. I didn't even intend for it to get out. Despite the media outing us and putting the mission in jeopardy we were ultimately successful.

**I did this because I care deeply about every single American. It angered me that they got left behind in harm 's way. I care that we have a President who not only left them in a warzone, but that he tried to kill a United States Congressman who went to save them. **

I saw an opportunity to help. As a Christian, helping others is what God intended me to do. I saw a need and I went to it.

Now, I see another need. I'm running for the United States Senate to continue to fight for the American people like I've done my whole life. As the next Senator for Oklahoma, **I will never stop fighting.**

**Even if a corrupt administration tries to stop me.

[It would be my honor if you could join me in this battle today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60050331:JlcgjCobN:m:1:3317145305:54C720C4A1EBC15B56D098663FFA081A:r)**
---
[**JOIN TEAM MULLIN**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60050331:JlcgjCobN:m:1:3317145305:54C720C4A1EBC15B56D098663FFA081A:r)
[**FIGHT FOR AMERICA**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60050331:JlcgjCobN:m:1:3317145305:54C720C4A1EBC15B56D098663FFA081A:r)
God bless America.
Markwayne Mullin

Candidate for US Senate

name: John Kovacs
subject: ISSUES SURVEY >>>
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOHN KOVACS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Take 30 seconds now to weigh in.
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/197dcb250501724edc9f99905c540ea9/37373/f288d36bd399024c/573e1064d082e334c3d6b838967d376c/37373)
---
Fellow Conservative,

This primary race is heating up – we have just 70 days to go until Election Day – and we’re working hard to come out on top and move on to DEFEAT Pelosi puppet Susie Lee this November.

I’ve been hearing from voters across the district, and they are extremely concerned about the direction our nation is headed. They know the Biden presidency has been a disaster for the country.

**According to a recent survey from NBC News, 71% of voters nationally believe the U.S. is on the wrong track.**

Today, I want to get your opinion.
[**Let me know which issues are most important to you. >>>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/197dcb250501724edc9f99905c540ea9/37373/f288d36bd399024c/ceea83bd465a1949c3d6b838967d376c/37373)
With so many problems emerging (the border crisis, record-high inflation, and the war in Ukraine, to name just a few), the American people fear for the future. That’s why I’m running for Congress to restore President Trump’s America First agenda and get our nation back on track.

Thank you in advance for taking a moment today to weigh in.

-John Kovacs
Republican Candidate for Congress (NV-03)

subject: Are YOUR kids turning to socialism?
body:
Peter,
The militant, socialist Left controls the news media, academia, Hollywood, and most of our corporations.

They’re getting where America’s young people can see them, and as a result, more and more of our youth are sucked into the lies of socialism every day.

**America can’t survive if the next generation is taught to hate it.**

We’re sounding the alarm on young Americans and socialism, but we need your help.

**We need Americans to join us and show the world that we’re ready to TAKE A STAND against the indoctrination of our children.**

body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/a65a5874b459b725/a26835af97bd9644c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
# **Friend — We’re running a campaign for the U.S. Senate unlike any other. It’s a grassroots movement, powered by supporters like you. **

---
We were the first campaign to get organized in all 159 Georgia counties. We have the support of nearly half of all sheriffs across Georgia, more than 50 state legislators, and well over 100 local leaders. This team will not be outworked, and we’re coming up on a critical moment. Early voting gets started in less than a month... and it’s vital that we build up our Get Out The Vote Fund as soon as we can. **Will you contribute to the effort? Take action now. **
---
[**GOTV FUND: DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/a65a5874b459b725/f43bfb8f8a148938c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Every dollar raised helps us reach another voter with a phone call, a text, or a digital ad. And that direct voter contact is what’s going to make the difference in the primary in May, and again in November. **Our opponents are relying on out of state donors and elites... we’re depending on conservatives like you fueling our campaign with donations of $100, $50, or even just $5. ** **So I hope you’ll act now and help fund our Get Out The Vote efforts. **
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/a65a5874b459b725/b493cb459852c623c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**GOTV FUND: DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/a65a5874b459b725/a1fb89d8053adde5c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/a65a5874b459b725/0c35802b1e00af16c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
_**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $23 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/a65a5874b459b725/4ec5b0fa159189bfc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=a65a5874b459b725&d=f34ea48550e90035c3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=a65a5874b459b725).
---

Athens, GA 30604

subject: Join us for a virtual Volunteer Party for Jennifer Esteen tomorrow!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Future Generations PAC
body:
Join Future Generations & Project SuperBloom on Wednesday, April 6th, from 5:30 – 7:30pm PDT for a Volunteer Party for Jennifer Esteen for CA State Assembly! | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDIxeDWqAtfj4Fn87VuYfG4Xt4DQgNWFgDCOefFWaI9Dp_O6IxexNATE7cITP5W1rXb8BlbLHOFxWdi6Nh2hNxFp1kZwC200z8OdsT3_3o5NCQGatkXxVRKWSEL7-xKP99zwVm-SHAATNq8Np5VpE9tFm_SqNbi7db1GGJweC6hizvnPH34YI3i6xk8EYPQgjJnljQTrUAvLq2qqVo-SlqTlIW4UqUGQPtkbSlCox9Sn2MjrVp7QL5ea0dycLNSfrJnsDCiVtSsxRX7hR-BB4gtZ9Sfd8jEt-83ZkaXbtFswUXstBu44QwVeNZD7VGeNGGQ/3ky/KS4U1JbGQ162H-Xf-Wv3Ig/h0/vFTZJUx55pISQUE6wxbU1OSBE3Q81ctPLUesmmZnpKc)
---
Peter, Future Generations will be co-hosting the first ever _Jennifer Esteen: Volunteer Phonebank Party_ with Project Super Bloom this Wednesday, April 6th from 5:30 - 7:30pm PDT! Like Future Generations, Super Bloom is a youth-led, volunteer organization who is supporting candidates running in California's 2022 state legislature races. Together we are amplifying and uplifting leaders who will stand up for future generations! Jennifer Esteen is running for California's State Assembly District 20. She's an RN who has been putting in the work for her community for years as a mental health care advocate, a housing advisor for the San Francisco Board of Supervisors, and as Vice President of Organizing with SEIU's local 1021. **Jennifer had the political courage to challenge an entrenched incumbent - and after seeing the excitement building up around her campaign, the incumbent ****bowed out of the race! ** This leaves this blue seat WIDE open - but it's quickly becoming a crowded field. This is why today we are not asking you for money([although that is always welcome](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x1vo0MTk_X3w2vmTqbx0uSQRnS9Y_9ICFFi4IAHTCMeY-eyiamS69bVM-CzpeKv-uJAcmk6LGA7CFze31W2LRgVqZ_Sv5jvs9GOVmI6oA92T7Jf189-XM7OzC65A907p2yg1qis8O738h-MpuJIWaL38NhkJ1JeoiwNW-qpqtUTWZ15PO7SOF_mq4AUPPd0xsx3zC1DwcdpInrMV-3aMgfhWh5uYYAJWq-o0exvBhXmgqTMun3hPDhPD0cud7pWlB8PIDlXgUjQX49X5UhwFf6BWfCV_I3sEtc-nmORd9ajxnlEBrkJjtw46-kdWfKTiRL46J4C-8DSDJBV4GCTFFStnaNwTciTD0TjqznPoInNa0MGeeotV40wrpqzTYoOSW5SnGR_38RO5yVtQ1XrGU-/3ky/KS4U1JbGQ162H-Xf-Wv3Ig/h1/YzFh_I0kcHfZ62RPWMiJXImN9jS3OMkObqx82z3Jv9Y)) but for your time! Will you join us to make calls to voters to let them know about Jennifer's progressive platform?
---

Despite the district's vibrant cultural diversity, their representation has been anything but. If elected, Jennifer would become the first openly gay Black member of the California Legislative LGBTQ Caucus. As wife and mother, she cannot wait to make sure families like her own are represented. **_It is people like Jennifer, with lived experiences that will best represent the urgent needs of the people. That includes taking a bold approach to address environmental justice, addressing the housing crisis, standing by us as we demand worker's rights, and fight for us in Sacramento to secure universal healthcare for every Californian._** Absolutely no experience is necessary to participate. During our party, you'll get in-depth training, a script, and receive ongoing support over Zoom while making calls. You can stay for the entire 2 hours, or join us for 10, 20, 30 minutes! [Can I count on you to join me tomorrow?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDAqSHGgAZcLIhCuOk-pY-oQZVdljSJZGDSZYwvDcEdehoQt6iUmJZUNN-sM52GCLxpO4C8fVIELjDaM1104dMut2whtqdoYAg2-bWPxCzZLrk9zyEiG-YaC5FQ_xoCMu-YXnDrCcj3J5bSxRF-LOYxHEbBDaCiGoZY3s1geh6c931xSgpUAIgY3lhtgO1ZIySscGqY9cakjHnerx7hjCoi2NQpRVVoqsILUPtMFX-naPvzavRlA6qM25N39XN85hMjxIm0Pl1Un8IDIQ3sZubehjm7iWon_8mmzHwZTV_QXqU3RMPYkHsCSmnDnNAUvOucFjfBM47lO6naXiSjMfAN0/3ky/KS4U1JbGQ162H-Xf-Wv3Ig/h4/W6hQ_zdshV7qeRodx-XTCS5-nF201yplniXPLOs4-N0)

| | **Future Generations** is a youth-founded, youth-led movement guided by the Seventh Generation philosophy, building a sustainable world for the next seven generations. We partner with progressives up and down the ballot to stop the climate crisis, and fight for universal healthcare, racial and economic justice. We don't take money from corporate PACs or lobbyists. In 2020 we helped re-elect GND champion Sen. Ed Markey and flipped crucial down-ballot seats.

We're building a powerful slate for 2022, and we need your help.
