clean_body: Join Future Generations & Project SuperBloom on Wednesday, April 6th, from 5:30 – 7:30pm PDT for a Volunteer Party for Jennifer Esteen for CA State Assembly! | | Peter, Future Generations will be co-hosting the first ever Jennifer Esteen: Volunteer Phonebank Party with Project Super Bloom this Wednesday, April 6th from 5:30 - 7:30pm PDT! Like Future Generations, Super Bloom is a youth-led, volunteer organization who is supporting candidates running in California's 2022 state legislature races. Together we are amplifying and uplifting leaders who will stand up for future generations! Jennifer Esteen is running for California's State Assembly District 20. She's an RN who has been putting in the work for her community for years as a mental health care advocate, a housing advisor for the San Francisco Board of Supervisors, and as Vice President of Organizing with SEIU's local 1021. Jennifer had the political courage to challenge an entrenched incumbent - and after seeing the excitement building up around her campaign, the incumbent bowed out of the race! This leaves this blue seat WIDE open - but it's quickly becoming a crowded field. This is why today we are not asking you for money() but for your time! Will you join us to make calls to voters to let them know about Jennifer's progressive platform? | Despite the district's vibrant cultural diversity, their representation has been anything but. If elected, Jennifer would become the first openly gay Black member of the California Legislative LGBTQ Caucus. As wife and mother, she cannot wait to make sure families like her own are represented. It is people like Jennifer, with lived experiences that will best represent the urgent needs of the people. That includes taking a bold approach to address environmental justice, addressing the housing crisis, standing by us as we demand worker's rights, and fight for us in Sacramento to secure universal healthcare for every Californian. Absolutely no experience is necessary to participate. During our party, you'll get in-depth training, a script, and receive ongoing support over Zoom while making calls. You can stay for the entire 2 hours, or join us for 10, 20, 30 minutes! If you are unable to attend, please. It is going to take all we've got to send her to Sacramento. We deeply appreciate whatever you can give. In solidarity, Roza Calderon Executive Director, Future Generations | | Future Generations is a youth-founded, youth-led movement guided by the Seventh Generation philosophy, building a sustainable world for the next seven generations. We partner with progressives up and down the ballot to stop the climate crisis, and fight for universal healthcare, racial and economic justice. We don't take money from corporate PACs or lobbyists. In 2020 we helped re-elect GND champion Sen. Ed Markey and flipped crucial down-ballot seats. We're building a powerful slate for 2022, and we need your help. Join our people-powered movement in the fight for the future. | | Connect with us by clicking on the links below: | | | Paid for by Future Generations PAC. ---|--- Future Generations PAC P.O. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20Campaign=20Management=20Team?=
subject: Mike Blasi Press Release
body:
David Burg Endorses Mike Blasi | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/73f2c4e00dc0/mike-blasi-press-release-16053347?e=5c7b109522)
---
| |
---
| |
# THE AMERICA FIRST CANDIDATE
-SAVE AMERICA-

###

**IMMEDIATE RELEASE:** Mike Blasi For Congress [info@mikeblasiforcongress.com](mailto:info@mikeblasiforcongress.com)

1-(470) 645-3724 **-David Burg endorses Mike Blasi-**
**HOWELL, NJ** (April 3, 2022) - Sunday Mike Blasi, Republican candidate for Congress in New Jersey's 4th District, "David Burg is an incredible asset to the cause and with his knowledge and patriotism our campaign is stronger and poised for victory."

BELOW IS THE PRESS RELEASE FROM DAVID BURG: *** PRESS RELEASE***
David Burg for Congress Statement
_David Burg Suspends His Congressional Campaign and Endorses Mike Blasi_ (Howell, New Jersey) MONDAY, APRIL 4, 2022 --- David Burg, Republican Candidate for Congress in New Jersey’s 4th District, announced yesterday that he has suspended his campaign and is endorsing fellow primary challenger Mike Blasi to unseat incumbent Chris Smith.

"It has been a tremendous privilege and one of the most meaningful experiences of my life to run for Congress. Because of the incredible generosity of my supporters I’ve had the opportunity to articulate my views about the perilous future of our country far and wide, and to fight as hard as I can to preserve and protect our sacred Constitutional Republic.

But this campaign has never been about me. From the outset, it’s been about our country, our culture, our faith, and our families.

Mike Blasi is a fellow Republican who preceded me in this race and now is in a stronger position to unseat our 42-year incumbent. Like myself, Mike is a political outsider who is not beholden to anyone or anything other than his principles. He’s a good man who has served our country, he’s a family man, and Mike and I see eye-to-eye on all significant issues.

Under these circumstances, the last thing I would want to do is stand in Mike’s way. So it’s my honor to wholeheartedly endorse Mike Blasi to be our next Congressman from New Jersey’s 4th District. I intend to do everything I can to help Mike win this critically important primary on June 7.

Running for Congress also has opened my eyes to the astonishingly corrupt political system in this state. I find it shocking and wholly unacceptable that a small cabal of entrenched insiders determines whom the Republican Party will endorse for political office – which these operatives then publish on the very ballot through which we exercise our right to vote.

Given this mutual back-scratching racket it’s hardly surprising that a RINO swamp creature like Chris Smith has held our Congressional seat for 42 years!

So, in addition to doing everything I can for Mike Blasi, I intend to use my legal skills to help abolish New Jersey’s corrupt line-voting system. It’s time to empower ordinary New Jersians to express their own preferences for the candidates who best represent their Republican values – without undue influence by entrenched insiders.

Two other extremely important points for those of you in the NJ area:

First, a truly courageous patriot who has become a dear friend through my Congressional campaign, Elizabeth Nader, is organizing what promises to be an incredibly informative and inspiring event on April 28 entitled ‘A Seat At The Table.’ There will be a number of nationally-prominent conservative luminaries there and I strongly encourage all of you to attend. You can learn about and register for this very important event here: [https://www.conservative.org/2022/03/16/a-seat-at-the-table/](https://MikeBlasiForCongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed3ab556783898df4fb1eb6a1&id=399e7937c7&e=5c7b109522).

Second, another courageous patriot and prominent conservative talk-show host on NJ 101.5, Bill Spadea, and others recently launched a critically-important grassroots conservative organization in New Jersey, the Common Sense Club. The Common Sense Club is growing rapidly and is positioned to affect important and deeply impactful change in our great state. I’m a member and I strongly encourage each of you to join here: [https://commonsenseclub.org/](https://MikeBlasiForCongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed3ab556783898df4fb1eb6a1&id=19deaca36b&e=5c7b109522).

I’m so gratified to have had this opportunity to run for Congress. Thanks to all of you from the bottom of my heart, and please know that this has been just the start of my ongoing fight to defend our beloved country from the leftist abyss.

God Bless America.” ###
####
# WE'RE CLEANING HOUSE
Any further inquiries can be directed to the **Campaign Management Team** by responding to this email or by calling our campaign offices and asking for our Press Secretary at 1-(470) 645-3724

subject: Not asking for money
body:
But I need your opinion. | | |
---
| | [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=aaab9f4d68&e=ae0ea222da)
---
| | Peter,

This past year we have seen gas prices rise to an all-time high, the Afghanistan withdrawal disaster, and record-high inflation.

Throughout the whole nation, people are frustrated and upset!

We know it’s the people's voice that matters most. I also don’t care what the polls tell me, I only care about what you think Peter.

That is why every month I will continue to ask you what issues matter most and listen to what is bothering _you_ , _not_ some special interest groups.

When I become a representative, I am working for YOU - not the other way around.

**So please take a moment and tell me what issues matter most to you. >>**
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?David=20Curry?=
subject: BIDEN BORDER CRISIS
body:
FINISH TRUMP’S WALL! |
---
| | [ ](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=2a1b14787d&e=598f6aa24c)
---
| |
---
| Friend,

It is hard to believe that just over one year ago, under President Donald J. Trump’s leadership, our border was the most secure it ever was. By building over 500 miles of new Border Wall and implementing policies like “Remain in Mexico” and “Title 42”, **President Trump and conservatives finally put America First.**

On day one of his Presidency, Joe Biden canceled Border Wall Construction as well as the policies that deterred illegal aliens from crossing our border, which has led to the worst border crisis our country has ever seen.

**This is destroying our country.** In the past 6 months alone, over 1 million illegal aliens have entered our country. Crime in this country is skyrocketing, the drug epidemic is worsening, and America is being destroyed by this invasion.

No community is safe from this crisis. Under Joe Biden’s feckless leadership, every state is a border state._If we are going to Save America, we must secure our border_. When I am elected, I will Finish The Wall and reinstate the Trump border policies, but I need your help.
---
| **[If you want to Finish Trump’s Border Wall, Join My Team Today!](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=5535768d84&e=598f6aa24c)**
If this invasion continues, the country we love will be unrecognizable.

American Patriots must fight back now to take our country back from those seeking to fundamentally alter our way of life.

**[I am counting on you to help me in this fight.](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=3792864938&e=598f6aa24c)**
[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=5bc86eabb0&e=598f6aa24c) [](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=de8dc820cd&e=598f6aa24c) [](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=03b82a439e&e=598f6aa24c) [](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=0d8a98d49e&e=598f6aa24c)

Thank you,

David Curry

name: Jason Miyares
subject: the fight is far from over
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
We made great strides over the last few months but we can’t backslide. We’ve come too far.| | | Friend,

While the woke Left attempted to defund our police and welcome socialism with open arms, we fought back. Friend,

Spring is in full swing, which means election season is in full swing, and we wanted to share the latest from the campaign trail:
**POLLS:**
* The Listener Group dropped an encouraging poll: Charlie **56.5%** , DeSantis **43.5%**!
* A Democratic primary poll also showed Charlie leading by double digits across Florida, confirming what we’ve known all along: **He’s the best candidate to defeat. Gov. DeSantis in November.**

**WHAT HAS CHARLIE BEEN UP TO?**
* Along with LGBTQ+ legislators and activists, he held a “Say Gay and Speak Out” roundtable on Florida Republicans’ reprehensible “Don’t Say Gay” law (signed into law by Gov. DeSantis on March 28th).
* Charlie met with labor leaders in West Central Florida and discussed the importance of supporting our unions.
* All across Florida, Charlie has been conducting listening tours, meeting folks where they live and work, and hearing from them about their concerns for the future.

body:
Joy Reid talked to VP Harris directly about how Kyrsten Sinema blocks the Biden-Harris agenda. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpHIgPjZTod5LVCLRGJ5EuVnvDHqljinnhSRx27Y-QsvG6M20ZQaQYFyLcafJBZA0q_z4iFKezMv0mTzjajjhVI-zeqWRotOK_0gqbiyZxQIN4lHc9ukCer1-RPawhpBREiak6UbLIZEtr60O4r6-MKXUFg0VDYZyLyEw-X7kdvODALgauzwoh010YLAo9w8a42-a9oTIWhLQk5A7tHljoVY0PJvguljT5mRbMOqAwTDDAjgN3C6EIu3Fdt1EfCDyXlox4Ft9RkHVT0MNC6ieSISzxzgWRimU16ReA-nb0xuTJ1i6LSnG3zC_LOA-vFO-ZM/3ky/-B0gPU9sTzSvhxsoPK_AUA/h0/lyTlE3E_E2oSfLPWOBATVK2A4Rg18kyntE88yi6srg0)
Peter,

| Dear Friends,

This is it.

We’ve officially qualified for the Republican Primary on June 28th!

With 43,000 signatures collected and 400 signature events held, **our campaign has gone above and beyond.** We couldn’t have done it without the support from our volunteers across the state, so from the bottom of our hearts, **thank you. **

Now that our spot on the primary ballot is secured, we are in the final leg of this race. **We won’t slow down** until we’ve crossed the finish line, but **we need your help to get there. **

**Will you donate $4, $40, or $140 today to keep our momentum going?**

Peter Willis,
In state legislatures across the country, Republicans are waging a concerted effort to undermine the rights of LGBTQ+ people. And now they’re getting ready to take their dangerous agenda to Congress, with plans to turn the trans members of our communities into second-class citizens, roll back gay marriage, and pass other backwards, harmful policies.
The progressive community is fighting back. You’re invited to join Melanie and three panelists TONIGHT for a discussion on the threats to LGBTQ+ rights, and how we can take action.
**_LGBTQ+ Rights and Progressive Policy Discussion_** , with panelists:
* Anthony Arrien (he/him) Trans-identified NYS Legislative & Educational Advocate
* Gina Sanchirico (she/her) LGBTQ+ Family Advocate; Retired Teacher; Union Advocate
* Nick Haby (he/him) LGBTQ+ Organizer & New Reformers Board Member
* U.S. Congressional Candidate Melanie D’Arrigo (she/her)

clean_body: | | | | Peter Willis, In state legislatures across the country, Republicans are waging a concerted effort to undermine the rights of LGBTQ+ people. And now they’re getting ready to take their dangerous agenda to Congress, with plans to turn the trans members of our communities into second-class citizens, roll back gay marriage, and pass other backwards, harmful policies. The progressive community is fighting back. You’re invited to join Melanie and three panelists TONIGHT for a discussion on the threats to LGBTQ+ rights, and how we can take action. LGBTQ+ Rights and Progressive Policy Discussion , with panelists: Anthony Arrien (he/him) Trans-identified NYS Legislative & Educational Advocate Gina Sanchirico (she/her) LGBTQ+ Family Advocate; Retired Teacher; Union Advocate Nick Haby (he/him) LGBTQ+ Organizer & New Reformers Board Member U.S. Congressional Candidate Melanie D’Arrigo (she/her) TONIGHT, Tuesday, April 5, 7-8 pm ET . ** See you there! Team Melanie Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. name: Jim Jordan
subject: Asking if you'll endorse me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
I've come to the decision that as it pertains to the next chapter in my public service, the best move is no move at all. I'm running for reelection an It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d39b2d2245e1475189345307e7d5f657&_e=Mctf28gOMl0ELfxC_b0_aoVvVTk-NAVZ1EpCABgtSSoIJzuUvVFCkDS1r7RDWfI3irbY8N7y1VZQIJ0rLBX_890rEBQ9YLwNywf07CBm08k47gVPEhAaTgnh-ICFBbQrxudC6w16HR9ZcLBQpLEEIjhVHTZOdlt2bldmif78xXapN0I29bDrCaC5vj86DIG41blirevN2yCArysH1ZzOof5deQqL1b3aAJfH0tU2MDrh1fZdnK6oYCwH3xH5KscGsTejxvXYNz4n_jZ3HAN_BMcJQ1eV08WZ8wMHlDk6A6I49rz8pQyf6OZFHUlN6WO1oXBiLN0h1KgrKvmLzvVgd1wT_tHg8jCk5D8ETIRRrrog_qOj27Cr5k3FMvA44weXPO2M2Xz8Z9AU2SqA1HyHcvs8guElf1XnldjK0HP_5U_dMVPmSJFuJEi9gAfA7BvhIUHhiX8aDjwndTUeqSXGkLS59kYZXGTNA_xt3pLnDsQ%3D)
---

Peter,

I’ve been fighting for you and for the truth since I first was elected to Congress in November 2006. Since then, the voters of Ohio’s 4th Congressional District have continued to put their faith in me and have sent me back for two-year stints ever since.

I have never - and will never - take a single vote for granted. Ever. I will continue to work hard for every single vote; I’ve watched a lot of people lose their jobs because they forget who they report to; the American people.

**I will never take the position I currently hold for granted**.

For as long as the folks I represent continue putting their faith in me, **I’ll keep fighting every single day to make America a better version of itself. I promise you that.**

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d39b2d2245e1475189345307e7d5f657&_e=Mctf28gOMl0ELfxC_b0_aoVvVTk-NAVZ1EpCABgtSSoIJzuUvVFCkDS1r7RDWfI3irbY8N7y1VZQIJ0rLBX_890rEBQ9YLwNywf07CBm08k47gVPEhAaTgnh-ICFBbQrxudC6w16HR9ZcLBQpLEEIjhVHTZOdlt2bldmif78xXapN0I29bDrCaC5vj86DIG41blirevN2yCArysH1ZzOof5deQqL1b3aAJfH0tU2MDrh1fZdnK6oYCwH3xH5KscGsTejxvXYNz4n_jZ3HAN_BNlPzPOiWx7ea3zJMRolYnEDFlMgrHB9dPi3GSTsJCyDiQuXBDTnZp9_7yvjDGqYRpOo51rDky5cUWo4iHe7GRBQquYyNIZENkjRavxuC_Qwj1sa_cd7jgLPnBmZlyIRPKbFXxTDUiu-3NX10GYlVg7JgnntlP_HYQLiUwKPy0vusj3lOhf45n9bfGmL0cUoBKuaAuzKL4dt7VdSVEI7DcY%3D)
I’ll work to hold the mainstream media accountable.
I’ll work to make sure you have all of the information YOU need when you go vote.

I’ll work to make sure Democrats in positions of power are held accountable for their lies to the American people; NO Representative should be out for personal gain when serving the American people in an ELECTED office.

But first, I have to win reelection. **[My primary on May 3rd is fast approaching and today I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll endorse me for re-election](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d39b2d2245e1475189345307e7d5f657&_e=Mctf28gOMl0ELfxC_b0_aoVvVTk-NAVZ1EpCABgtSSoIJzuUvVFCkDS1r7RDWfI3irbY8N7y1VZQIJ0rLBX_890rEBQ9YLwNywf07CBm08k47gVPEhAaTgnh-ICFBbQrxudC6w16HR9ZcLBQpLEEIjhVHTZOdlt2bldmif78xXapN0I29bDrCaC5vj86DIG41blirevN2yCArysH1ZzOof5deQqL1b3aAJfH0tU2MDrh1fZdnK6oYCwH3xH5KscGsTejxvXYNz4n_jZ3HAN_BChm7yERnzSEK_DJbKpxtofLfmlxiKfEZTwzN9RxYZixbN8FX2QaQlqsT8OT4aM2kS0X0lwxHhYUe_PCTZQA-Ocx38XoDJF5bpBZndSC6YX_lWyVbyK2tEL4-FNZ4Dw8w_vmtw7rdtt7-rHX80EDYgh6bPJUdaIAj22ZxKD8FWkeq6qj83EnAOBsS-9Bu2KHWUjOiddu1zLMtdIi-wP2qmk%3D)**.

I’ll only be able to continue fighting on your behalf for as long as I’m in Congress, **[which is why I’m asking for your support today.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d39b2d2245e1475189345307e7d5f657&_e=Mctf28gOMl0ELfxC_b0_aoVvVTk-NAVZ1EpCABgtSSoIJzuUvVFCkDS1r7RDWfI3irbY8N7y1VZQIJ0rLBX_890rEBQ9YLwNywf07CBm08k47gVPEhAaTgnh-ICFBbQrxudC6w16HR9ZcLBQpLEEIjhVHTZOdlt2bldmif78xXapN0I29bDrCaC5vj86DIG41blirevN2yCArysH1ZzOof5deQqL1b3aAJfH0tU2MDrh1fZdnK6oYCwH3xH5KscGsTejxvXYNz4n_jZ3HAN_BNRQ7KFIbJyc6W8w4gUPd3pdsfTgYu_UF6oJD9RhQSEDMizhH41NesVVgW0Gzr7FWDSK-EITxkqdM8cESxlfNAlz3NhCTqntluoORzzrNlskHKE8jcTmaasbnu43ZqKLCo1XJz-x5waIJkOLQ4Th__UN-PE9MWO732y8FtcYImm6dk0JRNEtGttCTM6xKh6zNRHXUu3BmTEQKoSSfHrE8ws%3D)** It’s imperative we have strong conservative voices who are willing to speak up for the truth. I assure you that I’m worthy of your support and **[I hope you’ll offer your endorsement of my candidacy today](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d39b2d2245e1475189345307e7d5f657&_e=Mctf28gOMl0ELfxC_b0_aoVvVTk-NAVZ1EpCABgtSSoIJzuUvVFCkDS1r7RDWfI3irbY8N7y1VZQIJ0rLBX_890rEBQ9YLwNywf07CBm08k47gVPEhAaTgnh-ICFBbQrxudC6w16HR9ZcLBQpLEEIjhVHTZOdlt2bldmif78xXapN0I29bDrCaC5vj86DIG41blirevN2yCArysH1ZzOof5deQqL1b3aAJfH0tU2MDrh1fZdnK6oYCwH3xH5KscGsTejxvXYNz4n_jZ3HAN_BMMkvTrQQWb8Je3rjjH1csPC-pWfsSFhhioElG2KEk3Tr-2SzFMkSg4hSziItAj-pp_PjChDZIKnD1gXcyypp6fZ_QZ5FDpnAqHIhyEyBnaxuudeTUa76xG_CElIgAKzMSHnXAIo1zseu6HtqMiBETSB9wUAtHwgEIWmg2dr2ysmX3k_LAm0QfoU3qncnwfZorcDTOju48YrHbiMtt24v88%3D)**.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d39b2d2245e1475189345307e7d5f657&_e=Mctf28gOMl0ELfxC_b0_aoVvVTk-NAVZ1EpCABgtSSoIJzuUvVFCkDS1r7RDWfI3irbY8N7y1VZQIJ0rLBX_890rEBQ9YLwNywf07CBm08k47gVPEhAaTgnh-ICFBbQrxudC6w16HR9ZcLBQpLEEIjhVHTZOdlt2bldmif78xXapN0I29bDrCaC5vj86DIG41blirevN2yCArysH1ZzOof5deQqL1b3aAJfH0tU2MDrh1fZdnK6oYCwH3xH5KscGsTejxvXYNz4n_jZ3HAN_BJ6atgGQgsFTC__5FKtFK-ds25uACZi8Omwy2pxqbUBhmK3_xBDydnPYPzuCRsGXYdYXI0O16J1jRF97sjPHWK6aLLYr99OfpKoYeN_bPu3oLeqaAaUjfgMsKLbPAh5F4SdTtfYVGQu5WozTX7LO6L8a6NCV9ES9Pz3tJaVfNWIAlGAvPVoLjrG5ecLnG_uIRyOELTo-Zx6egRiYO8sEmqc%3D)
We’ve got so much work to do in the remaining three years Joe Biden has in the White House.

Biden and his people have no idea what they’re doing and it’s going to take a herculean effort on the part of House Republicans to keep them from ruining our country; to keep Big Tech and big media from colluding to keep the truth about this White House -- and the people at the helm – from the**American people**.

I hope if you’re still reading this email, you’ll **[take a moment to offer your personal endorsement of my campaign](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d39b2d2245e1475189345307e7d5f657&_e=Mctf28gOMl0ELfxC_b0_aoVvVTk-NAVZ1EpCABgtSSoIJzuUvVFCkDS1r7RDWfI3irbY8N7y1VZQIJ0rLBX_890rEBQ9YLwNywf07CBm08k47gVPEhAaTgnh-ICFBbQrxudC6w16HR9ZcLBQpLEEIjhVHTZOdlt2bldmif78xXapN0I29bDrCaC5vj86DIG41blirevN2yCArysH1ZzOof5deQqL1b3aAJfH0tU2MDrh1fZdnK6oYCwH3xH5KscGsTejxvXYNz4n_jZ3HAN_BOUSOhr8t7tXi2h8mJS1Wz4xVX_ojd4deQdYelI6cL9GRoRLJpEHsDfFHy5eatbf0B2A82kscRxSu7ptcRThlH1rH9U4MM4T70-twRdgFAQefIr-mGbfYWXCQJmS8yzZ_kp8_pvV0ww6qpHxv45AutUUBCYxJEHezSLdJuLmw4sdhEt1z71puwyt39y0xTwv7ZUH1z0Igvf2En9Tib4BpQ4%3D)**.

I'm thankful for your support,
Jim Jordan

Don't want to receive our emails? body:
Just a quick email to say thanks and ask you to make your voice heard in the 2022 elections. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43812660/338809978/823540626?refcode=ea.2ab04199-1fb5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.2ab04199-1fb5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWIwNDE5OS0xZmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NOtgPHH7Vo4c_T9rZlqPREOcpA_5Anwu8L_AM3ZyDf0=&emci=9d989f08-d6b1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=2ab04199-1fb5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
Hi Peter, I truly can’t say thank you often enough. Every time I’ve asked for your help to hit our fundraising goals, grassroots supporters like you have stepped up to help us get there. Our work to elect strong Democratic leaders for North Carolina and continue making our state even better is only possible because of you. _So again, thank you so much._ But financial contributions won’t be enough. We need every committed Democrat to get out and VOTE in primary elections and in November — our voices need to be heard at the ballot box to create the future our communities deserve. **[Peter, take my pledge to vote in 2022 right now to let me know that you will play your part in our democracy!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43812661/338809979/985747806?refcode=ea.2ab04199-1fb5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.2ab04199-1fb5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWIwNDE5OS0xZmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NOtgPHH7Vo4c_T9rZlqPREOcpA_5Anwu8L_AM3ZyDf0=&emci=9d989f08-d6b1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=2ab04199-1fb5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)** | [PLEDGE TO VOTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43812662/338809981/985747806?refcode=ea.2ab04199-1fb5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.2ab04199-1fb5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWIwNDE5OS0xZmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NOtgPHH7Vo4c_T9rZlqPREOcpA_5Anwu8L_AM3ZyDf0=&emci=9d989f08-d6b1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=2ab04199-1fb5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)

We need to start now

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43812679/338810057/1141538894?refcode=EM_FR_220405Launch1_Launch_TNDP_FULL_6_NG_TESTA_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2JkNTJhZS0xZmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DAMBAmZX68RhrtQ3oPJaLhr4qo0tHmesSgABSg0godE=) The people of Tennessee are tired, Peter. We’re tired of a GOP that is more focused on banning LGBTQ+ books than funding our schools that are 46th in the nation. We’re tired of rural hospitals closing day after day as the GOP spends millions to keep people uninsured. We’re tired of seeing our working families struggle to pay bills and having potential adoptive parents rejected over who they love or how they pray.

But this election year, we have the opportunity to turn things around. The Tennessee Democratic Party is working night and day to register hundreds of thousands of new voters, support candidates around the state so they’re ready to take on the GOP, and fight for the issues that matter to the hard-working people of Tennessee. [**_We need your help to stop the extremist-conservative takeover of Tennessee, and it all starts now. Can you donate $5 or more right now to make sure we have the resources to STOP this GOP takeover in November?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43812680/338810058/1141538894?refcode=EM_FR_220405Launch1_Launch_TNDP_FULL_6_NG_TESTA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2JkNTJhZS0xZmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DAMBAmZX68RhrtQ3oPJaLhr4qo0tHmesSgABSg0godE=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43812681/338810059/1141538894?refcode=EM_FR_220405Launch1_Launch_TNDP_FULL_6_NG_TESTA_EL5_TESTA&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2JkNTJhZS0xZmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DAMBAmZX68RhrtQ3oPJaLhr4qo0tHmesSgABSg0godE=)**

We need resources to build out and execute our strategy across Tennessee before November 8. We’re building our team, putting the final touches on our community outreach plans, and getting candidates ready to take on the GOP. We know we can win; now all we need are the resources.
[**_We’re up against a well-funded GOP that will do anything to stay in power. But with strong grassroots support from people like you, we can give power back to the hard-working people of our state. Donate now to show your support for a better Tennessee →_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43812687/338810065/1141538894?refcode=EM_FR_220405Launch1_Launch_TNDP_FULL_6_NG_TESTA_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2JkNTJhZS0xZmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DAMBAmZX68RhrtQ3oPJaLhr4qo0tHmesSgABSg0godE=)

This work won’t be easy, but we’re not giving up. We love this state, and we’ll keep fighting to make it a better place for all.

Forward,

Tennessee Democratic Party
The Tennessee Democratic Party works to elect Democratic candidates who believe that all Tennesseans deserve a better future no matter who you are, what you look like, where you live, who you love, or how you pray. name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: Resign, Recall, Replace
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60050388:JmVJQCoNq:m:1:3317145305:D6CA30763C1348B2EB3597DAD12FE6F5:r) Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you're thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky. I'll tell you why. I've seen what's happening in our schools -- on our dimes, and I'm sure you have too. Public schools all over the country are relentlessly pushing Critical Race Theory, and convincing America's children that they need to change their sexual preferences and gender identities. _[**It's state-sanctioned leftist indoctrination, plain and simple.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60050388:JmVJQCoNq:m:1:3317145305:D6CA30763C1348B2EB3597DAD12FE6F5:r)_** ** As I discussed on **_Tucker Carlson Tonight_** , I get rid of the people who are indoctrinating our children by replacing them with SANE conservative Americans. **[But, I can't do any of this without your help. Would you consider making a generous donation of ANY amount to help me put an end to state sanctioned leftist indoctrination?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60050388:JmVJQCoNq:m:1:3317145305:D6CA30763C1348B2EB3597DAD12FE6F5:r)** For decades, shady dark-money billionaires like **_George Soros_** have funneled massive amounts of cash into the pockets of radical left-wing activists to take up government positions in communities all over the country. **[One of Soros's favorite targets is local school board races](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60050388:JmVJQCoNq:m:1:3317145305:D6CA30763C1348B2EB3597DAD12FE6F5:r).** _And I hate to break it to you, but his plan has been wildly successful. _ Right now, in EVERY STATE IN AMERICA (including the red states), teachers are indoctrinating our students with CRT. If you're not familiar with CRT, it's the doctrine that all white people are oppressors, and that your skin color determines everything about you. Beyond this, _CRT teaches kids that America is evil to its core, and that everything that makes our country great, is secretly racist._** ** **_Then, what's worse is that these radical school boards allow, hire, and encourage teachers who have been caught ACTIVELY recruiting children to become transgender._** And friend, you may not have seen it happening at the time, but for too long Republicans have neglected local races and instead focused on "BIG" races for President, Governor, and Congress. But in the process, we've left room for people like George Soros to take over local governments all over the country, right under our noses. Now, with all this doom and gloom, it's easy to feel defeated. **But I know, and Tucker Carlson knows that this fight is far from over... ** And we CAN take back our schools from the radical left. [**HELP US TAKE BACK OUR SCHOOLS TODAY!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60050388:JmVJQCoNq:m:1:3317145305:D6CA30763C1348B2EB3597DAD12FE6F5:r) Let me introduce myself. [**My name is Ryan Girdusky, and I founded the 1776 Project PAC to take back our local school boards from the radical left. **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60050388:JmVJQCoNq:m:1:3317145305:D6CA30763C1348B2EB3597DAD12FE6F5:r) **_And I have the 3 R's Battle Plan to do just that!_** **_Resign:_** we'll turn up the public pressure with TV, Radio, and Print media campaigns calling for far left school board members to quit. **_Recall:_** we'll help collect petitions signatures and aid local parents, grandparents, and concerned taxpayers in efforts to recall radical school board members who must be removed from office. **_Replace:_** We'll support the campaigns of pro-America conservatives who run for local school board against liberal pro-CRT school board members. In the coming year, we are hoping to triple our impact! [**But, friend, we can't roll out this plan without your support. Will you rush in $17.76 to the 1776 Project PAC as we prepared to target more than 200 races this year??**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60050388:JmVJQCoNq:m:1:3317145305:D6CA30763C1348B2EB3597DAD12FE6F5:r) Now, I'm guessing you've never heard of me before... **....But, I'd be willing to bet you've heard Tucker, Laura Ingraham, and Donald Trump Jr. ** I've had the chance to discuss my plan with them, and they all believe that _the 1776 Project PAC's 3 R's Campaign Battle Plan is a game-changer!_ Here's what each of them said: **> >>> Tucker Carlson: "**Parents have almost no support, _but now they do_. The **_1776 Project PAC_** __ is a political action committee designed to help school boards and communities elect sane people.... If you're thinking of writing a check... Think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky." **> >>> Laura Ingraham: **"For all the parents out there looking to reclaim your local school boards from radical leftists, help is on the way, a new political action committee called the **_1776 Project_** is going to support school board candidates who oppose indoctrinating kids with things like Critical Race Theory." **> >>> Donald Trump Jr.: **"The **_1776 Project_** is the very first Political Action Committee of it's kind, specifically created to take on this sinister attack on our way of life from within our own communities by working to take local schools boards out of the hands of these America-hating radical liberals..." Even the failing and biased New York Times admitted that we _" lit a fire"_ that is only growing as more conservative patriots like you join the fight in supporting the 1776 Project PAC.** ** **But here is the best part. The 1776 Project PAC has only been around for a year, and we already have a track-record of success. ** In November of 2021, we flipped 44 seats. clean_body: Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you're thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky. I'll tell you why. I've seen what's happening in our schools -- on our dimes, and I'm sure you have too. Public schools all over the country are relentlessly pushing Critical Race Theory, and convincing America's children that they need to change their sexual preferences and gender identities. As I discussed on Tucker Carlson Tonight , I get rid of the people who are indoctrinating our children by replacing them with SANE conservative Americans. For decades, shady dark-money billionaires like George Soros have funneled massive amounts of cash into the pockets of radical left-wing activists to take up government positions in communities all over the country. . And I hate to break it to you, but his plan has been wildly successful. Right now, in EVERY STATE IN AMERICA (including the red states), teachers are indoctrinating our students with CRT. If you're not familiar with CRT, it's the doctrine that all white people are oppressors, and that your skin color determines everything about you. Beyond this, CRT teaches kids that America is evil to its core, and that everything that makes our country great, is secretly racist. Then, what's worse is that these radical school boards allow, hire, and encourage teachers who have been caught ACTIVELY recruiting children to become transgender. And friend, you may not have seen it happening at the time, but for too long Republicans have neglected local races and instead focused on "BIG" races for President, Governor, and Congress. But in the process, we've left room for people like George Soros to take over local governments all over the country, right under our noses. Now, with all this doom and gloom, it's easy to feel defeated. But I know, and Tucker Carlson knows that this fight is far from over... And we CAN take back our schools from the radical left. Let me introduce myself. And I have the 3 R's Battle Plan to do just that! Resign: we'll turn up the public pressure with TV, Radio, and Print media campaigns calling for far left school board members to quit. Recall: we'll help collect petitions signatures and aid local parents, grandparents, and concerned taxpayers in efforts to recall radical school board members who must be removed from office. Replace: We'll support the campaigns of pro-America conservatives who run for local school board against liberal pro-CRT school board members. In the coming year, we are hoping to triple our impact! Now, I'm guessing you've never heard of me before... ....But, I'd be willing to bet you've heard Tucker, Laura Ingraham, and Donald Trump Jr. I've had the chance to discuss my plan with them, and they all believe that the 1776 Project PAC's 3 R's Campaign Battle Plan is a game-changer! Here's what each of them said: > >>> Tucker Carlson: "Parents have almost no support, but now they do. Even the failing and biased New York Times admitted that we " lit a fire" that is only growing as more conservative patriots like you join the fight in supporting the 1776 Project PAC. clean_body: | | | | The most important interview to date. | HAGEMAN INTERVIEW WITH MARK LEVIN | Hi Peter, Did you listen to Harriet Hageman’s interview with Mark Levin? They sat down to discuss what the people of Wyoming need! From talking about the America First energy agenda, to the importance of restoring the rights of the American Citizens. If you want to know how Harriet will defeat Liz Cheney, | Thank you, Team Hageman | | | | | DONATE BY MAIL: Hageman for Wyoming P.O. Box 4157, Cheyenne, Wyoming 82003

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: New sticker for you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We got a Mark Kelly sticker for you, and we think you’re going to like it.
#

Friends —
We got a Mark Kelly sticker for you, and we think you’re going to like it.
[**For a limited time, contribute ANY AMOUNT and we’ll send you the ORIGINAL Mark Kelly for Senate sticker. Most people give around $8.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22-sticker?refcode=em220405-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2524_6688874_pr5sKL&akid=2524%2E6688874%2Epr5sKL)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22-sticker?refcode=em220405-1-7&t=2&refcode2=2524_6688874_pr5sKL&akid=2524%2E6688874%2Epr5sKL)
**[GET YOUR STICKER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22-sticker?refcode=em220405-1-7&t=3&refcode2=2524_6688874_pr5sKL&akid=2524%2E6688874%2Epr5sKL)**
This is THE sticker the campaign first launched with in 2019. It was dubbed “the meatball” sticker after the nickname given to the NASA logo.
Now, for a limited-time, we want to offer it to any Mark Kelly supporter who chips in to help re-elect Mark in 2022.
So, what do you say?
[**Use this link to contribute any amount you can afford and we’ll send you the ORIGINAL Mark Kelly for Senate “meatball” sticker soon.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22-sticker?refcode=em220405-1-7&t=4&refcode2=2524_6688874_pr5sKL&akid=2524%2E6688874%2Epr5sKL)
Thank you,
Team Kelly
**[GET YOUR STICKER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-apr22-sticker?refcode=em220405-1-7&t=5&refcode2=2524_6688874_pr5sKL&akid=2524%2E6688874%2Epr5sKL)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=2524%2E6688874%2Epr5sKL).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Team Patty
subject: Republicans want to raise your taxes
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
This is why keeping the Senate blue is critical.
#
Peter,
While Democrats are fighting to bring down costs for your family, Senate Republicans are peddling a radical plan that would raise taxes on families, workers, and retirees across the country.
In fact – if the Republican agenda is passed, more than half of Americans would see their taxes go up. Families with children. Older Americans on Social Security. Married couples making $90,000 or less. Americans with disabilities. Full-time students. The GOP will leave no stone unturned.
**[Peter – we cannot let Mitch McConnell and the GOP take back the Senate and enact their extreme plans. Contribute $5 or anything you can to defend our majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43812828/338810722/-1534611205?refcode=pm_em_220405_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTFmNWRiZS0yMGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bOmj6uVITzJ9ZkJR2VE52lAoe01I6u-FSbDZMvzbEX8=)**
Democrats believe it just shouldn’t be this expensive to raise a family. It’s as simple as that. That’s exactly why Patty Murray and Senate Democrats are working to lower costs for workers and families on everything from health care to education, child care and housing.
Meanwhile, Mitch McConnell and the GOP – who have spent decades looking out for their ultra-wealthy friends, corporations, and special interests – are threatening a massive tax hike on workers, older Americans, retirees, and millions of people in Washington state and all over the nation.
**[We can stop the GOP’s awful tax hike, but we need to stand with Patty Murray and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate. Will you rush in $5 right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43812829/338810723/-1534611205?refcode=pm_em_220405_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTFmNWRiZS0yMGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bOmj6uVITzJ9ZkJR2VE52lAoe01I6u-FSbDZMvzbEX8=)**
Thank you,
Team Patty

The GOP will leave no stone unturned. = Democrats believe it just shouldn’t be this expensive to raise a family. It’s as simple as that. That’s exactly why Patty Murray and Senate Democrats are working to lower costs for workers and families on everything from health care to education, child care and housing. Meanwhile, Mitch McConnell and the GOP – who have spent decades looking out for their ultra-wealthy friends, corporations, and special interests – are threatening a massive tax hike on workers, older Americans, retirees, and millions of people in Washington state and all over the nation. = Thank you, Team Patty **= As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._ PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

name: Nina Turner for Us
subject: pummeled
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
We’re not going to lie to you: these groups like to hit late and hit hard.
#

The attacks are coming...
Just this week, someone put out a poll testing different lines of attack against Nina.
We’ve seen this playbook before — they’re going to swoop in and spend obscene amounts of money to attack Nina at the last minute. Last time, outside groups spent millions of dollars to try to drag us through the mud in the final few weeks of the race.
**We’re not going to lie to you: these groups like to hit late and hit hard. So we’re counting on a surge of grassroots support to make sure we’re able to fight back — and fast.**
**[Can you make a $27 contribution right now to stand with Nina and make sure we have the resources to respond to the attack ads coming our way in this critical stretch of the race?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43812943/338811342/413031954?refcode2=1054cd49-21b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220405-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDU0Y2Q0OS0yMWI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GRchhGAMT-bebbnx5kQNWNwc5ekZE7B4i6oiMveCu7I=)**
From Big Oil to Big Banks to Big Pharma, there are a lot of powerful interests who don’t want to see Nina Turner in Congress. And they’ve shown before they’re willing to spend a LOT of money to kneecap our movement and protect the status quo.
It's outrageous, but if we don’t have Nina’s back now, then she is going to get _absolutely pummeled_ on television with false attack ads.
They are trying to drown us out and smear Nina right as early voting starts, and we absolutely cannot let that happen.
So we are asking you directly:
**[If you can afford it, please make a contribution to our campaign today. Every $3, $10, or $27 donation makes a massive difference in our ability to match up against the Super PACs and outside groups who are going to spend whatever it takes to stop Nina and all of us alongside her.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43812944/338811344/413031954?refcode2=1054cd49-21b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220405-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDU0Y2Q0OS0yMWI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GRchhGAMT-bebbnx5kQNWNwc5ekZE7B4i6oiMveCu7I=)**
Thank you for having Nina's back, especially now.
With these hands,
Nina Turner for Us
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43812945/338811346/413031954?refcode2=1054cd49-21b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220405-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDU0Y2Q0OS0yMWI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GRchhGAMT-bebbnx5kQNWNwc5ekZE7B4i6oiMveCu7I=)**

subject: Don't Outsource our Senator
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bartos for US Senate

| _**_The Verdict is in_**_
---
| Pennyslvanians don't want to outsource our senator
---
|
---
| Peter,
It's no secret that some of the candidates in this race have been spending a whole lot of money trying to _**buy themselves a senate seat**_ , but as the only lifelong Pennsylvanian in the race, I know the truth --******y ou can't put a price tag on Pennsylvania. **
So it didn't surprise me that the latest poll shows **3/4 Republicans don't want a _Johnny-come-lately_ representing them in Washington**.**
****Now , we have to make sure that doesn't happen. **
With my opponents making this the most expensive primary in history, **we're counting on grassroots strength to ensure that** _**Pennsylvania is represented by a Pennsylvanian**_. We need Republicans in every corner of our state knocking doors and making phone calls in their communities for our campaign.**Can we count on you?**
---

| Thank you for standing up for PA,
Jeff

We’re expecting to see a ton of corporate PAC backers on his report,******but they’re no match for the strong, dedicated grassroots movement we’ve built together. ** From the beginning I’ve said that a campaign for the people needs to be supported by the people. Washington special interests have no place in Montana, and that’s why I count on individual donors like you. Thank you for helping us reach this critical deadline, and for your steadfast support of my campaign. \-- Cora

clean_body: Friend, open to WATCH our new ad >>>| | | Team, This week, we’ve got a new ad and a new endorsement. See what we’ve been up to below! 📺 NEW AD ALERT! Our communities are paying the price for years of anti-police rhetoric. That's why Jesse Sullivan is running for governor with a plan to crack down on crime. Law enforcement leaders across the state have his back, and as Governor, he'll always have theirs. . ❇️ OUR LATEST ENDORSEMENT: SENATOR NEIL ANDERSON! Illinois Senator Neil Anderson (R-Andalusia) is one of the most genuine public servants in Illinois politics. He is a devoted husband, a great father, and a committed first responder. As a paramedic and firefighter, he runs to danger to protect others who are running from it. There couldn’t be a more apt description of what public service is at its best, and that’s why Kathleen and I are honored to have Neil’s support in this fight to Save Illinois. ⚠️ TAKE ACTION: SAY NO TO “VACATION” FOR CRIMINALS! Did you know that Illinois gives dangerous defendants on home confinement 2 days a week on "vacation" from electronic monitoring? It’s dumb and dangerous. New data from Cook County shows it's also a failed experiment. Only problem is, thanks to J.B. Pritzker and the Anti-Police Bill, this program is the law of the land. Since Jan. 1, about two dozen people have been arrested in Cook County while on "essential movement" time. One man was accused of committing an armed robbery. Others were charged with illegal gun possession and drug dealing. Three went on shoplifting sprees, police say. Two others were shot to death. It's time to end this ridiculous provision in this disastrous law. That's why our calls for the repeal of HB 3653. Do you agree? Endorse our plan below! 📊 ILLINOIS FACTS OF THE WEEK A new ranking of governors on their economic policy puts JB Pritzker at 47th in the country. 🙏🏻 STRENGTH IN FAITH CHALLENGE This week, we are praying for Illinois families. As prices for basic necessities like food, fuel, and rent soar across our state, many Illinois families are struggling. These new burdens only add to the pre-existing problems that have driven so many families away from our state: high taxes, rising crime, and rampant political corruption. We want to lift up every Illinois family struggling right now and pray that they may find relief. Join us in prayer. . Team Sullivan | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois | | 111 E Douglas St, Petersburg, IL 62675 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: KAMALA HARRIS ANNOUNCEMENT (via Nancy Pelosi HQ)
subject: Kamala Harris: “Step up”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---

Maggie Hassan

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jennifer=2DRuth=20Green?=
subject: Early voting is OPEN
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE COMMITTEE TO ELECT JENNIFER-RUTH GREEN
body:
Make your plan to vote in Indiana’s May primaries. Read more >> | | | | [ ](https://sagemedia.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd489bad315c61b3e08030170&id=2e73ba202f&e=683c601116)
---
| | | Peter,

Voting in Indiana’s Primary Elections starts TODAY, and I want to make sure that you have a plan to get to the ballot box.

Our Primary date is on May 3rd, but you can vote early in-person at the clerk’s office starting today. They are open Monday — Friday from 8am to 5pm, and on Saturdays from 10am to 6pm. You can also mail in your official ballot if you’re voting by mail at any time.
---
| [ ](https://sagemedia.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd489bad315c61b3e08030170&id=bf152fd1f3&e=683c601116)
---
| [**_CLICK HERE for more information. >>_**](https://sagemedia.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd489bad315c61b3e08030170&id=3c135968b2&e=683c601116)

We have quite the fight ahead of us to defeat Frank Mrvan in November, but I know that I’m the battle-proven Republican who can defeat him and bring commonsense leadership back to Indiana’s 1st District.

**Please make sure that you vote in the primaries, and tell your Hoosier friends, family, and neighbors to do the same!**

Thanks for your vote,
Jennifer-Ruth Green
---

body:
The Left thinks you could fit everything you’d need at work |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.electroddorilas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_s=29e2b0255a0447b88d280c2b71e26c3c&_t=60b_fBfzJh8TQVy1rV3bc6blfQWtVqsFsMmj-1dpIAfAVeinasllxwJWXxvh54igKgMy_bF4-OdT9iZ1i3jhzFaVcTtIen9v5DOnWlxvNgtrm_lFYt7LX5uwVzy9YBrOYOvSSYEXJMJZHK2lLUHG7X7BebGIfntr4p1AdinBkc0%3D).

[](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=29e2b0255a0447b88d280c2b71e26c3c&_e=FrAmngcrvdpYuSK-ee6f5RCREZ37RUgbOjADfdth4U9PgAitRD_hHdUMKaGVi9ro4mZadIHDMVxziZOZrLWFWNrSjen-OTqHBaFr8cAkSqATz1zUY71902KL5Ex0yBSRHJ-TRNeWlQcTbWoX_nneCxzPWatmbfIXBgtpjw3SOUFyN-lVdiheerIom9g5Xh05L1wyGQpx4f61YD5_8IrZPQ1KM7zTr-A5UafncLq0Oov1Q7AcKIKNHZT4UNeSv3YaUv9uNS-SAEX_CVNke0uB2qhjARQCbiOAUTkHlVmcQqYCxg3ygjmHnBhAhBisN3jljhMTSaRpKsdv2jSsgRanG9FbkLDygfRXPEZIKpPWza6g1ra1G4DYu-hAfmV4ghgFDPBkDMavaedao74vdraUyBvXkpO9UJaDtM2BD-c_iy1xJOkSLTqPZ23cNc_T48rZ)

---

Friend,

The Left is losing it.

Progressives in the House have announced that they are planning to publicly urge Biden to ban oil drilling on federal lands . . . and why now? Why would they do this when gas prices are at record highs across America?

Well, I don’t have an answer as to why. But Friend, by my calculation they’ve forgotten one very important variable in their equation: Not everyone in the United States owns a Tesla...

**[We need elected officials that aren’t just out to support one partisan narrative over another, we need elected officials who understand the American people and will act in our best interest. And that includes supporting legislation which will make life easier on the average American, not harder.](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=29e2b0255a0447b88d280c2b71e26c3c&_e=FrAmngcrvdpYuSK-ee6f5RCREZ37RUgbOjADfdth4U9PgAitRD_hHdUMKaGVi9ro4mZadIHDMVxziZOZrLWFWNrSjen-OTqHBaFr8cAkSqATz1zUY71902KL5Ex0yBSRHJ-TRNeWlQcTbWoX_nneCxzPWatmbfIXBgtpjw3SOUFyN-lVdiheerIom9g5Xh05L1wyGQpx4f61YD5_8IrZPQ1KM7zTr-A5UafncLq0OoubPGN_12PCL9rvm91jfAKPp_7IQ_5klRwFZO0TH19Zp06advBL7c_ypWeYCPLyV5l3oOKzUYXpT-FSctrWPU_FEgAfbEL-6E_8_7l88wi30byxDO40Hhe31KIO979zyQSASbeUPqA6TD7O47v3GH-NYCgn0HGB7KLmm1PY4wtGaBQJDY4n4KfgFU8OPY_1cSJwZhH0pr_XUFBdF8k2hJ_5)**

[**Support an America First Candidate >> **](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=29e2b0255a0447b88d280c2b71e26c3c&_e=FrAmngcrvdpYuSK-ee6f5RCREZ37RUgbOjADfdth4U9PgAitRD_hHdUMKaGVi9ro4mZadIHDMVxziZOZrLWFWNrSjen-OTqHBaFr8cAkSqATz1zUY71902KL5Ex0yBSRHJ-TRNeWlQcTbWoX_nneCxzPWatmbfIXBgtpjw3SOUFyN-lVdiheerIom9g5Xh05L1wyGQpx4f61YD5_8IrZPQ1KM7zTr-A5UafncLq0OouIpNujivgNaqFcK6fBpcA_CCuTeAkWqky2g2jkgXpFqnogl1oiK4g74qJnwNQ-Hzr1UpCLr0wv1ol2LrkxihDPptL-jjgesblUCbpchV_9ch_qx9WOJ9khzy1hDjDicLUguvGsdIviIQRTfbfj4VOVw4KS2SulPGEEAWta7udoWhwCcVWERQQ20QtwjsOcSxVy514B-C_csx3AYm8L1wun)
As a first generation American, I have lived the American Dream, but it didn’t come easy. My journey allowed me to understand what it truly means to be an American. I understand what it’s like to live paycheck to paycheck and on the off chance anyone in the secretary of Transportation’s office is reading this: the average American who is living paycheck to paycheck isn’t able to afford a $50,000 Tesla (starting price, of course.)

I’m curious to know if you’re ready to help me give Democrats a dose of reality. If you are, do you think you’d make an investment of $3.50 or more today? My campaign isn’t running on fumes, but we could use some gas.

[**Chip in $3.50 >> **](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=29e2b0255a0447b88d280c2b71e26c3c&_e=FrAmngcrvdpYuSK-ee6f5RCREZ37RUgbOjADfdth4U9PgAitRD_hHdUMKaGVi9ro4mZadIHDMVxziZOZrLWFWNrSjen-OTqHBaFr8cAkSqATz1zUY71902KL5Ex0yBSRHJ-TRNeWlQcTbWoX_nneCxzPWatmbfIXBgtpjw3SOUFyN-lVdiheerIom9g5Xh05L1wyGQpx4f61YD5_8IrZPQ1KM7zTr-A5UafncLq0Oot1xgx5rDrOdrbQohtvsol2B2Wqjs3607YdjZX204KWlxRclMpVqYWLY21aPSXnaXoHtq_sn8WAJF2iPxOyTKXX_MX6YuDKytDUJNXqqb2wwpX0X3yw5vdP3Sq9an5RF2EM1t9EShBHlLV3Shs22fSO0jbtZ8D9ROT0kB41aVjfvN042NwljCk11eBEV8eQrX06ERIP5R9hM0LXf6YzygTf)
**[Please, send in whatever you can spare right now to help me continue to fight the Democrats on this issue. What’s impractical for our working class is impractical for America.](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=29e2b0255a0447b88d280c2b71e26c3c&_e=FrAmngcrvdpYuSK-ee6f5RCREZ37RUgbOjADfdth4U9PgAitRD_hHdUMKaGVi9ro4mZadIHDMVxziZOZrLWFWNrSjen-OTqHBaFr8cAkSqATz1zUY71902KL5Ex0yBSRHJ-TRNeWlQcTbWoX_nneCxzPWatmbfIXBgtpjw3SOUFyN-lVdiheerIom9g5Xh05L1wyGQpx4f61YD5_8IrZPQ1KM7zTr-A5UafncLq0Ootpo2ruoH85A3mxfB_4dMxDUWgP2vs_8qFEo9QnBNFID7FmQmMPoqTHAMnOStzF95d4NXifT-NOKXc9go2OF86oBo1KlnrNQbyEjOOVFYgxTAKCsBWCUXOCEz-JLD3epJnm8tqwfnZMUb4kKZVilDF850vJV8Ae9oVu5XGs1vkL919KBH7WV4vcqSv37jmWqhDJ1S4F3J-VXJxZW0cc_jtu)**

Thank you,
Rod Dorilás

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=29e2b0255a0447b88d280c2b71e26c3c&_e=FrAmngcrvdpYuSK-ee6f5RCREZ37RUgbOjADfdth4U9PgAitRD_hHdUMKaGVi9ro4mZadIHDMVxziZOZrLWFWNrSjen-OTqHBaFr8cAkSqATz1zUY71902KL5Ex0yBSRHJ-TRNeWlQcTbWoX_nneCxzPWatmbfIXBgtpjw3SOUFyN-lVdiheerIom9g5Xh05L1wyGQpx4f61YD5_8IrZPQ1KM7zTr-A5UafncLq0Oosv4yvd-SLCU3opQ3Fof-AZkxyHCJFOlwayGQGyHTeO3wSyU3916YJ44DrisjrhSwgaiSr3wpHUcvk_01NnRqUtaX6kfDQterz7ifxtCcfNGHkz16ATEs5t6eYyyz2fk13ddELXxz7hnKFWllPgVyBN790UEBP6eYUYmJSl4I-Ld9lvtPPHLT-8IV7j7MHWKuqDfwHeMf8YqJB4tFennNGE)
---

---

However, if this is no longer the best way to reach you or you no longer want to receive any more of our emails...

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Major Construction Workers Union Endorsement!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
I’m honored to have received the endorsement of IUOE Local 77, a major union representing skilled equipment operators in the construction industry. Unions have been vital in our efforts to expand the middle class and build an economy that works for everyone. When unions succeed, Maryland succeeds – which is why I will proudly have Labor’s back as Governor.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Endorsement_IUOELocal77_1200x1200.png]
As Comptroller, I’ve stood with our construction workers by advocating for the use of Project Labor Agreements (PLAs), which provide workers with fair wages and conditions, and help ensure projects are built on time and on budget.
Under my gubernatorial administration, I’ll pair a bold expansion of Maryland’s public works with commitments to robust PLAs on every level. I’ll also make critical investments in major infrastructure projects to create new jobs that offer family-supporting wages, affordable healthcare, expanded home ownership, and a better quality of life during retirement.
To our brothers and sisters in IUOE Local 77, I can’t thank you enough for your trust and friendship. Together, we’re going to deliver the concrete results that Maryland workers deserve.
Our people-powered movement continues to gain momentum as we enter the final stretch of this competitive primary race. Thanks to our incredible supporters powering this movement at the grassroots, our campaign has more combined endorsements from current and former elected officials, and labor unions than any other candidate in this race. With your help, we can pull ahead even further in the critical lead up to the primary election.
Will you help spread the word about our latest union endorsement by sharing with your friends on social media?
Click here to view and reshare on Facebook. [https://www.facebook.com/photo/?fbid=547210680104331&set=a.422901372535263]
Click here to view and retweet on Twitter. [https://twitter.com/peterfranchot/status/1511378860935467011/photo/1]
Click here to view and reshare on Instagram. [https://www.instagram.com/p/Cb-dAUJsEqj/]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate

Bowie, MD 20715
United States

subject: National Republicans are plotting their next move
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/pn5GxSzLgrt-pYNYolaRzfstbTJdtIq52rkYggT86Z8=/4JZSdJa65mXDaaFY9uaBOpYZYe4Yd7twOSvWdb-2jjU=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220405-1-EM&amount=25)

| [DEFEND THIS SEAT ](https://act.myngp.com/el/pn5GxSzLgrt-pYNYolaRzfstbTJdtIq52rkYggT86Z8=/4JZSdJa65mXDaaFY9uaBOpYZYe4Yd7twOSvWdb-2jjU=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220405-1-EM&amount=25)
---
Peter,

At a recent GOP retreat, national Republicans brainstormed _**" ideas on starting their own political revolt come November."**_ This kind of plotting underscores precisely what's at stake in this fall's midterm elections.

It is critical we retain our majority in the House. Without it, anti-democratic voices will have outsized influence on our government's decisions.

By holding the House, we can continue delivering results for our constituents. I'm proud of all we've accomplished in Congress - from passing the transformative infrastructure bill to securing crucial investments for our community's future - and I'm committed to working towards more results for my district.

But I can't do it alone. True swing districts like mine are precisely the ones national Republicans see as flippable. I'm no stranger to winning tough elections, though, and I know with your support we'll win again this fall.

[_**Will you consider contributing to our campaign and help me hold my seat?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/pn5GxSzLgrt-pYNYolaRzfstbTJdtIq52rkYggT86Z8=/4JZSdJa65mXDaaFY9uaBOpYZYe4Yd7twOSvWdb-2jjU=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220405-1-EM&amount=25)

---
With gratitude,
Abigail

name: Mike Crispi
subject: CRISPI RECEIVES IMMENSE SUPPORT FROM NJ REPUBLICANS
body:
CRISPI ANNOUNCES AMERICA FIRST LINE TO TAKE ON CORRUPT GOP ESTABLISHMENT

----------

Daniel Francisco has announced he has ended his congressional race and endorsed Mike Crispi for Congress in New Jersey's Fourth District. Francisco is also joining Crispi, and Gary and Steve Rich, on the Monmouth America First line to take on the RINO establishment and fight for America First values.

“Monmouth County Republicans will finally have a real choice when they go to the polls this year,” Crispi said. “Our team of America First Republicans will expose the establishment line for what it is: a clique of failed politicians who routinely put their own interests above those of the people they’re supposed to represent.”

READ MORE HERE ( https://sable.godaddy.com/c/433724?id=355.111.1.197d1d58514af8f47de675aacce6c303 )

|

|

|

( https://sable.godaddy.com/c/433724?id=355.112.1.523cf6e825cb2834c7064574a54dc725 )

|

|

|

CRISPI RECEIVES IMMENSE SUPPORT FROM NJ REPUBLICANS

----------

New Jersey congressional candidate Mike Crispi held his first town hall campaign event on Wednesday, March 23 with massive crowds in attendance and announced the America First line in New Jersey's Fourth Congressional District.

As Crispi told the crowd, “I am so honored by the energy and enthusiasm of this massive crowd in Tom’s River tonight. These patriots love President Trump, love our country, and are fired up now more than ever to take our country back. They are looking for a bold fighter in Washington who will represent their values fearlessly, unafraid and uncompromised. I pledge to be their voice in DC and never let them down!"

READ MORE HERE ( https://sable.godaddy.com/c/433724?id=355.113.1.ecef8c075c4b465e1ebb278f8d4a169d )

|

|

|

( https://sable.godaddy.com/c/433724?id=355.114.1.72266ed5115eefc4b8c6aae8a2bde406 )

|

|

|

BILL SPADEA: CRISPI IS THE CANDIDATE TO TAKE ON SMITH

----------

"In Smith's 4th Congressional District, Mike Crispi is running a highly effective grassroots campaign talking about the issues that have been neglected by both parties over the past several decades," Spadea said. "Empowering parents, supporting small businesses, making sure that politics are taken out of our schools and kids are protected from the agenda to sexualize the grade school curriculum."

Listen to Mike's appearance on Spadea's 101.5 Morning Show HERE ( https://sable.godaddy.com/c/433724?id=355.115.1.4b7c830940390fdb8d0d6b6e4936e832 )

As always, thank you again for tuning in to the Crispi for Congress newsletter and for your generous support of Mike Crispi and of AMERICA FIRST values. Please share, donate, and spread the word!

America needs YOU!

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Pelosi is flooding the airwaves
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
$102 MILLION worth of attack ads...
| [](https://links.wesleyhuntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=40b72c6ff9c941d7bde552511a5a0d6e&_e=VhNHqoAb_cZzh7DHZsb2GQP-_yAmcZFvCknxyk7zOWCaaTBXsZnNw9mSKFU76AFI6HhagZW8TU62o12ItE14hrpGEnAdk5P6c4DJ1u97Kq2GDSsxfDtBRyLSsNuaZrYEQAeTdmQelSadecILn1v6ZOF0YFGJSliJzkbP8C8BGLyGI0B61AIIhLGS_1faNQSI05qTw_Y-xiIi1F-dx01wHraBRzu2naf3HNiJssMEKeKn0zO00sttEejTOaABPoBx4W_6hADMVBRqISsGgQgcbtQLKdpzORNU8Ndr0Qz2ntvu8fqQUg5su97bZ4MBsnPCElUtm5sdozwA4InQCrCxIhIG8Pt_j_1QRlHFi2s9EP8avLgPO3uldeSDpgofZX2NIKjTnmBo2j0AH73s3yx08NXbDQsLepBtSDBY_g4Vm9olnxyr8zkK6yJo_2c1ZSsaSe4FEd4UTDo3C0d-ME-CJbOXda5CiCP0hp7VuF3e0RMMkg33shdFKl3b56ChUCo1QlVbwuzi3pqD2MP_1umvqg%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
Last month, I told you that Nancy Pelosi was sitting on a war chest of over $100 million that she would use to attack us now that we're in the general election. Well, she didn’t waste a minute...
---
_**_Pelosi just spent _$102 MILLION_ on attack ads targeting the 5 key races that will decide the fate of the House majority._**_
---
Now more than ever, I’m counting on your help to fight back against Pelosi’s smear campaign by running ads of our own in this must-win race for Texas’ new seat.
---
But as it stands, I’m still **$31,085** short of my first ad-buy of the general election with the deadline just hours away.
---

clean_body: $102 MILLION worth of attack ads... | Friend, Last month, I told you that Nancy Pelosi was sitting on a war chest of over $100 million that she would use to attack us now that we're in the general election. Well, she didn’t waste a minute... Pelosi just spent $102 MILLION on attack ads targeting the 5 key races that will decide the fate of the House majority. Now more than ever, I’m counting on your help to fight back against Pelosi’s smear campaign by running ads of our own in this must-win race for Texas’ new seat. But as it stands, I’m still $31,085 short of my first ad-buy of the general election with the deadline just hours away. Friend, we can’t allow Pelosi to BUY this race for her hand-picked liberal puppet. If we let this wave of attacks go unanswered, it’s only a matter of time before she doubles down on her ad spend and completely drowns out our America First message. And make no mistake – Pelosi, her DCCC, and her House Majority Super PAC are in no short supply of cash to attack us with. But the most effective way for us to fight back is with ads of our own. name: Rushern Baker & Nancy Navarro
subject: More than we hoped for
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

Friend,
Our fundraising deadlines are real - and when we asked, you all showed up. Nancy and I wanted to reach out to personally THANK you for helping us reach our end-of-quarter goal. Running for the highest office in our blessed state comes with a lot of expenses. To put it simply – we’re succeeding because of the steadfast support of Marylanders like you.
While meeting this important fundraising goal was a victory, it is critical that we don’t allow our current momentum to diminish. We are the most qualified AND the most competitive ticket in this primary. We chose to honor community above politics and it’s working.
If you want to offer continued support, please consider making a donation today. Nancy and I are so grateful for all of you, together we will make history! [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Thank you,
Rushern & Nancy
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

From: **Donald J. Trump**

Peter,

I could not wait a minute longer to send you this email.

While millions of Americans are realizing that Joe Biden and the radical Left have brought our nation to the brink of ruin, I am working day and night to SAVE OUR NATION.

Everything great I've ever done is because of loyal Patriots like YOU, which is why I am pleased to invite you to join my _**[Inner Friend Circle.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60050445:6vudTCoDN:m:1:3317145305:D7D7765245E59E62ED3DCD81A92F0C66:r)**_

The select few in my Inner Friend Circle will be exposed to confidential information _\- information that I trust will not be shared with anyone else -_ and are the ones I will rely on to tell me the TRUTH.

I am only inviting a very small number of Patriots to join. Invitations do not come around often, Peter, so please do not take this lightly.

Congress is holding a hearing this week to investigate soaring gas prices.
But before they do, know this: oil companies are raking in huge profits while sitting on nearly 10,000 unused drilling permits.
By keeping oil prices high on the global market, they’re giving Putin the profits HE needs to sustain the war in Ukraine.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jay=20Block?=
subject: Let’s Limit Government Together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Block for NM](http:// "Paid for by Block for NM")
body:
Conservative values for the win! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mcshanellc/mask-mandates-7074801?e=102b599530)
---
| | [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=a448d2adc3&e=102b599530)
---
| | Peter,
---
| Ranchers in New Mexico are hurting, and they’re hurting bad.

Recently I had the honor of meeting with the hard working New Mexicans who take part in the [Cattlemen’s Livestock Auction](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=2d2e598e93&e=102b599530) in Belen. I spoke on the issue of excessive land grabs by our radical socialist legislature.

We obviously need to change the way individuals are allowed to conduct business, especially when it comes to how and when you choose to manage your own cattle!

Gov. Michelle Lujan Grisham signed an executive order last year that hands over more of our public lands to the state. Anything MLG can get her hands on means fewer options for you!
---
| [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=c5add4ef95&e=102b599530)
---
| With [New Mexico’s unemployment rate outranking every other state in the country](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=b42cf81d35&e=102b599530), ranchers have enough challenges to deal with. Needless and unwarranted land grabs by our elected officials only add fuel to the fire when it comes to properly managing, and protecting, your precious livestock.

As your next Governor, my priority will reside limiting the hold of the government on New Mexico, instead of expanding their control on the premise of conservation efforts.

Together we can uphold the Conservative values of limited government and fight against efforts to increase federal land ownership. Your support of my campaign**with a donation of any amount today** will show the Radical Left Democrats that the land belongs to the people!
---
| [JAY, HERE'S $15 »](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=03f1916ea6&e=102b599530 "JAY, HERE'S $15 »")

\- - - - Forwarded Message - - - -

**From:** **Vice President Kamala Harris**
**Subject:** My tie-breaking vote in the Senate
**Date:** Mon, Mar 28, 2022 at 4:11 PM
---
---
With just three days until the first end-of-quarter deadline of 2022, I hope you’ll give me a moment to explain what’s at stake in this year’s midterms, **and then make a $7 donation to the DNC to help reach their goal by Thursday.**
---
With a 50-50 split in the Senate, I can cast a deciding vote. **But if we lose just _one seat_ , I can’t break the tie, and the Biden-Harris agenda will be at risk.** That’s why we need to protect Democrats in tough races, and fight to elect more Democrats, too. The DNC is at the forefront of this work, and that’s why I’m coming to you today.
---
**If you can, Friend, chip in $7 to the DNC ahead of Thursday’s end-of-quarter deadline. Democrats nationwide will be counting on a strong DNC to maintain and expand our congressional majorities this fall.**
---
---
I won’t sugarcoat it, Friend: Our majorities are incredibly slim, and only a handful of races will determine which party sets the agenda for the next two years. That’s why it’s so important that we support the DNC in building the party infrastructure it’ll take to expand our majorities.
---
**If you’re able, please join me in supporting the DNC with a $7 donation today. Your support is incredibly important.**
---
Thank you for all you do for Democrats and for this country.
---
Kamala
---
Kamala Harris
Vice President of the United States

---

Fellow Conservative, I'm helping lead the fight in Congress to find out how much Joe Biden knew about his son Hunter's corrupt antics!

The American people deserve to know the truth about the most corrupt family to EVER be in the White House.

We need to know what Joe Biden knew about these corrupt payments his son received and who the 'Big Guy' is in all those texts who gets 10%. **Hold Joe Biden Accountable:**

subject: Reminder: Join Doug for a special evening in Baltimore!
body:

This will be a special opportunity to discuss how electing an experienced federal, state, and local prosecutor will make Baltimore safe. If you would like to attend, RSVP by replying to this email or emailing me at: **[tom@ganslerformaryland.com](mailto:tom@ganslerformaryland.com?subject=4/13 Baltimore Event RSVP&body=)**. clean_body: This will be an exciting opportunity to discuss how electing an experienced federal, state, and local prosecutor will make Baltimore safe. | Hi friends, I wanted to make sure you saw this invitation to an exciting upcoming event! On Wednesday, April 13th, Doug will be in Baltimore for an evening reception at the home of his good friends, Paula and Steve Silverman, on Greenspring Valley Road. This will be a special opportunity to discuss how electing an experienced federal, state, and local prosecutor will make Baltimore safe. If you would like to attend, RSVP by replying to this email or emailing me at: mailto:tom@ganslerformaryland.com?subject=4/13 Baltimore Event RSVP&body=. clean_body: | | | | Support Lou Barletta | Did you know Pennsylvania has one of the HIGHEST gas taxes in the country, Peter Willis? Joe Biden’s anti-American policies have caused countless problems and caused record-high gas prices for the citizens of PA. Why are we relying on other countries that hate us for energy? We need American energy and we need Pennsylvania energy! On day one in office, Lou will unleash the energy powerhouse Pennsylvania is meant to be. It’s time to rely on America and on Pennsylvania, not foreign countries! -Team Barletta | | | | To contribute by mail, please make payable to “Lou Barletta for Governor” and mail to: Lou Barletta for Governor PO Box 128 Hazleton, PA 18201 =
