Friend,
Today is Giving Day here in Arizona, and I can't think of a better organizaion to donate our resources and time to than **Planned Parenthood Arizona.** PPAZ is focused on helping all Arizonans gain fair and equal access to sexual and reproductive health rights, education, and medical services.
[**That's why I'm asking our supporters to contribute to Planned Parenthood Arizona today >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43815087/338821322/261619658?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTJiMDliZS0yYmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DVV3GszVWHymiT9yTdmAxQSRSUB9LkgdnrHv0rsuwMo=&emci=a39ca3a2-03b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=992b09be-2bb5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=12898431)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43815088/338821323/261619658?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTJiMDliZS0yYmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DVV3GszVWHymiT9yTdmAxQSRSUB9LkgdnrHv0rsuwMo=&emci=a39ca3a2-03b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=992b09be-2bb5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=12898431)
---
Roe v. Wade is expected to be stricken down this summer, and with far right extremists controlling state legislatures in states like Arizona, the need to protect abortion rights at the federal level has never been greater.
I'm proud to stand with local pro-choice leaders and organizations, like Planned Parenthood Arizona, in the fight to keep reproductive healthcare safe and legal.
**[And since saving Roe v. Wade starts with supporting unapologetically pro-choice candidates, I hope you will consider supporting our campaign, as well.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43815089/338821324/416963966?refcode=X_040522_AZGivingDay&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTJiMDliZS0yYmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DVV3GszVWHymiT9yTdmAxQSRSUB9LkgdnrHv0rsuwMo=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43815090/338821325/416963966?refcode=X_040522_AZGivingDay&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTJiMDliZS0yYmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DVV3GszVWHymiT9yTdmAxQSRSUB9LkgdnrHv0rsuwMo=)

Together we will beat back this appalling attack on our rights.
Thank you,
Kirsten

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: I am a YES on Judge Kentaji Brown Jackson
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE
body:
Earlier this week, I had the honor of sitting down with Judge Kentaji Brown Jackson to discuss her nomination to the Supreme Court.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43808545/338788199/396464211?refcode=em-logo&source=em220405-1-b&refcode2=387eb005-0bb5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=5hhqit9/589ycXWTCKpmTzDOiqUu3IG9wTr+31coHa0V9+m/hYdaxU+eSfie5Hzz&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODdlYjAwNS0wYmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YEqLnDSLxcNqCVuh3ZB8wSxyFyj-yCZ67kJi-_y35tg=)
Friend —
Earlier this week, I had the honor of sitting down with Judge Kentaji Brown Jackson to discuss her nomination to the Supreme Court.
We talked about her experience, and her qualifications, and our meeting confirmed what I already knew to be true:
Judge Jackson is an outstanding choice with the judgment and background necessary to sit on our nation’s highest court. She has always sought to deliver justice fairly, equally, and thoroughly and I look forward to voting YES for her confirmation.
Please let me know that you agree:
[**Add your name if you believe the U.S. Senate must confirm Judge Kentaji Brown Jackson to the United States Supreme Court.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43808546/338788200/-1770922411?source=em220405-1-b&refcode2=387eb005-0bb5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=5hhqit9/589ycXWTCKpmTzDOiqUu3IG9wTr+31coHa0V9+m/hYdaxU+eSfie5Hzz&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODdlYjAwNS0wYmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YEqLnDSLxcNqCVuh3ZB8wSxyFyj-yCZ67kJi-_y35tg=&emci=008a69ff-0ab5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=387eb005-0bb5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2216363)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43808547/338788201/-1770922411?source=em220405-1-b&refcode2=387eb005-0bb5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=5hhqit9/589ycXWTCKpmTzDOiqUu3IG9wTr+31coHa0V9+m/hYdaxU+eSfie5Hzz&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODdlYjAwNS0wYmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YEqLnDSLxcNqCVuh3ZB8wSxyFyj-yCZ67kJi-_y35tg=&emci=008a69ff-0ab5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=387eb005-0bb5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2216363)**
It is, of course, not lost on me or anyone else that Judge Jackson is a historic choice for the position.
She will not only serve as the first Black woman on the court, but also the first public defender.
I am excited for this vote, and I hope you are as well.
Onwards,
Chris

name: Dr. Jason Martin
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/martin-email-oct2021?refcode=fl_email_na_20211003thankyou_JM_all_xx_hdr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/martin-email-oct2021?refcode=fl_email_na_20211003thankyou_JM_all_xx_hdr]
Hey Peter.
This is just a quick note to say THANK YOU for supporting our campaign and helping us reach our goal before the end of the quarter.
At every step of the way, I’ve been genuinely humbled by the outpouring of support from so many Tennesseans who are fed up with the lies and division plaguing our politics.
Because of supporters like you, we’re in a good position to go up against Bill Lee this November. We won’t let up now — we can’t, because the lives of so many Tennesseans depend on it — but I’m proud to have you on our team as we buckle up for the next 7 months.
Together, we’ll reclaim what is ours and bring dignity, compassion, and honesty back to the governorship. Together, Tennessee thrives.
Thanks again,
Dr. Jason Martin

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Sen. Chuck Grassley + what's happening in Oklahoma, Arizona, Texas ...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
I will fight for our right to choose as the next U.S. senator for Iowa.
| | |
---
Peter,
Oklahoma just passed a total abortion ban, and it's looking likely the governor will sign the legislation into law. It's appalling, dangerous and irresponsible. To those across our country, particularly in Oklahoma and Texas, I want you to know I am with you. I fought for our right to choose in the statehouse in Iowa and in Congress, and I will do the same as the next U.S. senator for Iowa.
**I also want you to know I am more resolved than ever to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley here in Iowa – because he is an advocate of the right-wing abortion bans sweeping across the country.**** [(You can click here to pitch in a donation to help me defeat Sen. Grassley.)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43815437/338822797/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk908-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTdlNDAyNC0yZGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8NYW8Il4vHzNMuCEi8f0bE0458FS_pqr9CPr5CXYZJM=)**
You see, Sen. Grassley has tried to overturn Roe v. Wade and erode reproductive justice throughout his entire career. When he first entered the Senate, nearly 40 years ago now, he voted in favor of a constitutional amendment to overturn Roe. He's voted for abortion bans over and over again. He's voted to strip funding from Planned Parenthood, and with it, critical health care services for millions of people.
**But Sen. Grassley's crowning achievements? Supreme Court Justices Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh****,** who together with three of the Court's other conservative justices are looking likely to roll back the precedent of Roe v. Wade altogether in an upcoming Supreme Court case, clearing the way for bans like those in Oklahoma and Texas to stand.
As the then-chairman of the Senate Judiciary Committee, Sen. Grassley was instrumental in blocking Senate consideration of President Obama's Supreme Court nominee, Merrick Garland, and then ramming through Trump-appointed nominees who pose a direct threat to the future of reproductive rights. Now, Sen. Grassley is on the precipice of seeing his lifelong wish realized: Roe v. Wade being overturned.
**We can do something about it. We can defeat Sen. Grassley, elect a pro-choice woman to the Senate and expand Democrats' majority so that we can pass legislation that codifies Roe v. Wade into law.**
**To win, and to protect the future of reproductive rights, I need your help, Peter.[So please, from the bottom of my heart, I'm asking you to chip in a donation of $5 or whatever you can spare to help me defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley. In times like these, we've got to band together and fight with everything we've got. I'm not giving up, but I can't win without strong grassroots support from people like you. Please, donate whatever you can now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43815438/338822798/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk908-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTdlNDAyNC0yZGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8NYW8Il4vHzNMuCEi8f0bE0458FS_pqr9CPr5CXYZJM=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43815439/338822799/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk908-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTdlNDAyNC0yZGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8NYW8Il4vHzNMuCEi8f0bE0458FS_pqr9CPr5CXYZJM=)
---
With so much gratitude for everything you do,

Abby

Now, Sen. Grassley is on the precipice of seeing his lifelong wish realized: Roe v. Wade being overturned. We can do something about it. We can defeat Sen. Grassley, elect a pro-choice woman to the Senate and expand Democrats' majority so that we can pass legislation that codifies Roe v. Wade into law. To win, and to protect the future of reproductive rights, I need your help, Peter.= | | = With so much gratitude for everything you do, Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States |

name: John Fetterman
subject: Seriously, dude?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This whole ad is full of gross misrepresentations, especially the fact that they found a rare photo of me wearing a suit.
#
Derek,
As Democrats, we all know that Republicans *love* to smear Democrats as scary bogeyman “socialists.”
**Well, uh, today we found out that Connor Lamb’s super PAC is spending nearly <checks notes> half a MILLION dollars in dark money on TV attack ads to do JUST THAT to me.**
[**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46324?refcode=em20220405-5265&t=1&akid=5265%2E434096%2Eeqo4zA)
_The whole ad is full of gross misrepresentations, especially the fact that they found a rare photo of me wearing a suit_ 🙄
This is a *big* deal, Derek. It’s the FIRST time that a fellow Democrat has weaponized paid media to attack me during this primary. I mean, come on my dude.
Call me crazy, but I don't believe that Democrats should be doing the GOP’s job for them — _and certainly not with stone-cold attack lines straight outta the Republicans 101 textbook._ 🤔
**[If you believe the same thing I do, can you please rush $5 now to help me respond to this baseless attack? We gotta raise as much money as possible TODAY to show Conor Lamb + his super PAC that these dumb attacks are going to backfire.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46324?refcode=em20220405-5265&t=2&akid=5265%2E434096%2Eeqo4zA)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46324?refcode=em20220405-5265&amounts=5&t=21&akid=5265%2E434096%2Eeqo4zA)**
Derek, I truly can’t think of a greater contrast to these super PAC attack ads than our people-powered campaign.
I mean, Conor Lamb’s super PAC is *literally* run by D.C. insiders with deep ties to corporate interests + funded by mega-rich donors writing enormous checks.
Meanwhile, just this morning, we announced raising $3.1 MILLION in Q1 with an average contribution of like $28 and over 23,000 new donors. Plus, unlike Conor Lamb’s campaign, we are up on the airwaves (TV + digital) getting our own *positive* message across.
Let me be clear: **Conor Lamb’s super PAC ad is one last desperate attempt to save a campaign that’s stuck at 10% as of the last poll.**
It won’t work — especially if we can raise a lot of money today online to make it clear these kinds of attacks on fellow Democrats are B.S. and will backfire. Every dollar they spend ($440k as of this morning), we’ll try to raise twice as much to show them what we’re made of.
It’s not an exaggeration to say our campaign would be nowhere without the determination, strength, and love from all of YOU. We’re running this race the right way, and we know we can win with your continued support.
**[Are you with me on that? Then donate $5 now to help us fend off these phony attacks from Conor Lamb’s super PAC and show that they only make us stronger heading into the general election.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/46324?refcode=em20220405-5265&t=22&akid=5265%2E434096%2Eeqo4zA)**
Before I sign off, I have to tell you how grateful I am.
It’s only because of this community, and because of the deep support we have in every corner of Pennsylvania, that we can brush off these attacks and live to fight another day in the General. Me + Gisele + the whole team are deeply appreciative of all your support, whether it’s been financial, volunteer help, or spreading the word about our campaign. It means the world. 😭
Thank you, again, for having my back. Let’s WIN this together.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220405-5265-footer&t=23&refcode2=5265_434096_eqo4zA&akid=5265%2E434096%2Eeqo4zA)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=5265%2E434096%2Eeqo4zA)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=5265%2E434096%2Eeqo4zA)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Peter,

When I announced my campaign to be Virginia's next Lieutenant Governor, every political "expert" and the liberal media already proclaimed Virginia as the next California or New York. Democrats thought victory was all but guaranteed.

This Marine Corps Veteran had other plans.

We launched an aggressive statewide campaign speaking to the issues Virginia voters actually care about. We championed parental choice in education, economic growth, socially Conservative values and in the process won back suburban moms and expanded our base into minority communities.

Our victory in Virginia laid out the blueprint for taking back Democrat-controlled states and putting an immediate halt to the woke, Leftist agenda. But our fight has only just started.

The Left is already raising millions to take back everything they lost in the last election. We can’t let Trump and his national network of election conspiracy theorists gain the upper hand in this battle for democracy. Donate now and support Jocelyn today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=040522]

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Benson
Date: Monday, April 4, 2022 at 6:32 PM
Subject: Trump's top target
To: Our friend
Friend,

This past Saturday, Trump came to Michigan and rallied his army of supporters for another assault on our democracy. We’re not going to repeat all of his unhinged lunacy, but the goal was clear: unseat Jocelyn and put Trump loyalists in charge of our elections.
There’s a reason why Trump came to Michigan. He admitted it himself. His campaign against American democracy depends on taking over our elections and tapping into Michigan’s growing network of Big Lie extremists. So now we need to choose, friend: will Saturday’s rally be the beginning of the end of democracy in Michigan, or will we rise up to defend our elections for generations to come?

With Jocelyn’s leadership, the answer to that question is clear: We’re going to defend our elections for generations to come. You can start by supporting Jocelyn’s re-election campaign today. Let’s show Trump that democracy is alive and well in Michigan.

body:
| | |
---

**[We must take action to secure our right to vote. Sign our MASSIVE Democratic petition to stand with President Obama and help protect voting rights >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/3285?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220405-UrgentAlert-SCOTUSVotingAlarm-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220405-UrgentAlert-SCOTUSVotingAlarm-ETG-sl1&akid=3677%2E9716520%2EBRhUoc)**

---

Team, **this is urgent -- our right to vote is on the line.**

Experts are warning that a new Supreme Court ruling in Wisconsin could signal "the death knell for what's left of the Voting Rights Act."

If we don't act, we could lose one of our ONLY remaining tools to protect against racial discrimination in voting. **President Obama recently sounded the alarm AGAIN and called for Democrats to stand up, but we still haven't heard from you!**

Our emergency petition to answer President Obama's call and protect voting rights is currently NOT on track to hit our 50,000 signature goal, and the deadline is MIDNIGHT.

**[Please stand with President Obama and protect our sacred right to vote. Add your name now >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/3285?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220405-UrgentAlert-SCOTUSVotingAlarm-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220405-UrgentAlert-SCOTUSVotingAlarm-ETG-sl1&akid=3677%2E9716520%2EBRhUoc)**

| [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/3285?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220405-UrgentAlert-SCOTUSVotingAlarm-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220405-UrgentAlert-SCOTUSVotingAlarm-ETG-sl1&akid=3677%2E9716520%2EBRhUoc)
---

Team DSCC

WASHINGTON, DC — The COVID-19 vaccine is the only vaccine — out of all the required vaccines — Bergman filed an amicus brief in favor of exemptions. [The brief](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43809258/338791523/-1154506890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWY1M2MyMi0wZmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F6ZgxWl78SF6UEjkyf8yKkBgabVjn_gYC3sqMtVEgOk=&emci=4f525015-0ab5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f9f53c22-0fb5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15167427) singles out no other vaccine, suggesting Bergman doesn't support the most proven measure to combat COVID-19. [The Supreme Court disagreed with Bergman](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43809259/338791524/-2119491498?pwapi_token=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..WGkxtGFZ5HL5YvQSqcnluyJ3l6FtB_rn-JSZEVy2le8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWY1M2MyMi0wZmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F6ZgxWl78SF6UEjkyf8yKkBgabVjn_gYC3sqMtVEgOk=&emci=4f525015-0ab5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f9f53c22-0fb5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15167427), as do I. Mandatory military vaccinations started in 1777 when George Washington ordered that the Continental Army be inoculated against smallpox, without which the British may have won the war. The Department of Defense administers 17 vaccinations and they [have outlined](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43809260/338791525/-906659305?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWY1M2MyMi0wZmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F6ZgxWl78SF6UEjkyf8yKkBgabVjn_gYC3sqMtVEgOk=&emci=4f525015-0ab5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f9f53c22-0fb5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15167427) accepted temporary and permanent exemptions as command decisions. Administrative
* Planned separation or retirement within 180 days, provided the following conditions are met:
* Service member is not assigned, deployed or scheduled to perform duties in an area where specific immunization is indicated
* The commander has not directed immunization because of overriding mission requirements
* Religious:
* Granted according to Service-specific policies
* Command decisions may be made with medical, judge advocate and/or chaplain consultation

**It's "a dereliction of duty" to allow unvaccinated servicemembers to endanger the lives of their peers. -Admiral Lescher, Vice Chief of Naval Operations** "The President of the United States, not any federal judge, is the Commander in Chief of the Armed Forces" and there is "no basis in this case for employing the judicial power in a manner that military commanders believe would impair the military of the United States as it defends the American people." It is bothersome that our Congressman, a retired Lt. General of the Marines, disagrees with this. It's dangerous for bureaucrats in Washington, lawyers, and judges to tell our military what is needed to defend our Nation. I support our military, and I support the chain of command. I support COVID vaccines. We must continue to protect our soldiers with scientifically proven health measures.

I'm confident I can be an influential member of Congress for the First District and guide us on a national and worldwide stage under the ideals and principles of what it means to be a proud American. subject: Ed Thelander Remarks on Opening of Maine GOP Multi-Cultural Center
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by The Committee to Elect Ed Thelander for Congress, Inc
body:
The message is simple – If you love America, if you are looking for help pursuing your American Dream, come on in! We are open for business! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4b926d70a9d5/a-strong-finish-to-8873058?e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
| | [ ](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=fb47dd0353&e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
|
---
| |
---
“L-R, Yasin Hamady, AKA General Joe Gomez, Ed Thelander, Paul LePage, Nahla Alsafar, Omar Mahdi, and Suheir Alaskari at the opening of the Maine GOP Multi-Cultural Center at 100 Congress Street in Portland, Maine”
|
---
|
> | | |
> ---
> * * *
> * * *
> **Remarks on the Opening of the Maine GOP Multi-Cultural Center**
>
> Good morning, I am Ed Thelander, District One US Congressional candidate. It is an honor to be a part of the opening of the Multi-Cultural Center. I had the opportunity to be at the opening of a center in Laredo, Texas, when I went to visit the border back in September. We are opening these centers around the country so we can bring immigrants, both new and old, into the fold. We as Republicans want these new Americans to live among us, and contribute to this great nation, alongside us.
>
> We as conservatives often speak very directly and get out the “grunt” of what we want to say without ever getting the full thought out. When we have done this, it has chased people away from our party. Most immigrants have conservative values: faith, family, freedom and knowledge that hard work will get you ahead. This center is our opportunity to communicate that full thought and to help position immigrants for success.
>
> The truth is we need more good Americans in America. They just need to come through the door, like we ask. Our immigration system brings us wonderful people like my brother Yasin Hamady, AKA General Joe Gomez, our interpreter from Afghanistan. Like Suheir and Aqeel, who came to us from Baghdad, Iraq. Like my mom, who immigrated from Montreal, Canada. Like my wife of 26 years, Liliana, who immigrated from Caracas, Venezuela.
>
> These are individuals who came here seeking the American Dream, that have been contributing greatly while doing so.
>
> The opening of the Maine GOP Multi-Cultural Center will provide a chance for everyone to weave into the fabric that makes America great.
>
> Progressives always look to make people dependent on government. The American Dream is not welfare.
>
> We as Republicans want people to make it on their own and be independent. Yes, we will help the people that come here with that immigrant drive to succeed.
>
> I am proud to be an American, just as I am equally proud of the people who come here to pursue a better life, to become citizens of America, and to take their oath to uphold the Constitution and the laws of our land. If you haven’t been to a naturalization ceremony, you should. It will reinforce your pride in the country.
>
> The message is simple – If you love America, if you are looking for help pursuing your American Dream, come on in! We are open for business, and ready to help you open your business, or find your perfect job, or get a better education, or learn the English language. Come on in to 100 Congress Street!
>
> As our mission succeeds, it’s clear we’re going to need a bigger office!
>
> Thank you.”
> ###

body:
I've decided to run for reelection in 2022. The Republican Primary is on May 3rd and we're asking for you to personally endorse my campaign before Ele It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6ecb9d202d2d47c2bfca7ef5cba6dcd1&_e=T8COyekvs_jt1-2T8rZrqpe6hvt7Fb0CDKHnSRk_GXfNDuws0pCSuUBS1YNAkLKkjYt_59FV5CahGJdOURHwonJIyhMQ0zvpRoG_OUU_0DPejDbE8xSmxa-wRRN4xDaJRt1W3Lh3Mxjw19ENIcFszbfv6kmisyGcrxTYHY6pRkTZUFpBOwCvstKk5PT_X2rYAvpXvO8CWicNjJVgdQx6voJvE-5-RmEvtu1jMqgU9V7gabWBMNopPvEX2W_wqCJ_GKwnSwIrnQf7tKRaFNkNvitJdoG2kYpn-N-TjsbvdV9JNdr6b-_MELK7bHC8VDJNnnMrptsvIj86Rol8bok33zhKyyGf8BNf-s1KSEd4-Na0K8lcmwjZfkMx5EiXqFkz7J9clhSv8JsB0U7o01_zdo_g1bauuIb_Nl53UgHj54COF9zojd6xGfCXsqLfHYS6ypYrfUqmddsKfrmJ-xftoUPhFchsF2r7PYWhP-muEmX-gIVEtyBIOO2_AOjXoBCTUpKaJMrUh2b4HxUEKVaDUcXYxj6s3DCARc-IWYs4MNs%3D)

Peter,

I’ve been fighting for you and for the truth since I first was elected to Congress in November 2006. Since then, the voters of Ohio’s 4th Congressional District have continued to put their faith in me and have sent me back for two-year stints ever since.

I have never - and will never - take a single vote for granted. I will continue to work hard for every single vote; I’ve watched a lot of people lose their jobs because they forget who they report to; the American people.

**I will never take the position I currently hold for granted**.

For as long as the folks I represent continue putting their faith in me, **I’ll keep fighting every single day to make America a better version of itself.**

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6ecb9d202d2d47c2bfca7ef5cba6dcd1&_e=T8COyekvs_jt1-2T8rZrqpe6hvt7Fb0CDKHnSRk_GXfNDuws0pCSuUBS1YNAkLKkjYt_59FV5CahGJdOURHwonJIyhMQ0zvpRoG_OUU_0DPejDbE8xSmxa-wRRN4xDaJRt1W3Lh3Mxjw19ENIcFszbfv6kmisyGcrxTYHY6pRkTZUFpBOwCvstKk5PT_X2rYAvpXvO8CWicNjJVgdQx6voJvE-5-RmEvtu1jMqgU9V7gabWBMNopPvEX2W_wqCJ_GKwnSwIrnQf7tKRaFNkNvitJdoG2kYpn-N-TjsbvdV9JNdr6b-_MELK7bHC8VDJNnnMrptsvIj86Rol8bok33xpy419dT7w3pIn8NOXy9tTcbWa5YlRadEVRJ0Kn5jP4vxLXRB1Bu6MS6GKHijnRBCVkGr5Wwp9kT2S7xnc_6DYLndl6dVrkYZo0j8hULvZ8eqa8c1ohZao4MQrFdRDsVg4FDRTb3Qz5a4J9HFXPxeUcWuu9DEhCNUbnLVm4AmskqefqkdlSmjDVIAvZVsl7go1TOhiCeECAt1T14Ne8x8A%3D)
I’ll work to hold the mainstream media accountable.
I’ll work to make sure you have all of the information YOU need when you go vote.

I’ll work to make sure Democrats in positions of power are held accountable for their lies to the American people; NO Representative should be out for personal gain when serving the American people in an ELECTED office.

But first, I have to win reelection. **[My primary on May 3rd is fast approaching and today I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll endorse me for re-election](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6ecb9d202d2d47c2bfca7ef5cba6dcd1&_e=T8COyekvs_jt1-2T8rZrqpe6hvt7Fb0CDKHnSRk_GXfNDuws0pCSuUBS1YNAkLKkjYt_59FV5CahGJdOURHwonJIyhMQ0zvpRoG_OUU_0DPejDbE8xSmxa-wRRN4xDaJRt1W3Lh3Mxjw19ENIcFszbfv6kmisyGcrxTYHY6pRkTZUFpBOwCvstKk5PT_X2rYAvpXvO8CWicNjJVgdQx6voJvE-5-RmEvtu1jMqgU9V7gabWBMNopPvEX2W_wqCJ_GKwnSwIrnQf7tKRaFNkNvitJdoG2kYpn-N-TjsbvdV9JNdr6b-_MELK7bHC8VDJNnnMrptsvIj86Rol8bok338YhdXsoG7C2Wv4luXdSc6TdywighWyZYRpbhiVTOCksXdGZz1GGnRqKTi9x7ETS2WBancgEz_GVW7H1QwciqWLeNtUTC6cZerFtM_oV18fkg5dE3b4d-MlKkX6jxTyGobdYjLkd-LAOQFNI0-ExPTfdSxMhMBqh4GZ_nT9JVNd7JYxhkLx0slCkIFBMoXRDmfP_O6hXnpVjjr6xoMD5o3I%3D)**.

I’ll only be able to continue fighting on your behalf for as long as I’m in Congress, **[which is why I’m asking for your support today.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6ecb9d202d2d47c2bfca7ef5cba6dcd1&_e=T8COyekvs_jt1-2T8rZrqpe6hvt7Fb0CDKHnSRk_GXfNDuws0pCSuUBS1YNAkLKkjYt_59FV5CahGJdOURHwonJIyhMQ0zvpRoG_OUU_0DPejDbE8xSmxa-wRRN4xDaJRt1W3Lh3Mxjw19ENIcFszbfv6kmisyGcrxTYHY6pRkTZUFpBOwCvstKk5PT_X2rYAvpXvO8CWicNjJVgdQx6voJvE-5-RmEvtu1jMqgU9V7gabWBMNopPvEX2W_wqCJ_GKwnSwIrnQf7tKRaFNkNvitJdoG2kYpn-N-TjsbvdV9JNdr6b-_MELK7bHC8VDJNnnMrptsvIj86Rol8bok3368R_CsBtIq2fY1N4t3IuI8B7WySDAcQlltfg84_FyKxIfdpFPQe58Pzd4TdPrervK_2pzBCqzj8eGKFTwDmZ7a8LaK4H9HbNnIHoaAsKvoEU0hyRNznkKJpbgIpO8kOIqmi0bRcY8EI6_gq3jguZsI58YA4JEAZzW3ci4ZynbXmYYCXpft37DOra3L3wxB431rMI6f05m7s4V6J82auC1Y%3D)** It’s imperative we have strong conservative voices who are willing to speak up for the truth. I assure you that I’m worthy of your support and **[I hope you’ll offer your endorsement of my candidacy today](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6ecb9d202d2d47c2bfca7ef5cba6dcd1&_e=T8COyekvs_jt1-2T8rZrqpe6hvt7Fb0CDKHnSRk_GXfNDuws0pCSuUBS1YNAkLKkjYt_59FV5CahGJdOURHwonJIyhMQ0zvpRoG_OUU_0DPejDbE8xSmxa-wRRN4xDaJRt1W3Lh3Mxjw19ENIcFszbfv6kmisyGcrxTYHY6pRkTZUFpBOwCvstKk5PT_X2rYAvpXvO8CWicNjJVgdQx6voJvE-5-RmEvtu1jMqgU9V7gabWBMNopPvEX2W_wqCJ_GKwnSwIrnQf7tKRaFNkNvitJdoG2kYpn-N-TjsbvdV9JNdr6b-_MELK7bHC8VDJNnnMrptsvIj86Rol8bok33y6YvrXQxr2BAUOudzwcwj2sspElGYcIUBzCT2flleXWmp_zau9KMgK1iTBmdzpQolvPric1N6ml8nPj1P4gY3oA7i-OLYWxk-xyY1fqBeoMuqpadppN-C2aUjtvUVZP2E0V3ByMuK-K6pBzNkz59Ux6fJz1pnSlpQCID1O_EP9GkkcCE6DP-sagx9_K8Z8CZOTypmOgh1w4yyxmDnmWgU0%3D)**.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6ecb9d202d2d47c2bfca7ef5cba6dcd1&_e=T8COyekvs_jt1-2T8rZrqpe6hvt7Fb0CDKHnSRk_GXfNDuws0pCSuUBS1YNAkLKkjYt_59FV5CahGJdOURHwonJIyhMQ0zvpRoG_OUU_0DPejDbE8xSmxa-wRRN4xDaJRt1W3Lh3Mxjw19ENIcFszbfv6kmisyGcrxTYHY6pRkTZUFpBOwCvstKk5PT_X2rYAvpXvO8CWicNjJVgdQx6voJvE-5-RmEvtu1jMqgU9V7gabWBMNopPvEX2W_wqCJ_GKwnSwIrnQf7tKRaFNkNvitJdoG2kYpn-N-TjsbvdV9JNdr6b-_MELK7bHC8VDJNnnMrptsvIj86Rol8bok33zBLfgUFEgiGygWEMNiYoyyKbWlnYHSuJ6vAl1fZf5xD6DqmeCMwg_YvXq6VeEypJagymFFIP6NEP6iIG4cxZTfO86_ojC3JkR4TGjnimtuR7oGMkyLXmEGSENLZKV3Zdh53H1E8tNtbLt77uZXq-oARjyud5ecgCA_A4ZFJUVNpdSRTIC2iqCszgN8bq6_B3eK2U88dIufU-DTsDvPTeIg%3D)
We’ve got so much work to do in the remaining three years Joe Biden has in the White House.

Biden and his people have no idea what they’re doing and it’s going to take a herculean effort on the part of House Republicans to keep them from ruining our country; to keep Big Tech and big media from colluding to keep the truth about this White House -- and the people at the helm – from the**American people**.

I hope if you’re still reading this email, you’ll **[take a moment to offer your personal endorsement of my campaign](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6ecb9d202d2d47c2bfca7ef5cba6dcd1&_e=T8COyekvs_jt1-2T8rZrqpe6hvt7Fb0CDKHnSRk_GXfNDuws0pCSuUBS1YNAkLKkjYt_59FV5CahGJdOURHwonJIyhMQ0zvpRoG_OUU_0DPejDbE8xSmxa-wRRN4xDaJRt1W3Lh3Mxjw19ENIcFszbfv6kmisyGcrxTYHY6pRkTZUFpBOwCvstKk5PT_X2rYAvpXvO8CWicNjJVgdQx6voJvE-5-RmEvtu1jMqgU9V7gabWBMNopPvEX2W_wqCJ_GKwnSwIrnQf7tKRaFNkNvitJdoG2kYpn-N-TjsbvdV9JNdr6b-_MELK7bHC8VDJNnnMrptsvIj86Rol8bok333RrhNSxNo-B8kA4dUHojnMlmSmx2LD80x_USF5hx6sdK7tz6CqgpRI9qONOrdc9U3BmnO0U809hjFHMnZMbENxP_Cx0rFJAtWh5TAFb-nEd0HQFZjs8ULyLt-8j_UbTpfwa3YDsviW_i4xMdnmwRchhodVC-U_Hkd_6XAx9LCBrqMcYTShN8JGel8y5xKLTXfRVNiGxvMseO7-2ZL94OPE%3D)**.

Thank you so much,
Jim Jordan

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lori=20Chavez=2DDeRemer?=
subject: Get politics OUT of the classroom
body:
Our children and parents deserve better

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/a604a5a4c351/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-7042413?e=c87c5d8d97)
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-5-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast45

Friend,

Two years ago, we failed our children when schools were shut down during the pandemic; we can’t let that happen again.

The Radical Left has a political agenda when it comes to education; they want to influence how and what our children are taught and leave parents voiceless.

Our children deserve better and our parents deserve to have choices in their child's education.

When I’m in office, I WILL support a parental bill of rights so our children can get the education they deserve. Chip in $10, $25, or even $50 today to STAND UP for the parents of Oregon.>>> (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-5-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast45)

https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-5-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast45?amount=100
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-5-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast45?amount=50
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-5-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast45?amount=25
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-5-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast45?amount=10

With your help, together we can FIGHT to get political agendas OUT of the classroom.

Let’s give our children the education and future they deserve; can I count on you?>>> (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-5-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast45)

https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-5-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast45

Thank you,

Lori Chavez-DeRemer
Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress

https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-4-5-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast45

A lot of candidates talk about going to bat for workers, our environment, seniors, and families. Derek is proud that the organizations dedicated to these issues trust him to fight for progress in Congress every day.

Together, our grassroots movement has worked hard toward building a democracy that works for the people. **Now, it 's time to use our voices and vote for what we believe in.**

body:

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43816333/338827267/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmI5OTgxZC0zNGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_0CCc0SUEv4btql_13eZCj1PevqdVBLds9YPWDGvvUw=&emci=39ea69ac-1cb5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=5fb9981d-34b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
The United States has reportedly offered to help President Zelensky evacuate from Ukraine. He's declined, telling officials: "I need ammunition, not a ride."
But it’s not just President Zelensky. Across the entire country, everyday Ukrainians are standing up to fight against Russia’s unjustified and unprovoked aggression in whatever way they can. Even outsiders are coming to their aid.
Can you imagine Donald Trump – or almost any of his sycophants – doing anything remotely similar? They waged war on democracy and stretched the bounds of decency for four years. And they are still at it.
**My opponent Chuck Grassley can’t even muster the courage to stand up to ‘President Bone Spurs.’ I doubt he’d be out there stopping Russian tanks.**
When I defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue this November, I will be the most senior military person ever-elected to the United States Senate. You can be sure I will defend our democracy against its enemies... both foreign and domestic. The defense of our democracy is my job #1.
The polls show we can win. Chuck Grassley’s approval rating is the lowest it’s ever been. But McConnell is raising millions into Super PACs to attack me and try to turn the Senate red. The only way to fight back is with help from grassroots donors like you.
**We need to raise another $50,000 before our deadline at midnight, and right now we’re still falling short. I’m not taking a dime from corporate PACs, so I have nowhere else to turn:**

clean_body: Hello, The United States has reportedly offered to help President Zelensky evacuate from Ukraine. He's declined, telling officials: "I need ammunition, not a ride." But it’s not just President Zelensky. Across the entire country, everyday Ukrainians are standing up to fight against Russia’s unjustified and unprovoked aggression in whatever way they can. Even outsiders are coming to their aid. Can you imagine Donald Trump – or almost any of his sycophants – doing anything remotely similar? They waged war on democracy and stretched the bounds of decency for four years. And they are still at it. My opponent Chuck Grassley can’t even muster the courage to stand up to ‘President Bone Spurs.’ I doubt he’d be out there stopping Russian tanks. When I defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue this November, I will be the most senior military person ever-elected to the United States Senate. You can be sure I will defend our democracy against its enemies... both foreign and domestic. The defense of our democracy is my job #1. The polls show we can win. Chuck Grassley’s approval rating is the lowest it’s ever been. But McConnell is raising millions into Super PACs to attack me and try to turn the Senate red. The only way to fight back is with help from grassroots donors like you. We need to raise another $50,000 before our deadline at midnight, and right now we’re still falling short. I’m not taking a dime from corporate PACs, so I have nowhere else to turn: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We can turn Iowa blue in ‘22. But I need your help now if we’re going to do it. Thank you so much for being a part of this campaign, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Don’t let this classic disappear forever
body:
You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zdc71i4gg5d5l1vvmu72tmusgfefr80shbfun74g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shie9or2cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqct9hmcp7acdkmgprcd9m6kpr2sjk66pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sj6mdhr6cr4scrj9p5lesq64c5kc1q35c3h6lgm6sjimhg73c5nmhrb1phlcmrrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup32pjgmiqj9ptie9j30s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zgjmraltut39pqlf829tunbitmj8s6odm75gmjjg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shie9or2cph2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story. Even if you haven’t read the book, you know the name. It’s _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ by Mark Twain. **Unfortunately, political correctness has taken this literary classic out of the hands of far too many young Americans.** But here at Hillsdale College, we’re working to safeguard the legacy of this treasured classic, along with the legacy of the man regarded by many as **America’s greatest author.**
---
| | [**That is why I want to offer you a special DVD box set of our fascinating and important online course, “****Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories****.** ”](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z0mdr74e2335o5oibtfuppfrflve537p1ljluok0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shie9or2cph2bs) Twain’s realist fiction reveals timeless truths about human nature. And while American life has certainly changed since the 1800s, human nature has not. So these literary works are as relevant and as important as ever. Now, we have created a special DVD version of our course that includes all nine lectures. And today, [**I’d like to send you this DVD box set as our way of thanking you for supporting our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zb8bchdaf50j2g8fkcg76c873peuqog1q8uqdvu8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shie9or2cph2bs).
---
| [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zts03i1n6ko1iakjckocum5jbjouinm0hrrhi1hg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shie9or2cph2bs)
---
| | Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone (or removed from your local library!). You can use this secure link to get your copy of **“Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer, Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories”** on DVD: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zlvg7eegkhl0o9ge3b42o2dclc5hrhden9t9klp0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shie9or2cph2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College P.S. Another great author, Ernest Hemingway, once said, “All modern American literature comes from one book by Mark Twain called _Huckleberry Finn._ ” Don’t let this classic disappear forever. Get your DVD box set of **“Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories”** right now when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more at this secure link: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain****.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z2kfdjplbuj4cucog3f3pcri1tocoihqi1elu2ho_rp22sh2s8i66ob4shie9or2cph2bs)

name: Kadida Kenner

body:
Thank you for being there for us.
Thank you for being there for us.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43810407/338797383/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220405EOQTY_EOQ_KK_90DO_4_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBhMGZlNTQwLTE0YjUtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=C8swbgMEzhj7JPfGxKcEQXbuuXNExHdYdGfGR9QM5p4=)
Fellow activist,

I am writing today to thank you. Thank you for being a part of our movement in expanding the electorate, and empowering new voters to show up to the polls in Pennsylvania, twice a year.

We have witnessed how underrepresented and often-neglected communities of color and immigrant communities have been denied their fundamental right to vote. When our democracy and our voting rights are under a sustained attack, our work is more vital than ever. No matter the challenges, we must engage and empower newly registered voters if we are to protect free and fair elections.

It takes a lot of work, a lot of time, and a lot of effort on all of our parts. Thank you for being there for us.

In solidarity,

Kadida Kenner

[**P.S. Again, thank you for everything, but if you are able, would you take one more action and give $5 to keep our momentum going? We have our work cut out for us with the May primary mere weeks away.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43810408/338797384/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220405EOQTY_EOQ_KK_90DO_4_G_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBhMGZlNTQwLTE0YjUtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=C8swbgMEzhj7JPfGxKcEQXbuuXNExHdYdGfGR9QM5p4=)

body:
Our movement had a great time at the Trump Rally Saturday | | | [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=64ba5aff7b&e=fe4b890356)
---
|
**Garrett here -**

I just wanted to give a shoutout to our AMAZING volunteer team who have been hammering down 🔨 the past few weeks knocking doors and engaging new voters.

Carol in Macomb and Julie in Muskegon are two rockstar volunteers leading the way in two must-win counties. 👇🏼👇🏼
---
| [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=eb9b513e5b&e=fe4b890356)

[ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=de8febb3f4&e=fe4b890356)
---
| **Our field staff are mobilizing hundreds of supporters in all regions of our beloved state -** sign up below to get involved with our campaign. Each and every one of us can make a difference!

_Submit your volunteer form at [GarrettforMichigan.com/get-involved](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=5ab3217621&e=fe4b890356) and our team will be in touch._
---
| | [GET INVOLVED](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=d0a91b25bf&e=fe4b890356 "GET INVOLVED")
---
| We also had a phenomenal crew set up outside of President Trump's rally in Washington Twp last Saturday, giving 45 a warm Michigan welcome and sharing our Michigan First message!
---
| [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=04f2ddf452&e=fe4b890356)
---
| [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=5192477b9e&e=fe4b890356)
---
---
| Our campaign is not run by D.C. consultants, Lansing insiders or entrenched politicians. Our campaign is led by Michigan's greatest resource - **the people!**

That's why we have been on the road since the very beginning - nearly a year now - meeting with voters, sharing our story and taking your questions.

Peter - I hope you can join us at an upcoming event this month. See our full schedule at [GarrettforMichigan.com/events.](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=ba11c61ca9&e=fe4b890356)

Peter, We’ve written to you before about this incredible opportunity, but the deadline is fast approaching and you won’t want to miss out. President Trump is headlining the “Countdown to the Majority” event in Dallas, Texas on May 9th, and you can enter now to win tickets to see him in person. **Just make a grassroots donation by May 1st, and you could be having dinner with President Trump and other top Republicans!**
---
[**DONATE NOW & BE ENTERED TO WIN >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/225deae1e78a7acf/e49a933be6478411c3d6b838967d376c/34143)

One lucky winner and guest will win tickets to the event, airfare, and accommodations. It’s going to be a fantastic time, and a chance to meet some of the most influential people in conservative politics today. [**Don’t miss your chance to attend — enter by May 1st to win. >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/225deae1e78a7acf/d336ead70684c3a7c3d6b838967d376c/34143) We hope to see you there,

NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution use this form. To enter without making a contribution, click [here.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/225deae1e78a7acf/32c785f20cd41554c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Wednesday, March 9th, 2022 at 12:00 am Eastern Time and ends on Sunday, May 1st, 2022 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Sunday, May 1st, 2022. One winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) tickets to the May 9th NRCC 2022 Majority Dinner; transportation for two (2), made at the discretion of the NRCC, within the continental United States to event location and from winner’s home location, with an approximate retail value of $1,500; one (1) one-night hotel stay at a Dallas, Texas hotel, with an approximate retail value of $500. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $2,500. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Restrictions and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply, they are listed in the Official Rules. The Sponsor is NRCC, 320 First St SE, Washington, DC 20003.

name: Team Fair Fight Action
subject: Our wins from Georgia’s legislative session
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
Fair Fight |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43816957/338829337/1793776944?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzQyMzc0Yy0zNmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g7te9yXz6U9P4rp0XXFWJUrINHtUSY-HFpSjDZavmTs=&emci=30864a61-30b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=d742374c-36b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1037277)

| | Friend - Last night at midnight, the Georgia legislature gaveled out Sine Die, the final day of legislative session for 2022. We made it! But most importantly, this year, voters and advocates had a laundry list of incredible wins. Here’s what we accomplished, and what your work and support helped make possible:
* **We defeated Republicans’ 2022 anti-voting omnibus bill, HB 1464, and their second iteration, SB 89.** This bill would have risked undermining election workers, made it harder to conduct elections in Georgia, and allowed for a flood of hands-on sham ballot reviews by Big Lie conspiracy theorists. With YOUR voices, work, and effort, state legislators rejected this effort and we defeated these bills.
* **Together with incredible criminal legal reform advocates, we defeated attempts to attack bail reform and criminalize protest in Georgia.** SB 171 and SB 504, among other provisions, were shameless attempts to crack down on protestors and repeal the progress Georgia has made in criminal justice reform. However, after voters and tireless advocates like the Southern Center for Human Rights spoke out, both of these bills died in committee.
* **Education advocates defeated all but TWO of the over two dozen anti-education bills this year.** We have seen an onslaught of bills attempting to cut funding from schools, censor classrooms, and intimidate teachers in 2022, and the opposition has been led by advocates like Public Education Matters Georgia. However, after students, parents, teachers, and community members spoke out, only two bills of the over two dozen originally proposed made it to the Governor’s desk - and many of the most harmful provisions that would have jeopardized college scholarships and billions in school funding were stripped.
* **Georgia’s strong reproductive justice coalition defeated yet another attempt to restrict abortion access, SB 456.** With the work of groups like the Feminist Women’s Health Center and reproductive rights advocates, this bill was never brought to the Senate for a vote.

**Let’s be clear: none of this would have been possible without you.** Once again, just like in 2020, your voice was heard. And looking forward to May and November, we are confident that Georgians will be heard once more, because of your commitment to our state and your communities. **But these wins also remind us that there is still more work to be done.** While many harmful bills were stopped, we saw the passage of SB 441, which gives the Georgia Bureau of Investigations (GBI) new powers to investigate alleged elections infractions and raises voter intimidation concerns, and HB 1084, which could discriminate against trans athletes and censor school classrooms. The passage of these bills serve as a reminder that our work is not yet finished. We have more work to do—together— and must show up at the polls to make our voices heard. **Thank you. Take some time to celebrate, rest, and then get ready to make your votes and voices heard this year!** **In the meantime, please consider making a donation to support our work. The easiest way to donate is online[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43816958/338829338/1086193968?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzQyMzc0Yy0zNmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g7te9yXz6U9P4rp0XXFWJUrINHtUSY-HFpSjDZavmTs=). ** ** ** Thank you for all you do - Team Fair Fight Action [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43816959/338829339/1086193968?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzQyMzc0Yy0zNmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g7te9yXz6U9P4rp0XXFWJUrINHtUSY-HFpSjDZavmTs=) |

clean_body: Fair Fight | | | Friend - Last night at midnight, the Georgia legislature gaveled out Sine Die, the final day of legislative session for 2022. We made it! But most importantly, this year, voters and advocates had a laundry list of incredible wins. Here’s what we accomplished, and what your work and support helped make possible: We defeated Republicans’ 2022 anti-voting omnibus bill, HB 1464, and their second iteration, SB 89. This bill would have risked undermining election workers, made it harder to conduct elections in Georgia, and allowed for a flood of hands-on sham ballot reviews by Big Lie conspiracy theorists. With YOUR voices, work, and effort, state legislators rejected this effort and we defeated these bills. Together with incredible criminal legal reform advocates, we defeated attempts to attack bail reform and criminalize protest in Georgia. SB 171 and SB 504, among other provisions, were shameless attempts to crack down on protestors and repeal the progress Georgia has made in criminal justice reform. However, after voters and tireless advocates like the Southern Center for Human Rights spoke out, both of these bills died in committee. Education advocates defeated all but TWO of the over two dozen anti-education bills this year. We have seen an onslaught of bills attempting to cut funding from schools, censor classrooms, and intimidate teachers in 2022, and the opposition has been led by advocates like Public Education Matters Georgia. However, after students, parents, teachers, and community members spoke out, only two bills of the over two dozen originally proposed made it to the Governor’s desk - and many of the most harmful provisions that would have jeopardized college scholarships and billions in school funding were stripped. Georgia’s strong reproductive justice coalition defeated yet another attempt to restrict abortion access, SB 456. With the work of groups like the Feminist Women’s Health Center and reproductive rights advocates, this bill was never brought to the Senate for a vote. Let’s be clear: none of this would have been possible without you. Once again, just like in 2020, your voice was heard. And looking forward to May and November, we are confident that Georgians will be heard once more, because of your commitment to our state and your communities. But these wins also remind us that there is still more work to be done. While many harmful bills were stopped, we saw the passage of SB 441, which gives the Georgia Bureau of Investigations (GBI) new powers to investigate alleged elections infractions and raises voter intimidation concerns, and HB 1084, which could discriminate against trans athletes and censor school classrooms. The passage of these bills serve as a reminder that our work is not yet finished. We have more work to do—together— and must show up at the polls to make our voices heard. Thank you. Take some time to celebrate, rest, and then get ready to make your votes and voices heard this year! In the meantime, please consider making a donation to support our work. The easiest way to donate is online=. Thank you for all you do - Team Fair Fight Action = | ---|---|--- | 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-430 Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2021 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. Contributions to Fair Fight Action are not tax-deductible. | | Paid for by Fair Fight Action

subject: Does Joe Biden even care about New Mexico?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer
body:
I don’t know about you, but I’m pretty tired of Washington politicians and bureaucrats telling us how to live our lives when it’s clear that they don’ Peter, I don’t know about you, but I’m pretty tired of Washington politicians and bureaucrats telling us how to live our lives when it’s clear that they don’t know the first thing about our state or its values. Sometimes it feels like Joe Biden only cares about the coastal elites that he visits over and over again on for his thinly-veiled fundraising trips. I’m curious what you think about it, Peter. POLL**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=b33471d5d00f40818dae32ec936e1dfe&_e=_WB1qRiKPjU3VscimqdIsBOQRbE3ONbSfvDq8f9WydoKUtZaZM1uLCeK3QRrfkxTAiqyT6o4VVx5THiB2GkPwAmk1hmciIm8kBX1EigGHhBbh_Ax_PKE2Luuum7W31yapOEHZYVM8hu3YmacdhnyQ1WVwLClD7yol4R9_AkKlQdunlki6o_XrI4lQyk2-7MEC9OJsRgbLRQ5CQwdgoRXh0qdbI7b_GZcVPaZMzqrAgCs1gsJ7WkVKD18QopucSFoqnsocjpw-3XnL3zBnKDdOcXvzGj6KRtqcZuViMazE0Fllq9K1ne1yyfPCpVKYU3jzy4RrQ4jIQZGSNu9xx2yPKacNv7UVcVpi_wFgt-U0lMcAWue2rYeeX9WVPKT7nS-BsBZxt5slU1jOzxNHTZrjVk6l_gwb-8j7tKSNGtvK0TWHLA4fT7j_gQYFEQvKKun78CZFjXqVfZGxtyokHoyzc1PuhCpqnMwU3-9ElN3GbruCJfZF2UAMs6iUQvkiZFs) From the southern border crisis to his war on American energy, it’s hard to believe that Joe Biden really cares about the hardworking families in our state. Time after time, he’s sold out our state’s best interests to placate his Far Left coastal mega donors. It seems to me that if he really cared about New Mexico he would support our families, secure our border, and bolster our energy industry which helps power all of America. What do you think? Does Joe Biden care about New Mexico? **Respond now to let me know what you think → ** It’s so important to me to know how you’re feeling about our state and national leaders. I’m running for governor to stand up for New Mexico and make sure that our state doesn’t go ignored, but to do that, I need your input.
Will you take just a moment to answer the quick **Flash Poll **and share your thoughts with me and my team? clean_body: I don’t know about you, but I’m pretty tired of Washington politicians and bureaucrats telling us how to live our lives when it’s clear that they don’ Peter, I don’t know about you, but I’m pretty tired of Washington politicians and bureaucrats telling us how to live our lives when it’s clear that they don’t know the first thing about our state or its values. Sometimes it feels like Joe Biden only cares about the coastal elites that he visits over and over again on for his thinly-veiled fundraising trips. I’m curious what you think about it, Peter. Do you think that Joe Biden cares about New Mexico? From the southern border crisis to his war on American energy, it’s hard to believe that Joe Biden really cares about the hardworking families in our state. Time after time, he’s sold out our state’s best interests to placate his Far Left coastal mega donors. It seems to me that if he really cared about New Mexico he would support our families, secure our border, and bolster our energy industry which helps power all of America. What do you think? Does Joe Biden care about New Mexico? Respond now to let me know what you think → It’s so important to me to know how you’re feeling about our state and national leaders. I’m running for governor to stand up for New Mexico and make sure that our state doesn’t go ignored, but to do that, I need your input. Will you take just a moment to answer the quick Flash Poll and share your thoughts with me and my team? I really appreciate your response, Peter. I’m determined to hold Joe Biden accountable and to call him out when he ignores our families’ best interests. That's why it’s so helpful to know what our families are really thinking about his leadership and priorities. name: LBR
subject: Thank you for a successful quarter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
I just wanted to quickly check in and say thank you.

Because of grassroots support, we managed to surpass our goal for the first FEC filing deadline of the year. When our numbers go public later this month, people will see just how strong a position we're in to keep Delaware blue — and they'll see just how high the enthusiasm is for our campaign!

Whether you gave $5 or $500 this past quarter, each and every one of you played a vital role in powering this campaign forward and ensuring that Delaware Democrats succeed up and down the ballot. I'm so proud to have you as part of the team.

Thank you again for all you've done.

— LBR

Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.

So, please, can you help us keep up the momentum by pitching in $5, or whatever you can afford today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43810842/338799115/-1015964469?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220405-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmQ5ODZjMS0xNmI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1pZxRv-oZjkFJcXLMuiMJZ4ytvv-eEU9TIJ1NuexxB8=)

Over the next two months, we’ll need to connect with every single voter possible through our organizing and advertising operations.

clean_body: This is a big moment for all of us on Team Josh, and we couldn’t have done it without all of your help and support. | = | Peter, It’s official! I’m shocked by this news.

Last week, we learned that Ginni Thomas – a conservative activist with extremist tendencies and the wife of Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas – was a key player in the movement to undermine our democracy and perpetuate the Big Lie.

New text messages between Ginni Thomas and former White House Chief of Staff Mark Meadows show that not only did she attend the January 6 insurrection at the Capitol, but Ginni was also an insider to the official GOP effort to overturn the election results.

**Here’s why this matters:** The Supreme Court – including Ginni’s husband – already ruled on matters related to the National Commission to Investigate the January 6 Attack – and is expected to do so again.

[These new reports prove that Justice Clarence Thomas has a clear conflict of interest and should therefore RECUSE himself from all January 6 business. Add your name if you agree:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43811014/338799859/542280057?refcode=DW_EM_PT_90DO_220405_1_1&refcode2=beff4910-17b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=QFxaAYMHX6X8WhhvcQRGA9xNwX/dil05XNoMTQqc+XdQDd+ikFLcm9wkVB7GIDRV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWZmNDkxMC0xN2I1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1nbyExpRNTilTP322Z0SIuwoPLSouJ7uX9WsP0LEpwg=&emci=962c5026-05b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=beff4910-17b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=7651992)

7,500 Petition Signatures Needed
These revelations are closely related to the rise in extremism we’re seeing here in Washington’s Fourth District. National Republicans have clearly signaled that behavior like Ginni Thomas’ is perfectly acceptable within the conservative movement – and that approval only leads to more and more extreme views being openly championed.

My own GOP opponents prove it every day as they race to see which will be the furthest-right candidate in our race for Congress, with Loren Culp openly calling for lynchings to replace our criminal justice system.

**If we want to achieve real justice in the January 6 investigation and deal a true blow to the conservative extremist movement led by Trump and his allies, we need an impartial Supreme Court.**

[Sign on if you agree.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43811016/338799861/542280057?refcode=DW_EM_PT_90DO_220405_1_1&refcode2=beff4910-17b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=QFxaAYMHX6X8WhhvcQRGA9xNwX/dil05XNoMTQqc+XdQDd+ikFLcm9wkVB7GIDRV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWZmNDkxMC0xN2I1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1nbyExpRNTilTP322Z0SIuwoPLSouJ7uX9WsP0LEpwg=&emci=962c5026-05b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=beff4910-17b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=7651992)

Last week, we learned that Ginni Thomas – a conservative activist with extremist tendencies and the wife of Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas – was a key player in the movement to undermine our democracy and perpetuate the Big Lie. New text messages between Ginni Thomas and former White House Chief of Staff Mark Meadows show that not only did she attend the January 6 insurrection at the Capitol, but Ginni was also an insider to the official GOP effort to overturn the election results. Here’s why this matters: The Supreme Court – including Ginni’s husband – already ruled on matters related to the National Commission to Investigate the January 6 Attack – and is expected to do so again. | | 7,500 Petition Signatures Needed These revelations are closely related to the rise in extremism we’re seeing here in Washington’s Fourth District. National Republicans have clearly signaled that behavior like Ginni Thomas’ is perfectly acceptable within the conservative movement – and that approval only leads to more and more extreme views being openly championed. My own GOP opponents prove it every day as they race to see which will be the furthest-right candidate in our race for Congress, with Loren Culp openly calling for lynchings to replace our criminal justice system. If we want to achieve real justice in the January 6 investigation and deal a true blow to the conservative extremist movement led by Trump and his allies, we need an impartial Supreme Court. name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Biden Backs Truckers and So Do We
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking the Hill PAC
body:
Friends:

Yesterday, President Biden, alongside US Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg, the Honorable Patrick J Murphy, and trucker Maria Rodriguez, announced the launch of the Task Force Movement: Life Cycle Pathways for Veterans and Military to Trucking. This taskforce will work to build a bridge between our trucking industry and our talented Veteran workforce - a true investment in our Veterans.

During the announcement, President Biden shared that truck drivers carry the nation literally on their backs, and we know that our truckers were hit hard by COVID-19 - the effects of which were felt by every American. Secretary Buttigieg illuminated staggering figures showing that "there remains a shortage of 80,000 truckers nationwide...and an estimated 300,000 truckers leave the industry each year." As such, this task force has been launched to drive positive movement forward including cutting the red tape to obtain commercial licenses for transitioning service members. While the number of commercial licenses secured has doubled in January and February of this year alone, there's much more work to be done.

Patrick, who will serve as Chair of this important task force, is the son and grandson of veterans turned truck drivers. He's seen, first-hand, the benefits the trucking industry had in supporting both his family and community. Patrick shared in his remarks that "our veteran community and trucking industry face unique challenges, from unemployment and underemployment to driver shortages, and our nation's consumers feel the brunt of it. This task force is about opportunity, it's about the future of America, it's about making sure America gets back to work."

This task force builds on the founding vision and important work of Taking the Hill - to create opportunities for veterans and their families. This task force provides a tremendous collaborative platform, serving to fill a great need in our country by tapping into our talented veteran community. One filled with hard working, trained individuals from diverse backgrounds who are ready to get to work and continue leading from the front.

Join us in celebrating this amazing announcement. And as always, thank you for your continued support.

\- Taking the Hill Team

(Hon. Patrick J Murphy standing with President Biden and Secretary Pete Buttigieg at the White House announcement on April 4, 2022)

(Hon. Patrick J Murphy standing with members of the Task Force Movement: Life Cycle Pathways for Veteran and Military to Trucking on April 4, 2022)

Paid for by Taking the Hill PAC
---
Taking the Hill
PO Box 2134
Bristol PA 19007 United States

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Please take my April Priorities Survey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Time... that’s something we could use a lot more of in Congress, if we are to accomplish everything we need to between now and November.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=159%2E5257348%2EmoyLyu)
Time... that’s something we could use a lot more of in Congress, if we are to accomplish everything we need to between now and November.
There are precious few months remaining before the American people vote in the midterm elections that will determine which party will control the House and Senate.
Republicans are slow-walking every possible action in the House and Senate — we’re still confirming initial members of President Biden’s administration, for goodness sake. QAnon cranks like Marjorie Taylor Greene routinely file “motions to adjourn” that take hours of floor time reserved for debate and the passage of serious legislation on the floor.
**We’ve got to set our priorities for the month ahead and push for them. Quickly.**
[**Will you take my campaign’s official April Priorities Survey to let me know which issues you want us to prioritize in the weeks and months ahead? It will only take a moment of your time, and your feedback means a lot to me.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/survey/engagement-20220405-april-priorities-survey?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220405_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=159%2E5257348%2EmoyLyu)
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.adamschiff.com/survey/engagement-20220405-april-priorities-survey?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220405_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=159%2E5257348%2EmoyLyu)
---
If President Biden was able to sign every bill the House has passed this year, the United States would be in our strongest position in generations.
We’re talking about restoring the _Voting Rights Act_ , implementing universal pre-K, expanding Medicare and Medicaid, lowering prescription drug prices, and putting hundreds of billions of dollars toward the transition from fossil fuels to clean energy. That’s just for starters.
In the time we have left this session, what is most important to you? [**Your feedback means a lot to me — please take my April Priorities Survey today. It will only take a moment or two.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/survey/engagement-20220405-april-priorities-survey?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20220405_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=159%2E5257348%2EmoyLyu)
Thanks for staying involved and supporting our campaign, and our Democratic majorities.
All my best,
— Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=159%2E5257348%2EmoyLyu) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=159%2E5257348%2EmoyLyu)**

name: Charles Booker
subject: I’m going to be blunt, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

I’m going to be blunt,
Peter.

This is bullsh*t. Rand Paul is saying he won’t vote to confirm Judge
Kentanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court because she didn’t define
“woman” to his liking.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220405?refcode=em20220405-1721&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1721_346206_Ay3tnt&akid=1721%2E346206%2EAy3tnt ][IMG]

Judge Jackson’s years of service as a Public Defender, Vice Chair of the
U.S. Sentencing Commission, District Court Judge and Court of Appeals
Judge provide her with the resume and undeniable qualifications to be
elevated to the highest court in the land.

body:

Peter,

We wanted to show you some polling from our critical U.S. Senate race in Georgia:

**Walker 47% -- Warnock 44%
Walker 48% -- Warnock 46%
Walker 49% -- Warnock 48%**

name: Senate Majority Alert (Iowa)
subject: The latest in the GOP's schemes to flip Senate control
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
they’re going to court:
| | |
---
Peter: 50-50 Senate control is NOT working for the American people, which is why it's critical to take on vulnerable Republican senators like Chuck Grassley in Iowa, flip more seats blue and _expand_ our Democratic majority.
But with Sen. Grassley facing RECORD-LOW approval with Iowa voters, national Republicans are playing dirty to try to protect him: **Tomorrow, they’re going to court to ask a judge to throw Grassley's opponent, Democrat Abby Finkenauer, off the ballot.**
After Grassley's seven terms in Washington, Iowans are ready for change: Nearly two-thirds of likely voters said they don't want to reelect Sen. Grassley, and the state's top pollster has pointed to weakness in his polling numbers. **This lawsuit is nothing but a desperate attempt to help Sen. Grassley coast to reelection and drain Democrats' resources in the process – and with Senate control on the line, we cannot let that happen!**
Abby's team set an emergency $50,000 fundraising goal, but we're still falling dangerously short with the lawsuit being heard TOMORROW. We need grassroots Democrats to help her fight back immediately so we can defeat Sen. Grassley and expand Democratic Senate control.**[So please, will you rush a donation now – $5, or whatever you can spare to help Abby fight these GOP attacks – so we can flip this seat blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43817777/338835021/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk894-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTk0NGIzMS0zZGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1K_jd4qYyfVfy07SSfhFKPWG8Ggvks76w3BcpiXZE1A=)**

clean_body: they’re going to court: | | | Peter: 50-50 Senate control is NOT working for the American people, which is why it's critical to take on vulnerable Republican senators like Chuck Grassley in Iowa, flip more seats blue and expand our Democratic majority. But with Sen. Grassley facing RECORD-LOW approval with Iowa voters, national Republicans are playing dirty to try to protect him: Tomorrow, they’re going to court to ask a judge to throw Grassley's opponent, Democrat Abby Finkenauer, off the ballot. After Grassley's seven terms in Washington, Iowans are ready for change: Nearly two-thirds of likely voters said they don't want to reelect Sen. Grassley, and the state's top pollster has pointed to weakness in his polling numbers. This lawsuit is nothing but a desperate attempt to help Sen. Grassley coast to reelection and drain Democrats' resources in the process – and with Senate control on the line, we cannot let that happen! Abby's team set an emergency $50,000 fundraising goal, but we're still falling dangerously short with the lawsuit being heard TOMORROW. We need grassroots Democrats to help her fight back immediately so we can defeat Sen. Grassley and expand Democratic Senate control.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
