# $1,000,000 Cash On Hand
It has been a strong start to 2022. Thanks to your support, donations, and outreach our campaign is in a great position to win in November! _See the highlights below._
* **We closed the first quarter of 2022 raising over $400,000** \- this is HUGE!
* Total funds raised to date after 3 quarters in the race is **over $1.4 million**.
* And because of a disciplined campaign, **Juan has amassed more than $1 million cash on hand. **

Our fundraising success is a testament that Juan's message of protecting the American Dream continues to resonate with everyone. **Juan and Laura are living the American Dream and are committed to continue fighting to preserve it.** And the fight has only begun.

**With less than 120 days from the primary election on AUGUST 2, 2022, **we need _**YOU**_ more than ever: [spread the word, volunteer, put up a yard sign, donate and more](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=b4b730e89a&e=659fba240e)!

**Last week, Nancy Pelosi's super PAC[ announced](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=e6acfe3b61&e=659fba240e) they bought $900,000 in advertising in the Tucson market alone. **_DC Democrats do not want to lose AZ-06 and have shown they are tracking this district and willing to invest to keep this seat._ Our ability to raise the necessary resources to compete is _**vital**_ to achieving victory in November. **While we have had strong success in our fundraising efforts, we cannot let up! **

If you're able to [donate](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=8840b3fc76&e=659fba240e), [volunteer](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=08edc8b1d0&e=659fba240e) or spread the word, please do! Team Ciscomani is strong and we are grateful for everyone's support. **Together, let's fight to protect the American Dream by sending Juan to Congress this fall! **
🇺🇸

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: history in the making
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
If you agree that the Senate should vote to confirm Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to serve on the Supreme Court, will you please add your name right now?

Friend: The momentous nomination of Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court brings us one step closer to witnessing history in the making.
I've been consistently impressed with Judge Jackson's wide-ranging experience and her lifelong dedication to public service. During the Senate’s confirmation hearings, her thoughtful responses repeatedly demonstrated her extensive legal knowledge, commitment to the rule of law, and impartial judicial temperament – even in the face of despicable and false attacks from Senate Republicans.
There is no question that she is remarkably qualified for this lifetime appointment and will be a brilliant voice on the Supreme Court. And right now, as the GOP works to endanger everything from reproductive rights to our very democracy, Judge Jackson's voice is one that we need on the bench more urgently than ever.
**But with Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans trying to block her confirmation, I'm looking for 5,000 more people to join me in showing support for Judge Jackson's historic nomination – and I'm counting on you to be one of them, friend.**

body: | | | | BIG TAX CUTS and even bigger MOMENTUM! --- [](http://url5297.votelindstrom.com/ls/click?upn=HTMZIboFmIG-2BMNluIWzOsEkZog9-2Bea5LaFl7faGhgM5fS-2BWxIhwQrijOY2NNEWL5WCqt_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6zXeK4bpqnlHyRYK-2FuKv0hD3-2BMWjozazdIjp9lARN-2FVRaKTnJ6A8nZIBxAyPVdR9NGZhRMKz-2FTRhB37x4V7-2F-2Bo-2FCoM5rgUAWLiyx8XLwLorLCFOXsav-2Bdtny8Nkc6BM-2FpN5b162-2BaKzOMxufREAjSrn7d6JJkeNFbcHvueA4h7uD1ZgWmzAPAjOZywhgc1G3btxJotjW3Q9ghhtGLKVTLNYjc1gGYoTn3nRdCfK8kZ3bCgJy4QCIKL1T-2BJaArvZut1mjRGv76chzAuSRH8CkXvRx-2BBOmBDgCg5QDtQS44hiVLK9aGe7q4bxPBYYpxiv3zlazRgxk7V-2BBsS3op3ZC-2FANCEVky0uPVms7sSe2i6HT4JI0YhPcf0zyGIVw7Pk04XOGvQa5srVE7kSLlYYMojQ2cDEaojeZvxCrB2zrNlUjpRIXiItn-2BoRBUqWO5I176HVJdpONGskkdkJVKTbns-2BxeN6787ulVFMTiPRdZsrFEmsDS2YpKEu8N0Dd5jvxBQHTZRlg7aPzdFQpnh3qZdsBDNKimpsvK8nTT0QlvuVVflAXjXU2UPQVdVETkLH919BqRrSn0ZJHR90-2BXA40biJchxH5DxJzM92JkAx2p33NxFgpoeg-2FyuEYedVe1xIJN-2FsEfKTYxKtRMFHz-2B7DkowF1MSg0uMRGpqRAM5mm3n8B7QhvJg8v7QrvVR29MlthHmhmuUWNlL-2BxTJk73FCCTvn8TKWfKV-2FzrCdgRDeoohslL-2FhKZJy4eHP2-2BX8e69OSrky1PyvFX7iTWtrp8g0s9Ysbzv6z9zQbRrfo-2Fw2MnxofEijwSNNjEg2TJphoG1B4oSs) --- Friends, We are 35 days out from the Primary Election and Brett continues to crisscross the state as well as spending time in the Unicameral. First, we had a very exciting announcement yesterday - Omaha's Mayor Jean Stothert endorsed Brett Lindstrom for Governor! We are so excited to have another proven tax cutter on our team! --- --- Take a look at some of our campaign highlights from the past week: --- | | --- | --- On Sunday, Brett attended the Sterling County Forum and was able to meet voters and share his vision for Nebraska before racing back to Omaha so he could be there for his son Barron’s first communion. --- --- Brett was able to speak to the Omaha Pachyderm Luncheon on Monday and spent some time answering questions about his conservative record. --- | | --- | --- | --- On Tuesday we had our weekly Ladies for Lindstrom event at our Omaha headquarters where we made calls, wrote postcards to voters, and shared some great food. --- | | --- | --- | --- Senator Lindstrom spent Wednesday at the Unicameral and [advanced the largest tax cut in Nebraska history](http://url5297.votelindstrom.com/ls/click?upn=HTMZIboFmIG-2BMNluIWzOsMZ-2BsY2lBenqXUeh740ZV7ux5H4wxUKQoKY0wRDfxnnxYzPNYKIScR41kVEft-2FNC2X6XYHu-2B3G1a6C4iViZl5GfZ1j-2Fg050Q7GkK5F-2B6uKcT1L7I3JSYCNdOWHjIF4V5Awvm4iAEnT4QszNLT-2F-2FDMsk-3D6aHg_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6zXeK4bpqnlHyRYK-2FuKv0hD3-2BMWjozazdIjp9lARN-2FVRaKTnJ6A8nZIBxAyPVdR9NGZhRMKz-2FTRhB37x4V7-2F-2Bo-2FCoM5rgUAWLiyx8XLwLorLCFOXsav-2Bdtny8Nkc6BM-2FpN5b162-2BaKzOMxufREAjSrn7d6JJkeNFbcHvueA4h7uD1ZgWmzAPAjOZywhgc1G3btxJotjW3Q9ghhtGLKVTLNYjc1gGYoTn3nRdCfK8kZ3bCgJy4QCIKL1T-2BJaArvZut1mjRGv76chzAuSRH8CkXvRx-2BBOmBDgCg5QDtQS44hiVLK9aGe7q4bxPBYYpxiv3zlazRgxk7V-2BBsS3op3ZC-2FANCEVky0uPVms7sSe2i6HT4JI0YhPcf0zyGIVw7Pk04XOGvQa5srVE7kSLlYYMojQ2cDEaojeZvxCrB2zrNlUjpRIXiItn-2BoRBUqWO5I176HVJdpONGskkdkJVKTbns-2BxeN6787ulVFMTiPRdZsrFEmsDS2YpKEu8N0Dd5jvxBQHTZRlg7aPzdFQpnh3qZdsBDNKimpsvK8nTT0QlvuVVflAXjXU2UPQVdVETkLH919BqRrSn0ZJHR90-2BXA40biJchxH5DxJzM92JkAx2p33NxFgpoeg-2FyuEYedVe1xIJN-2FsEfKTYxKtRMFHz-2B7DkowF1MSg0uMRGpqRAM5mm3n8B7QZlK2Qy2qGniBX5HQduJ0IU6rd-2BsnfQuUPuHlBkXH8zk3EHD-2BqTZ-2B8zcccUwg4tiuXd2LPT2ZPVPVVcYcGaU-2F-2BfwMUN-2FGVED0VWOInAmfjEWCyic5qkHpKGh2KbE7h2LD02uAoR8S0j6MckDZDxd7K "advanced the largest tax cut in Nebraska history"). This will cut income tax rates, cut property taxes, and expedite the implementation of Brett’s tax cut on social security benefits. After all that, Brett was able to make it back to Omaha just in time to join his running mate Dave Rippe at Pitch Pizza for a meet and greet. --- | | --- | --- On Thursday, Brett was in Ashland for an event with some fired up supporters. In the last few weeks of the primary, Brett is getting as much face time with voters as possible. --- | | --- | --- Friday afternoon Brett was able to tour Monolith in Hallam, NE. They’re a great Nebraska company that is expanding their operation to bring over 2000 more jobs to our state and will soon be selling Nebraska products worldwide. After that it was off to Elkhorn with family to spend the evening at the St. Patrick’s fish fry. --- | | --- | --- This weekend Team Lindstrom was all over the state knocking doors and putting up yard signs. In the closing weeks of the primary it is all hands on deck. We need your help! From hosting events, to knocking doors and delivering yard signs, there are so many different ways you can help get Brett over the finish line. If you would like us to deliver a yard sign or a 4x8 sign at your property, business, or residence -- please click the button below, and I will be in touch shortly. --- | [CLICK HERE FOR A SIGN](http://url5297.votelindstrom.com/ls/click?upn=HTMZIboFmIG-2BMNluIWzOsKMreWwLWnC1c43mwlUujWkU0wehxVNbCdGGwsAqG9gb5rqxXV6IcYGVRYr0tXS4JQ-3D-3Dx5Ag_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6zXeK4bpqnlHyRYK-2FuKv0hD3-2BMWjozazdIjp9lARN-2FVRaKTnJ6A8nZIBxAyPVdR9NGZhRMKz-2FTRhB37x4V7-2F-2Bo-2FCoM5rgUAWLiyx8XLwLorLCFOXsav-2Bdtny8Nkc6BM-2FpN5b162-2BaKzOMxufREAjSrn7d6JJkeNFbcHvueA4h7uD1ZgWmzAPAjOZywhgc1G3btxJotjW3Q9ghhtGLKVTLNYjc1gGYoTn3nRdCfK8kZ3bCgJy4QCIKL1T-2BJaArvZut1mjRGv76chzAuSRH8CkXvRx-2BBOmBDgCg5QDtQS44hiVLK9aGe7q4bxPBYYpxiv3zlazRgxk7V-2BBsS3op3ZC-2FANCEVky0uPVms7sSe2i6HT4JI0YhPcf0zyGIVw7Pk04XOGvQa5srVE7kSLlYYMojQ2cDEaojeZvxCrB2zrNlUjpRIXiItn-2BoRBUqWO5I176HVJdpONGskkdkJVKTbns-2BxeN6787ulVFMTiPRdZsrFEmsDS2YpKEu8N0Dd5jvxBQHTZRlg7aPzdFQpnh3qZdsBDNKimpsvK8nTT0QlvuVVflAXjXU2UPQVdVETkLH919BqRrSn0ZJHR90-2BXA40biJchxH5DxJzM92JkAx2p33NxFgpoeg-2FyuEYedVe1xIJN-2FsEfKTYxKtRMFHz-2B7DkowF1MSg0uMRGpqRAM5mm3n8B7QbkCemDe41w-2Bv1Y-2BLN23TQ5TeJo59kZI78I12kXQvGoLUZyzGauEjAlRw1TChaVn-2FmK21b97D-2BKYP56LOTtHAR-2FkldB6YdNtvfhLLQnyEZ3EL7ITvUDvJ2sVviIJODjmZfCNtDEnFYmlFeSbYjcQFW) --- We are thankful for your support and truly can't do this without you. clean_body: | | | | BIG TAX CUTS and even bigger MOMENTUM! Friends, We are 35 days out from the Primary Election and Brett continues to crisscross the state as well as spending time in the Unicameral. First, we had a very exciting announcement yesterday - Omaha's Mayor Jean Stothert endorsed Brett Lindstrom for Governor! We are so excited to have another proven tax cutter on our team! Take a look at some of our campaign highlights from the past week: | | | On Sunday, Brett attended the Sterling County Forum and was able to meet voters and share his vision for Nebraska before racing back to Omaha so he could be there for his son Barron’s first communion. Brett was able to speak to the Omaha Pachyderm Luncheon on Monday and spent some time answering questions about his conservative record. | | | | On Tuesday we had our weekly Ladies for Lindstrom event at our Omaha headquarters where we made calls, wrote postcards to voters, and shared some great food. | | | | Senator Lindstrom spent Wednesday at the Unicameral and "advanced the largest tax cut in Nebraska history". This will cut income tax rates, cut property taxes, and expedite the implementation of Brett’s tax cut on social security benefits. After all that, Brett was able to make it back to Omaha just in time to join his running mate Dave Rippe at Pitch Pizza for a meet and greet. | | | On Thursday, Brett was in Ashland for an event with some fired up supporters. In the last few weeks of the primary, Brett is getting as much face time with voters as possible. | | | Friday afternoon Brett was able to tour Monolith in Hallam, NE. They’re a great Nebraska company that is expanding their operation to bring over 2000 more jobs to our state and will soon be selling Nebraska products worldwide. After that it was off to Elkhorn with family to spend the evening at the St. Patrick’s fish fry. | | | This weekend Team Lindstrom was all over the state knocking doors and putting up yard signs. In the closing weeks of the primary it is all hands on deck. We need your help! From hosting events, to knocking doors and delivering yard signs, there are so many different ways you can help get Brett over the finish line. If you would like us to deliver a yard sign or a 4x8 sign at your property, business, or residence -- please click the button below, and I will be in touch shortly. | We are thankful for your support and truly can't do this without you. Have a great rest of the week and we hope to see you soon on the trail! All the Best, Tori Midkiff Political Director Lindstrom for Governor | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- Paid for by Friends of Lindstrom Campaign - 2433 S. 130th Circle, Omaha, NE, 68144

We’ve seen the impact of dangerous drugs flooding into our communities right here in Ohio with devastating consequences. It must end. [http://email.mail-1.jennifer-ruthgreen.com/c/eJxtj0trwzAQhH9NdIuRZD2sgw45JMRQCiW0gV6K3lYqPyq5mPz7yvfCwrcww-6M-YpWXq6n_lnO37cbfXtdVDv16Q7SbHbNvZjrp-9_8Bbu5Jm3Tr9_ACshNUZRECWGGEMCaWWHuwZprDGHUDGvKbfmQOCoYjqi5uGmKXqXj_l3HUJ2bmrMPIJBQss7IxQnrPVWW09tZ5AgXrRKtYhokOSwrks5tKcDvtQp65xVcE2Y55CcWmLZL1VhLKFMNtftv9S7wdmoKhkmhglhNBXcMkQcEpoiRZrH4gLI0i5bTCkWxmv-sBfYP_wByBxfZg]
[http://email.mail-1.jennifer-ruthgreen.com/c/eJxVj81qwzAQhJ_GusnIkm25Bx9ySIihFEpoA70U_axttbLkSg4ib1850ENhYZdvh2FGfRrdn86H4R6P35dL8_qyCuYGe0XWq_0Hz-r8MQ4_NE3X-h5SJ9_eke5Jo5RokOkpoZTUpMm7o11ZSSopJ0S0o2y4VkVNFmEsrsovcM6MEHC4bfMUAFyp_ILmnglOaaVZrRghXLCR8wyesquuFbQS2X7etjUW7FDQU56UUhmlwNbErfRhyshBisH7JZ9rgBhxAAsiQszgTxqxEk4bLTbA481pvAqFwWkfsg7_i4cf-bDybnq4GYdJhUKv12Rs9mp57jXtxfYOv5c3ayc] I am
honored to stand with Indiana Right to Life, Susan B. Anthony List and pro-life Hoosiers who are committed to protecting moms and
their unborn babies from abortion.

Science shows that life begins at conception and that a child in the womb is a distinct, developing, whole human being. That’s why
I’m 100% pro-life.

In Congress, I will defend the right to life, beginning with:

* Fighting to prohibit painful late-term abortions
* Ensuring that babies who survive abortions receive life-saving medical care
* Prohibiting taxpayers from paying for abortions

And that’s just the beginning. The pro-life movement is one of love and compassion, and we must also work to ensure that moms have
the care and support they need to choose life, whether it means raising the child or putting the child up for adoption.

Every life is worth living and holds promise, even if disadvantaged by developmental disability, injury, disease, or advanced
aging.

Watch Jennifer-Ruth’s Video on National Down Syndrome Day [http://email.mail-1.jennifer-ruthgreen.com/c/eJwVjsFugzAMhp-G3IockwA75NDDujJNk7Zqq7RLlTgBsqbAgC3q2y9Iluz_t_Tpo4u36nDcN_fl8Xo6ybfXSRdDE84sjLT93Asdv9rmB2N3Fvc51ubjk1kFkkhL5hUCIgiQaddY59ygwQpAl62RlaVMwE37sOP5txsG37p5N_-ufTc7N-Q03livRCmR60pIi-SsK0ECcQHaShJWIrKg-nWdlqzYZ3hIE2PMW03OjON1Y6Tq2Q3vCfu0YVP889aNSzo4ViiL8gELFCC4YLOyU_Qh-KWsklu3yW2Mf5BPUeY] True
compassion means finding ways to ease suffering and providing care for each person while maintaining the individual’s life and
dignity.

I hope you will spread the word about these exciting endorsements from Indiana Right to Life and Susan B. Anthony List, and my
commitment to advance laws that will protect life and stop the radical pro-abortion agenda of the radical left.

Sincerely,

name: Jim Jordan
subject: POLL: Will you personally endorse me for reelection?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
I've decided to run for reelection in 2022. The Republican Primary is on May 3rd and we're asking for you to personally endorse my campaign before Ele It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=00ca01f6509e4a6d9c826364e853d655&_e=lfxmVpnpG3qQVgtidHmDIIfVQcAi_wyaOekWcGa3nY7EYZZw4gWud0YQJMOC9C7tapgR0KlTPvEibeEwlbZvrjhoWMFjPg8_F0EXsycT6bLUD70YhX_87ktQnkjCSFFzYYAK29MQDJyq54YyWEkcXiZ6ExRsA7ELvsmWtrqckwhpzaoY2wYj7ZQMtIXEXfqfZCUGNE0uLcKOAixC7T9X7le1BVPc8GfqFL4B0pAXDE9Skio5ddPKwXBzTHbVZgQ0qO_MpfXW0pfIXlsYyFlykEderDa7YVOl0lIz9WWrDAU-DI3XleY1A0QKLBDxUxt-xwvEllVR589XH6HYL1Y-ZAyB92NFuaHcCnUUnZZELLPmmq1rcVdx6ipP5De8hFO1KyDEI3nNCZFb4gEtLyZYDFZxH-cDcoaAV4WnT3ndzkQYa5nDf8O9Zn7yjyWCNY9myAmtk-vaIIXmpu5J4mHbcFj_Xs86IytxxokUXX1fzYg%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve been fighting for you and for the truth since I first was elected to Congress in November 2006. Since then, the voters of Ohio’s 4th Congressional District have continued to put their faith in me and have sent me back for two-year stints ever since.

I have never - and will never - take a single vote for granted. I will continue to work hard for every single vote; I’ve watched a lot of people lose their jobs because they forget who they report to; the American people.

**I will never take the position I currently hold for granted**.

For as long as the folks I represent continue putting their faith in me, **I’ll keep fighting every single day to make America a better version of itself.**

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=00ca01f6509e4a6d9c826364e853d655&_e=lfxmVpnpG3qQVgtidHmDIIfVQcAi_wyaOekWcGa3nY7EYZZw4gWud0YQJMOC9C7tapgR0KlTPvEibeEwlbZvrjhoWMFjPg8_F0EXsycT6bLUD70YhX_87ktQnkjCSFFzYYAK29MQDJyq54YyWEkcXiZ6ExRsA7ELvsmWtrqckwhpzaoY2wYj7ZQMtIXEXfqfZCUGNE0uLcKOAixC7T9X7le1BVPc8GfqFL4B0pAXDE9Skio5ddPKwXBzTHbVZgQ0qO_MpfXW0pfIXlsYyFlykJpJgcK9YrmfhdwaWTa20r9yyDLtECNLT_Hy0qutQZKzMHgGZ38tNIwrDx64h05C6nfix28pb6OC5qkcGITSoY4BLlejRB06e8GPvYcictf1CBMr6Fwf38sldgCuvN6h2YwYzJiNvf3cD2y1CpngCBblhTrv6Qx4ozXFdPV4MZ4oP_K0ej8wjznZkRgidTjlED9s3AxIuCRXjomZ8gkzAUw%3D)
I’ll work to hold the mainstream media accountable.
I’ll work to make sure you have all of the information YOU need when you go vote.

I’ll work to make sure Democrats in positions of power are held accountable for their lies to the American people; NO Representative should be out for personal gain when serving the American people in an ELECTED office.

But first, I have to win reelection. **[My primary on May 3rd is fast approaching and today I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll endorse me for re-election](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=00ca01f6509e4a6d9c826364e853d655&_e=lfxmVpnpG3qQVgtidHmDIIfVQcAi_wyaOekWcGa3nY7EYZZw4gWud0YQJMOC9C7tapgR0KlTPvEibeEwlbZvrjhoWMFjPg8_F0EXsycT6bLUD70YhX_87ktQnkjCSFFzYYAK29MQDJyq54YyWEkcXiZ6ExRsA7ELvsmWtrqckwhpzaoY2wYj7ZQMtIXEXfqfZCUGNE0uLcKOAixC7T9X7le1BVPc8GfqFL4B0pAXDE9Skio5ddPKwXBzTHbVZgQ0qO_MpfXW0pfIXlsYyFlykG-zl8npFzNBK72e2GMGNFFEQ0nXvQZZFwgkL1EUr6EnkJyMCeT2pNGTty5kg3lCumSiqvYwqIxYu89KpGfnrDeh2qgJThYbs9_draxeHhsEsJROrUCDDRrjToTBGkUF_xRBIqfKS2ahEORPWlRbR0mmOrmnp6wErAqcT78ugu0Ni4wJ-7mE-wWGxkHn8HbQ0-CXBJBo3l-fqU3p1L5eloU%3D)**.

I’ll only be able to continue fighting on your behalf for as long as I’m in Congress, **[which is why I’m asking for your support today.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=00ca01f6509e4a6d9c826364e853d655&_e=lfxmVpnpG3qQVgtidHmDIIfVQcAi_wyaOekWcGa3nY7EYZZw4gWud0YQJMOC9C7tapgR0KlTPvEibeEwlbZvrjhoWMFjPg8_F0EXsycT6bLUD70YhX_87ktQnkjCSFFzYYAK29MQDJyq54YyWEkcXiZ6ExRsA7ELvsmWtrqckwhpzaoY2wYj7ZQMtIXEXfqfZCUGNE0uLcKOAixC7T9X7le1BVPc8GfqFL4B0pAXDE9Skio5ddPKwXBzTHbVZgQ0qO_MpfXW0pfIXlsYyFlykHG5KOuFWzJ4TIQ3yw5NK6juvTFJTRBT9NsGTL0Hv5IpkUI05la0-mmK1g1qvoIB2eXmpk5lgMX6Shx6TErgTU79La4yTP2uyb_FmY4-1U-RziBP-1L3nknTEkeS15w1LpMV2Xrqg81rMJMXjSlT59Yf0tZmT6zqZLts5q6Wc6xpjEQh9iqcpl60VhOZN6OBvHpczG-vcMBNSpAhafGua9g%3D)** It’s imperative we have strong conservative voices who are willing to speak up for the truth. I assure you that I’m worthy of your support and **[I hope you’ll offer your endorsement of my candidacy today](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=00ca01f6509e4a6d9c826364e853d655&_e=lfxmVpnpG3qQVgtidHmDIIfVQcAi_wyaOekWcGa3nY7EYZZw4gWud0YQJMOC9C7tapgR0KlTPvEibeEwlbZvrjhoWMFjPg8_F0EXsycT6bLUD70YhX_87ktQnkjCSFFzYYAK29MQDJyq54YyWEkcXiZ6ExRsA7ELvsmWtrqckwhpzaoY2wYj7ZQMtIXEXfqfZCUGNE0uLcKOAixC7T9X7le1BVPc8GfqFL4B0pAXDE9Skio5ddPKwXBzTHbVZgQ0qO_MpfXW0pfIXlsYyFlykM3FJkMRUtA1IlBzSD1FVLSG6g63iPd6lFRErAovQajBZovx35xAFWM3zADgrBFaYBt1kfbn_2rPGui9sJ3XnZhpEHuok5bfmxssjFhpAsVPUjgrkyAGoX9G2W2lClymTdltb8QbJBkJNokVRFQ2UOeHluu9bOElSXJs4xI8sS023nMogGLTNDIg1qTPHL8Esrp7QJ17wyT-wPwv7kNULj4%3D)**.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=00ca01f6509e4a6d9c826364e853d655&_e=lfxmVpnpG3qQVgtidHmDIIfVQcAi_wyaOekWcGa3nY7EYZZw4gWud0YQJMOC9C7tapgR0KlTPvEibeEwlbZvrjhoWMFjPg8_F0EXsycT6bLUD70YhX_87ktQnkjCSFFzYYAK29MQDJyq54YyWEkcXiZ6ExRsA7ELvsmWtrqckwhpzaoY2wYj7ZQMtIXEXfqfZCUGNE0uLcKOAixC7T9X7le1BVPc8GfqFL4B0pAXDE9Skio5ddPKwXBzTHbVZgQ0qO_MpfXW0pfIXlsYyFlykFuW-mMUzh6QFYloJsRdSFcv1nE7gTO1qxh03VsCD_lyYnelkadvOU_v6DpnwUJETtL2Aj_qaoMv2_nOU-obU0ay5YLbDFuhoTC4EBfPaMC75VpwcHte7p_Xk0wVXepsIfQ6M-sSruky2_MkOFZ1wgurBwIH2a_d1fnld374w9V1yGR097xQwlfReAJzwFCmlRmbG4Q45mztDzvnql8UYUk%3D)
We’ve got so much work to do in the remaining three years Joe Biden has in the White House.

Biden and his people have no idea what they’re doing and it’s going to take a herculean effort on the part of House Republicans to keep them from ruining our country; to keep Big Tech and big media from colluding to keep the truth about this White House -- and the people at the helm – from the**American people**.

I hope if you’re still reading this email, you’ll **[take a moment to offer your personal endorsement of my campaign](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=00ca01f6509e4a6d9c826364e853d655&_e=lfxmVpnpG3qQVgtidHmDIIfVQcAi_wyaOekWcGa3nY7EYZZw4gWud0YQJMOC9C7tapgR0KlTPvEibeEwlbZvrjhoWMFjPg8_F0EXsycT6bLUD70YhX_87ktQnkjCSFFzYYAK29MQDJyq54YyWEkcXiZ6ExRsA7ELvsmWtrqckwhpzaoY2wYj7ZQMtIXEXfqfZCUGNE0uLcKOAixC7T9X7le1BVPc8GfqFL4B0pAXDE9Skio5ddPKwXBzTHbVZgQ0qO_MpfXW0pfIXlsYyFlykLf7hVc4Cw5eeVNKWrJU-PK1E1_Inu-tefbC6zq3_8SRlPo4k-ko_LGGeT7t5uZIXgbJ0MpVGI6Q8v-RzUlbv-jRodGTyfsKogRXHIzYmxBN_lDs9ZPFbn6v2PgxRFmewxuvPiby9ujcCD6qKsn-FmTaJCYTQJDmrvFBh2WmheciTGTD1D3y3F5kwHSHnWSvR43kdq2ilE5B5aH7r9v_5Dw%3D)**.

Thank you so much,
Jim Jordan

Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=00ca01f6509e4a6d9c826364e853d655&_t=IPbAwYamXJeoSZHjqDV-cjACRmHs_dltdfUeGShU7IUQ99ZyAC2GQ-yJY570aN_G9bz-vHpBV8iSVCruoz3dsXRjF5Ne610T5KrkVgXuN9tv9bgquem8tezhNiYAHS_zcy8NMzhaU5lc_jFg1zG2XsPLdW4pAHsXrr5k8i3xWFs%3D)

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

name: Team WisGOP
subject: FINAL REMINDER!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
Polls close at 8PM!

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=polls_closing&n=1)
---
Hi Friend -- **There are only a few more hours left to cast your ballot!** If you have not already cast your ballot, we urge you to **go to your** **polling location before 8:00 pm**. Your lives and the lives of your family members and children are most impacted by local government. **Don't let the opportunity to impact your community pass you by!** Every vote matters, and your family, friends, and neighbors are depending on you to get out and vote! Send them to **[myvote.wi.gov](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=6tHPUOz_QyJBsFbb3HDnJj2oXbbIoglmEkF7rO8ZMAeBuay5CGbW87_VUow_ACcN&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=polls_closing&n=2)** for info on what districts they are located in and redirect them to the appropriate county party website/Facebook for their voter guide. **Remember, Polls close at 8:00pm**. Thank you, Team WisGOP
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6myz1ydj26pS20sqllUBZd4&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=polls_closing&n=3) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tr24D9XbJYDft_QizpripYs&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=polls_closing&n=4) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y0VJVp2OCKNw8zDVmWeSo7yP6jlGmDIaYIm5b1oT1T4S&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=polls_closing&n=5) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=polls_closing&n=6)

Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin.
Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate's Committee.
148 E Johnson St, Madison, WI 53703 | (608) 257 - 4765

This email was sent to [Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com](mailto:Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://act.wisgop.org/unsubscribe?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=polls_closing&n=7).
WISGOP · 148 E Johnson St · Madison, WI 53703-2120 · USA

name: Erica Smith HQ
subject: Missing your endorsement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

We’re exactly 42 days away from Primary Election Day.

We’ve been building a powerful movement for working people in NC-01 and
across the country. And we’re in the home stretch.

Over the last few months, our campaign has earned endorsements from dozens
of local elected officials and powerhouse progressive groups like
Democracy for America, The Collective PAC, Elect Black Women, and Planned
Parenthood. Now, we’re hoping to receive another important endorsement
— YOURS!

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/es-em-202204-05-endorse-erica-smith?refcode=em20220405-1&t=1001&akid=1062%2E3698%2EhGiN_O ]Will you
sign your name to personally endorse Erica? If enough people give their
endorsement, it will say a lot about the power of our grassroots movement
we’re building to win NC-01.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/es-em-202204-05-endorse-erica-smith?refcode=em20220405-1062&t=1002&akid=1062%2E3698%2EhGiN_O ]Add your endorsement

NC-01 is a highly competitive, must-win seat for Democrats, and
Republicans know this race is going to be extremely close. Our top GOP
opponent, Sandy Smith, is a Trumpist insurrectionist with a deep
Republican war chest, and the Republican establishment backing her.

We can’t afford to lose this seat to a right-wing extremist like Sandy
Smith especially when our Democratic majority is hanging by a thread.

As a three-term state senator, mom, and minister, Erica is a true champion
for working families. She has what it takes to win this race, but we have
to show that the people are united behind her as we quickly approach the
primary.

Every endorsement, donation, and supporter sharing our message with a
friend or family member will make a big difference.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/es-em-202204-05-endorse-erica-smith?refcode=em20220405-1&t=1003&akid=1062%2E3698%2EhGiN_O ]So, will you endorse Erica and our campaign today? Your personal
endorsement will show the strength of our grassroots movement and help us
build even more support moving forward.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/es-em-202204-05-endorse-erica-smith?refcode=em20220405-1062&t=1004&akid=1062%2E3698%2EhGiN_O ]Add your endorsement

Thank you for your unwavering support,

Erica Smith HQ

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220405-1062-footer&t=1005&refcode2=1062_3698_hGiN_O&akid=1062%2E3698%2EhGiN_O

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1062%2E3698%2EhGiN_O

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

subject: Bumping this to the top of your inbox

body:
_I know she really wanted you to see this_

|
---

Hey --

I’m one of Jane’s campaign managers and I’m forwarding this email she sent you. She is hoping you’ll take a second to read this and **_[chip in today to ensure Ohio’s Senate seat stays RED.](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=000ad8e780e94cdcabbe48134b2314da&_m=fad3789141724d98ab406559b6a816b8&_e=T_sTNQ0h6SaQinQH8x_2OiOl6bPhfpjG_glPavTGqRNwrv8KBJhvr2275Tp-cZWIAQzwknPHThyj3Zj2GCELnbLoJaS9TdOvcIY_H5TEuwqr8eNMq3E6s0MlQmjSUgbOA_agttKmyN67UmkZ78TuOYib98asd9kGkABi0G-9mWNFIhoUKu0-LsvwNLW72rMY8W8agoyvmdNjzFWxAAmVkL5-993J6EpMY4LOuJh2hbiq_js4_RMShnFD4tERVmP5BbLLTR2bD-sQ1UEZlYueWI9kRHkJ0_9yTfQ2UmlYeCnjdCwqTXiHVZQThIE73nTTQQAZvYfyH_jILVzFchbNoi1N0NVUH0gHgjBCb_3EqPazLTJhYbXcAjEdwHWVs5S0K6FjPjqB3BvPLbel0JSez9aZDatkFrhfJCnMCzMyjse3Gklek6BBkVbnfVsZ2zDhWjrJ--Hf9eiDtuTJY5IM7XLo45REHI79wnpRHFTUOatMW42KjfERnHvqJuUXKzaaiZP2aH0tRdQaI6kQFTEeWQ%3D%3D)_**

> **Subject:** Fwd: quick thought...
> **To:** Sarah, Finance
> **From:** Jane's iPhone
> **Date:** Mon, April 4, 2022 at 7:34 PM
>
>> Hey guys, it’s Jane Timken.
>
> Dropping a quick note for you. name: Tim Ryan
subject: No ifs, ands, or buts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3153%2E3611125%2E_NZlgR ][IMG]

Friend,

Growing up in a union family, I learned that all work has dignity. No ifs,
ands, or buts.

I don’t care what your job is—if you’re out there busting your rear end,
you should have a little breathing room. You should have time for the
things that make life worth living, like Saturday football games and
Sunday family dinners.

I’m running for the U.S. Senate to cut workers in on the deal—because if
you work hard for your country, your country should work hard for you.

That’s why we launched our Workers First Tour to travel across Ohio, from
union halls to factory floors to small-town restaurants, to hear about the
challenges workers are facing. That’s why all of our Team Ryan merch is
USA-made and union-printed. Heck, ours was the first Senate campaign in
Ohio history to unionize.

Now, we have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to tilt the balance of
power back to working people in this country. But Mitch McConnell and his
wealthy friends will do everything they can to stop us from changing the
status quo.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10260?t=1009&amount=25&akid=3153%2E3611125%2E_NZlgR ]I need you with me in this fight. Can I count on you to chip in $25 or
more today to make sure we have the resources we need to flip this
battleground seat and expand our Democratic majority so we can finally cut
workers in on the deal?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10260?t=1010&amount=25&akid=3153%2E3611125%2E_NZlgR ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10260?t=1011&amount=50&akid=3153%2E3611125%2E_NZlgR ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10260?t=1012&amount=100&akid=3153%2E3611125%2E_NZlgR ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10260?t=1013&amount=200&akid=3153%2E3611125%2E_NZlgR ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10260?t=1014&amount=250&akid=3153%2E3611125%2E_NZlgR ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10260?t=1015&amount=30&akid=3153%2E3611125%2E_NZlgR ]Other Amount

My GOP opponents might have billionaire donors behind them, but let’s see
them try to take on the steelworkers, teachers, health care techs, and
carpenters we have in our corner.

This campaign is union strong, because we’re union built. And I wouldn’t
have it any other way.

In solidarity,

Tim Ryan

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10259?t=1007&akid=3153%2E3611125%2E_NZlgR ]Tim Ryan

name: Team Evergreen
subject: You, Sen. Warren, and the "Don't Look Up" writers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Tomorrow, we're talking "Don't Look Up"—RSVP now!
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4298?t=2&akid=12960%2E53494%2EyPFzn9) Friend, Tomorrow, pop culture, energy policy, and the climate crisis will collide at an exciting virtual event—and we want you to be there! Along with the Progressive Change Campaign Committee, we're hosting a Zoom panel with Senator Elizabeth Warren and the writers of the hit film "Don't Look Up." [_**Will you RSVP now to join us, Senator Warren, and recent Academy Award nominees Adam McKay and David Sirota tomorrow, Wednesday 4/6 at 3:30 p.m. ET / 12:30 p.m. PT?**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4298?t=3&akid=12960%2E53494%2EyPFzn9) | [RSVP](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4298?t=4&akid=12960%2E53494%2EyPFzn9)
---
When "Don't Look Up" premiered last December, it spurred a national conversation and begged the question: **How do we turn climate awareness into substantive climate action from our leaders?**
Well, that's exactly what we're discussing at tomorrow's virtual event—and as a dedicated member of our climate advocacy community, we'd love to see you there! (You'll be in good company—Evergreen Executive Director Jamal Raad will be there to ask a question and participate!)
The event is part of a joint campaign led by the PCCC, Evergreen Action, and nearly 100 organizations calling on Democratic leaders to advance a clear, popular, on-offense message on this topic:
_"Russia's invasion of Ukraine reaffirms that America must lead the world in a clean energy transition. Our dependence on fossil fuel empowers authoritarians like Vladimir Putin, rogue oil-producing nations, and price-gouging oil companies. For the sake of our national security and planet, we call on America's leaders to take immediate action to invest in domestic clean energy jobs and end our dependence on fossil fuel."_
[_**RSVP now to join us tomorrow, Wednesday 4/6 at 3:30 p.m. ET / 12:30 p.m. PT, to discuss turning climate awareness into climate action with Senator Elizabeth Warren and "Don't Look Up" writers Adam McKay and David Sirota!**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4298?t=5&akid=12960%2E53494%2EyPFzn9)
[RSVP](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4298?t=6&akid=12960%2E53494%2EyPFzn9)
---
– Team Evergreen
P.S. Beyond this event, expect to hear a lot more from us connecting the dots on Ukraine, energy security, and how we can stop petro-dictators like Vladimir Putin. It's a critical topic and we'll be sending you a series of emails on what you need to know and how you can take action. Stay tuned!
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=12960%2E53494%2EyPFzn9). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---
All content © 2022 EVERGREEN ACTION, All Rights Reserved
[Privacy Policy](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/287?t=1&akid=12960%2E53494%2EyPFzn9)

This year alone, Kim and her Democratic colleagues in the House have passed legislation to strengthen the postal service, reduce prescription drug prices, and address supply chain issues. And last month, Kim helped secure funding for 10 community projects in our district which will expand broadband access, improve forest health, and more.

While Kim has gotten a lot done for our district, there's still more ahead of us, and we want to know your priorities. We'll be sharing your feedback with Kim in just a few days so don't miss your chance to make your voice heard.

name: Peter Welch
subject: Spring in Vermont
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
One of my favorite times of year:

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=186%2E61531%2Ed7KVbL)
Hello,
Spring is one of my favorite times of year in Vermont.
The scenic landscapes, the unparalleled natural beauty, all the opportunities to get out and hike and enjoy the great outdoors—our environment is a treasure for Vermonters, and it invites tourists who help drive our economy.
**But climate change threatens all of this, year round.** If we don’t act with urgency to address this crisis, temperatures will keep rising, damaging not only the environment, but our livelihoods and quality of life. But we still have hope, and we still have time to fight back—with a Green New Deal.
**[If you agree it’s time to pass a Green New Deal to protect our planet, add your name right away.](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-green-new-deal/?source=em_20220405_p_p_gnd&t=4&akid=186%2E61531%2Ed7KVbL) **
In Congress, I’ve fought for decades for a clean energy future and to combat the climate crisis, so I know first-hand what’s at stake—and what we can achieve together.
We can establish a national renewable energy standard, accelerate the adoption of electric vehicles, create thousands of good-paying jobs, and more. But we need Congress to acknowledge the urgency of this moment, and Republicans in Washington keep burying their heads in the sand.
I’m running for Senate to look out for Vermonters, protect our Democratic majority, and make sure we can tackle big issues like climate change.
******[It’s time for a Green New Deal. Add your name if you agree.](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-green-new-deal/?source=em_20220405_p_p_gnd&t=5&akid=186%2E61531%2Ed7KVbL) **
Thanks for taking action,
Peter

---
| [DONATE ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pwfv-em-22apr?refcode=em_20220405_p_p_gnd&refcode2=186_61531_d7KVbL&akid=186%2E61531%2Ed7KVbL)

clean_body: | Fellow patriot, ALERT: DEMS ARE CALLING FOR JUSTICE CLARENCE THOMAS TO BE IMPEACHED. With One Seat Separating Senate Republicans from the majority, our success is now more important than EVER. We cannot let Senate Democrats win this ELECTION -- KEEP THEIR MAJORITY – AND IMPEACH JUSTICE CLARENCE THOMAS. Right now, AOC is the loudest voice calling for Justice Thomas’ resignation. But soon it’s going to be Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren. If we are unable to win back the majority this November, you can count on Senate DEMS to not only pack the Supreme Court, but they could move to impeach any justice they disagree with. KISS THE CONSERVATIVE COURT MAJORITY GOODBYE! . Our future is at stake, and we need you on board. President Biden has gone so far as to FIRE me from a non-partisan council on fitness! Democrats know that my opponent is the most vulnerable Senate Democrat in the country. They also know that conservatives only need to pick up one Senate seat to win back a Republican majority. Most importantly, they know that we can win. That's why they are coming after me. Fellow American, I can handle these attacks from Democrats if I know you're with me. We are counting on you and other conservative champions to step up NOW to show the strength of Team Herschel. We're so gratefully that you're with us. Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

body:
It’s time to have open and honest conversations about how we’re going to change. | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsxXG0f8ek4uZkUFvu9y_DsSuzSaiwdJwfeQrLHMWNTZil2jaUWxS8HOCX5UhaiamX2sttSZ0vBa3WWx-9U6E0VATr70_OKzxL6NGLnmpbYmbjjS_wmhk0V2wVIUtbm_hT3LIAhQ-ouAwOOgLe3NnP-97C4GE2lE-ZSBYKrSjodGBtEx7LdAaNM_OWdqJc2-bVvaDCPOac6crGKgnSzdJ6jSHDrMQmx6dz5vOK9tqz7Nzs6VXXyG9j6x76im50j-PsTsogdzDs0fnfI--OP0pawbT-Gqh1YUFVI_tnhWvKXf2bnNsQEm9lfwZ4nmOSEzg27iNuI4ZitSfROsvLNbR2gjn-CGoazI1Wq9dFPSU_5Q/3ky/ZUt465TnRrmERgWaaDjIHA/h0/ny2BeP5sOxL2_W-Y_rR0Qpy7IEYyQWX44s1tPVL4cVg) Friend,

Earlier this month we told you about our campaign strategy to place hyper-targeted newspaper ads in key areas of our district that expose Ryan Zinke for being a fake Montanan — since he spends the majority of his time in California.

**But real, hard-working people in Western Montana are waking up this week, pouring their morning coffee, and pulling out the morning paper and seeing this:**

[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsxXG0f8ek4uZkUFvu9y_DqtjcZrc9CcsN11zwcf6XlIxsdGqG1OcEy0GuLjqcBTns5Sb3UZWgfPC-RuqIVPRigHLVQspxdiZvEucXMoQ3dHsxccdjEjhWQKhdOCktHvy6nvED1Zr0p3VofqG1rzTykHTshV6N9TcrJnm2XgD5bGf-CPZ2u-eyV1Cj0zZ4GMZWHYm7tbg68nb_E5_5g8TPsNwnsn-nBFmEGprqcB2_E-V8YHO35t9QFRvt-yk1TELDu2pdiS2UUMJGOcP0QfjOFMEb1_9h5VfHF7WuliQUiuhuFZcRYPjTQK1XGpsNp1A1vFm-v0lihCRNtW_QfRZnqd9uQTdQPhv4Z2v9HXvVBeYDDMmct1CBaXRZl_7lafA/3ky/ZUt465TnRrmERgWaaDjIHA/h1/nbsKtEeaFom18Ey8Ee6DvNoUF1wgBUMzAsaX0EFam9M)
As one of our top supporters, we wanted to make sure you were among the first to know that the ads supporters helped fund have been seen by important swing voters that will ultimately be deciding this election.

**We were so excited about the response from folks like you when we announced that we’d be running these ads — so thank you from the bottom of our hearts for your support.**

Together, we are building a campaign that is not only exposing just how corrupt Ryan Zinke is — and how dangerous he would be for Montana if he returned to Washington. But we’re also running a campaign that focuses on real issues facing our communities.

We’re never going to get back the safe, stable lives Montana used to provide unless we have open and honest conversations about how out-of-state billionaires have stolen our Montana way of life. Things aren’t the way they used to be, and we have the greedy elite class — which includes Ryan Zinke — to thank.

**Placing these newspaper ads is adding to these open and honest conversations, but if we can get 25 more donations by midnight tonight, we will be able to ramp up our voter contact efforts even more as we head into the heat of election season.**

_**[Will you be one of the 25 donations we’re counting on to help grow our progressive, grassroots campaign?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsxXG0f8ek4uZkUFvu9y_DqtjcZrc9CcsN11zwcf6XlIxsdGqG1OcEy0GuLjqcBTns5Sb3UZWgfPC-RuqIVPRigHLVQspxdiZvEucXMoQ3dGOxCiqLb_O9REI24VJRXYisX_Ac4pIbennHWwEn2gvpPrEXbR6T8rmJUA-7QYfPIksFhJGNgCV-TgPi_DnXBx-jrMAcVznu8pSVyrpPvxg4ygUsYq0iZp23XRQQ6sYOAWPT-bTJ6sbN9MbXx6DaLfIgLgC_N8se8xPmJZSgndPK50oO8jfpC4HxhHn0j6E7yQuIilx6A1IzSi2KVDi19iNjb-YqLpICZxPd8rbxhoXnV6gD4PBcDXRbpRYD0xmGPVLhLYW8aousDaCYVziO1bY/3ky/ZUt465TnRrmERgWaaDjIHA/h2/DYju3bYng7pX8x3JXUTd9s-pqdZCS23XyVlTtz56NlA)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Emily=20Beach?=
subject: You Bet Experience Matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Beach for Congress
body:
I served as a U.S. Army captain | | | | [ ](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=500f01d048&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| | | Peter,

I’m glad candidates are talking about experience leading up to the June primary. I wouldn’t trade my powerful, real-life experience with any other candidate in this race.

I served as a captain in the U.S. Army, working and living in Saudi Arabia, Korea, and Texas. I understand firsthand the impact decisions made by Congress have on those who serve, their families, and their communities.

In such dangerous times around the world, **we need veterans in Congress helping to make decisions about foreign policy, including whether to send America's daughters and sons into harm's way,_and_ how to care for them when they return home. **Veterans, like all Americans, deserve quality health care, affordable housing, and training and placement for high-quality, fair-paying jobs. **We also need veterans, who understand the dangerous tools of warfare to fight for common sense gun-control – particularly as yet another senseless mass-shooting tragedy unfolded last weekend in Sacramento.**

**Veterans know how to bring people with diverse backgrounds together to overcome differences and put our nation’s interests above partisan politics.** Unfortunately, only 17% of Congress are veterans, the lowest level since at least World War II. As recently as the 1970’s, 73% of Congress had military experience.

**[Will you take a stand and join us today to show your support for electing more veterans in Congress?](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=107b5a3f1b&e=de8b2615ea)**
---
| [ ](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=e761eb7dcc&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| I am also the only woman running in an already underrepresented Congress where women hold only 27% of the seats and freedom of choice is under attack across the country. **We need more women in Congress fighting for reproductive freedom, gender equality, paid parental leave, the ERA, early learning, and affordable childcare when Rep. Jackie Speier retires.**

There’s so much of our future at stake in this election, we need leaders with the experience, passion, commitment to stand up for our rights, and the real-world experience required to make sound decisions. [Join us and volunteer today, we need your help now!](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=6072f1a794&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| [ ](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=c29268bc7f&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| **Please join us this Saturday, 4/9!** We are canvassing in two locations: [Downtown San Mateo at 10:30 am](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=5d4815c955&e=de8b2615ea) and in [San Carlos at 12:30 pm](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=0d9994f75d&e=de8b2615ea). If you’ve never canvassed this is a great opportunity to try something new. We will have all the materials you need and will provide training. [**RSVP for Saturday here!**](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=70a065ca34&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| Onward–

Emily Beach
---
| P.S. Have you seen our new ad yet? Check it out below and please [like and share on social media today!](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=0069f1a2e6&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| [ ](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=60d7805156&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=77d6e19996&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| | [](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=0772e962f9&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| | [](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=e334c42672&e=de8b2615ea)
---

Peter,

Last year Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

Nancy Mace has drawn a clear line: she won’t do anything that angers party leadership or her Big Pharma donors, no matter what she personally supports.

| Congress is working to cap the cost of insulin at $35 a month, a move that is _overwhelmingly supported_ by American families.

Nancy Mace, however, doesn’t care about what American families want – she only cares about herself – which is why we weren’t surprised to hear she voted AGAINST this legislation.

Annie knows firsthand how out of control drug prices are in our nation, and supports taking congressional action to address this issue because **paying for life-saving drugs like insulin shouldn’t put families in debt.**

As a doctor, Annie understands that South Carolinians need relief from the rising costs of prescription drugs—the US pays up to 10 times more for prescription medications than people in other countries. This is the direct result of bad healthcare policy.

Nancy Mace has drawn a clear line: she won’t do anything that angers party leadership or her Big Pharma donors, no matter what she personally supports. The Lowcountry deserves a leader who understands how bad policies impact the health of Lowcountry families.

Friend,

Did you hear the news?

Today, Yesli Vega announced that Rooz Dadabhoy, one of the masterminds and State Director of “Women for Glenn” **has endorsed Yesli’s campaign for Congress in Virginia’s 7th District and will serve as chair of Yesli’s “Women for Vega” coalition. **Rooz Dadabhoy was _instrumental_ in helping organize and turn out women for Governor Youngkin’s **historic win** in Virginia in 2021.
| [**SUPPORT WOMEN FOR VEGA** ](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=942909bcd7154d0cbcdc8951657e9e02&_e=PsYsJT_nwhojYem3spX5jGv9NttR4MGlo8nzjqYSIWaOQauXZCKGtLTVndrEbiTHzIaNWTdvcY1cZfUjlSAo7T6cQAgiNh00QkD0k-5rT9XdKrs_bdPTttF2pkdERUXkezUlI4X4Oao4UjEIgDXKXmurc3S5EG7kwGCmEm4KihvCz76MSl0YW637hyTqaEhGx82vq7czKaHyqZjlUS6UiS9viWOGalIrugPcvqp6Zdz-HrHG9bzrCVo5XMMi_tAWlUzN1nP9DzCeKGbv5ReQIroqZlmJKOKacMxjRS9GZLluAXZM2ZM-I8_qzM6x1CRgLHSI-q7w_rFNaprrbHk8de-0dkxKsRihsOKy1avYOJRW_K6sxsVjlojPdx8J-j_OiO25RxZKT8dtMbTCsnJHeaIBDx6z96hrRTbXGHasH5L3dLyMogBTWRx1hq8G_G46Qgy7w7x5Iz9RZFWRKSOT7QlRtxvjl74FB0Qi615fVsfgfrRCDeTTdNaEU0e8bJ8S)
---
_**Says Rooz Dadabhoy, State Director of Women for Glenn and Chair of Women for Vega:**_

“**I’m proud to endorse Yesli Vega in her race to unseat Abigail Spanberger** and help _**take back Virginia’s 7th Congressional District**_ as the Chair of Women for Vega. When it comes to keeping our communities safe, I know Yesli will do everything she can to ensure our families and children are safe from crime.

And as a mother, she will continue to fight for our children and their parents to keep CRT and the federal government out of our education systems in Virginia.

__**I have no doubt in my mind that Yesli is the only Republican who can win in November and send Abigail Spanberger packing.**_**”**_ [**DONATE $5 TO YESLI TODAY** ](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=942909bcd7154d0cbcdc8951657e9e02&_e=PsYsJT_nwhojYem3spX5jGv9NttR4MGlo8nzjqYSIWaOQauXZCKGtLTVndrEbiTHzIaNWTdvcY1cZfUjlSAo7T6cQAgiNh00QkD0k-5rT9XdKrs_bdPTttF2pkdERUXkezUlI4X4Oao4UjEIgDXKXmurc3S5EG7kwGCmEm4KihvCz76MSl0YW637hyTqaEhGx82vq7czKaHyqZjlUS6UiS9viWOGalIrugPcvqp6Zdz-HrHG9bzrCVo5XMMi_tAWlUzN1nP9DzCeKGbv5ReQIroqZlmJKOKacMxjRS9GZLnXjYa_GCXOF-16ZZd18VqCMNlujfdR67vz-nJlx-HYUc_5VlnNadtjp2bSzvpWg-E-n_z0ftXMu9AkhvxV1wNJ7jG7hb6l5586RuZN-KK1NOIWMxA4RgZHvKbRgPWOKfvkckAv9gbjRC_dG-dA4cQHb2pxGioOaJpipHjqOgl8nr8CIz8f2JzLcCgv9eEq7JUIClpJkIeqnlEImLfhrkyX)
---

Yesli shares that “We are _so excited_ to have Rooz leading the charge as the Chair of Women for Vega. The number of hours she put in to help elect Governor Youngkin this past year was incredible and it’s _**great to have someone of her caliber playing a critical role in our campaign. **_Team Vega continues to grow by the day and with the support of Virginians like Rooz, we’re well on our way to **defeating Abigail Spanberger** and **Taking Back the House** this November.”

_God Bless,

Team Vega_

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Add your name: Confirm Judge Jackson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
We could make history.
#
Peter, I'm **[asking for your help to make history.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43815893/338824813/899282012?ms=dd_em_220405_1&refcode=dd_em_220405_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzgyNmNmOS0zMGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kjaFZy1AcTob1Xo4rxADxmVFoZdTyI7qXH7VnnnZdTg=&emci=bca51091-29b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=b7826cf9-30b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2727974)**
Right now, I’m joining my colleagues in supporting Judge Jackson’s historic nomination to the Supreme Court. Later this week, we will vote on her final confirmation.
If confirmed, she would be the first Black woman to sit on the Supreme Court. She’s appeared before the Senate Judiciary Committee multiple times before–earning bipartisan support each time. She has the backing of legal experts, the American Bar Association, and law enforcement organizations.
The evidence and her record are clear: Judge Jackson is exceptionally qualified to be our next Supreme Court Justice. So that’s why I’m asking:
**[Will you add your name now to support Judge Jackson’s bipartisan confirmation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43815894/338824814/899282012?ms=dd_em_220405_1&refcode=dd_em_220405_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzgyNmNmOS0zMGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kjaFZy1AcTob1Xo4rxADxmVFoZdTyI7qXH7VnnnZdTg=&emci=bca51091-29b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=b7826cf9-30b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2727974)**
By all accounts, Judge Jackson has been just, fair, and thorough in her career. Now, she’s poised to make history.
But we know that it’s thanks to the efforts of folks like you, Peter, that this is possible. When he was in control of the Senate, Mitch McConnell and the GOP refused to hold a single confirmation hearing to fill the Supreme Court vacancy under President Obama.
**[Take a moment now and add your name to urge the Senate to confirm Judge Jackson and fulfill its duty.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43815895/338824815/899282012?ms=dd_em_220405_1&refcode=dd_em_220405_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzgyNmNmOS0zMGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kjaFZy1AcTob1Xo4rxADxmVFoZdTyI7qXH7VnnnZdTg=&emci=bca51091-29b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=b7826cf9-30b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2727974)**
Thank you,
Dick Durbin

**[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43815896/338824816/899282012?ms=dd_em_220405_1&refcode=dd_em_220405_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzgyNmNmOS0zMGI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kjaFZy1AcTob1Xo4rxADxmVFoZdTyI7qXH7VnnnZdTg=&emci=bca51091-29b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=b7826cf9-30b5-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2727974)**

name: Laurie Teper
subject: Saturday + Other Needs
body:
Hello Team Geels!
Thank you to all the volunteers who have stepped up and helped out in some way, shape or form! I know your time is valuable and I appreciate your willingness to sacrifice it for the Geels Campaign. I believe our hard work will pay off! Swepsonville Day was a hit and very successful!

**This Saturday, April 9 we are Door Knocking in Person County from 8:00-12:00. Meet at Allensville Bottom Ball Field, 724 Gentry Ridge Rd in Roxboro. We will canvass in Allensville and Flat River precincts. Feel free to bring a friend!**

**Sign up HERE** : <https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10C0E4CADA629A3FACE9-canvassing>
Make sure you scroll down to the correct date. While you are there, look for other dates to sign up for.

An email will be sent on Friday with more instructions. The Campaign Sidekick App is necessary for one of two people in a car.

**_For those downloading the free Campaign Sidekick App,_****_send me a text or email with your first/last name, address, phone number and email. We need this information to activate the App. Please do it as soon as you download it._**

OTHER NEEDS AT THIS TIME:
1. TOP NEED: HELP PUT SIGNS OUT IN YOUR COUNTY! **-** Contact me for information
2. Orange County Coordinator - Contact me for information
3. Phone Banking - Contact me for information
4. Host a Meet and Greet - It can be at your home, a restaurant or bar! Invite neighbors, friends and family in District 4 to meet Courtney and ask her questions.
5. Contact Granville and Orange County Fire Dept. Chiefs (or secretaries)- Find out when it would be a good time for Courtney to stop in. Contact me for a list.

Hope to see some of your faces on Saturday!

__Fighting for Truth, Justice and Unity Together!__ Laurie Teper
Volunteer Coordinator
Courtney Geels for Congress NC04
Email: [volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com](mailto:volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com)
Cell: (847)212-5651
[courtneygeelsforcongress.com](http://courtneygeelsforcongress.com)

clean_body: We are counting on you! | NOVEMBER IS CREEPING UP! | Friends, I was hoping it did not come down to this - but desperate times call for desperate measures! I know I have been asking you a lot lately, and you have already done so much to help me get closer to taking back the House. I am sure you already know that I won by six votes last time; we are even at HIGHER risk in 2022 because Pelosi is determined to hold onto the Speaker's gavel, and I REFUSE to let that happen. A generous conservative donor has graciously stepped up and offered to match 500% of any donation made before MIDNIGHT. Will you take this generous donor up on this once-in-a-lifetime offer? I am counting on you! This is a VERY exclusive offer that will not last long. I need you to act ASAP if we want to show Nancy Pelosi that this is her LAST year as Speaker of the House! Thank you for your support, Congresswoman Miller-Meeks Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress Miller-Meeks for Congress P.O. Box 33 Ottumwa, IA 52501 If you would like to send donation by mail,

name: Randolph Bracy
subject: They only need 5
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRACY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Our majority is at stake

Peter,

We already know the fight to keep our Democratic House majority in 2022 will be a tough one. Republicans only need to flip five seats — meanwhile, we have to hold blue seats, flip red seats, AND win open seats.

FL-10 is a crucial open seat, and the GOP is going to come at this race with everything they’ve got. Can you chip in $10 right now to help us protect our majority and keep FL-10 blue?
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?refcode=majority]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=majority] Express Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=majority] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=majority] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=majority] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=majority] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?refcode=majority]

The candidate to replace Val Demings in Congress needs to be someone with a history of fighting for police reform, for strong public education, for high-paying jobs — and winning.

That’s why I’m reaching out to you, Peter. I know you know how important this race is, and that we need to work hard to keep FL-10 blue.

And I know you know me. As the State Senator who has served 80% of FL-10, I've worked tirelessly to protect the rights of Floridians. I know this community, and have the experience and the record to get things done in Congress.

Will you join my fight to make a difference in D.C. and make sure we protect our Democratic majority in Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?refcode=majority]

Thanks,

Randolph

PAID FOR BY BRACY FOR CONGRESS
Randolph Bracy for Congress
P.O. Box 3096
Windermere, FL 34786
United States

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Us vs the establishment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

As a grassroots-oriented organization, transparency is a core value for
us, so for the sake of transparency, here’s some insight into what our
fundraising has looked like since the beginning of this year. Our
fundraising has significantly slowed down this year — all while the
establishment Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) has hit
record-breaking numbers month after month.

This chart shows our fundraising over the last four months. As you can see
from the orange trend line, we've had a steady decline.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/102557?refcode=em20220405-22734&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=22734%2E1203867%2EIbolmU ]Bar graph labeled by the months of 2022 trending down

2022 is going to be a big year for Justice Democrats. And we’re counting
on contributions from grassroots supporters to help us secure victories in
this critical election year. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/102557?refcode=em20220405-22734&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=22734%2E1203867%2EIbolmU ]Will you give $3 to help
reverse this downward fundraising trend and ensure we have the resources
to win in all our 2022 races?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/102557?refcode=em20220405-22734&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=22734%2E1203867%2EIbolmU ]Contribute $3

The DCCC raises money from Wall Street and corporate PACs to recruit
corporate candidates, protect incumbents, and maintain the status quo —
but 100% of what we raise goes towards electing working-class candidates
who will join Justice Democrats in Congress in fighting for progressive
changes.

Our organization works directly with our endorsed candidates to give them
the best possible shot at winning against the political establishment. Our
movement backed Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Ayanna Pressley, Cori Bush, and
Jamaal Bowman when they went up against the establishment and WON. And
with your help, we’ll do it again.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/102557?refcode=em20220405-22734&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=22734%2E1203867%2EIbolmU ]If you can afford it, chip in to support Justice Democrats today. Your
contributions — no matter the size — make a difference.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=22734%2E1203867%2EIbolmU ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=22734%2E1203867%2EIbolmU ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220405-22734-footer&t=1026&refcode2=22734_1203867_IbolmU&akid=22734%2E1203867%2EIbolmU

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=22734%2E1203867%2EIbolmU

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

And we’re counting on contributions from grassroots supporters to help us secure victories in this critical election year. [ ]Will you give $3 to help reverse this downward fundraising trend and ensure we have the resources to win in all our 2022 races? [ ]Contribute $3 The DCCC raises money from Wall Street and corporate PACs to recruit corporate candidates, protect incumbents, and maintain the status quo — but 100% of what we raise goes towards electing working-class candidates who will join Justice Democrats in Congress in fighting for progressive changes. Our organization works directly with our endorsed candidates to give them the best possible shot at winning against the political establishment. Our movement backed Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Ayanna Pressley, Cori Bush, and Jamaal Bowman when they went up against the establishment and WON. And with your help, we’ll do it again. [ ]If you can afford it, chip in to support Justice Democrats today. Your contributions — no matter the size — make a difference. In solidarity, Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

| Dear Patriot, I hope you had a nice vacation from COVID restrictions. **Because Anthony Fauci says they are all coming back.** Did you hear what he said? You might have missed it -- the media is sweeping it under the rug. But COVID "cases" are rising again, and now Fauci is once again saying that restrictions are going to be necessary. And many Democrat politicians are following his lead. In fact, major U.S. cities are now declaring a return of masks and social distancing -- and the rest of the country might be soon to follow. **The Philadelphia Department of Public Health declared that "Philadelphians should strongly consider wearing a mask while in public indoor spaces."** Joe Biden is clinging to the federal travel mask mandate, and has vowed to veto my bill to repeal it -- even though it already passed the Senate. The mayor of New York, Eric Adams, has continued forcing children to mask -- and even just recently fired a city employee for speaking up against the mask mandate. All of this is in the wake of Fauci saying that Americans "need to be prepared for the possibility" of the most tyrannical mandates returning. Even worse, Fauci said elsewhere that herd immunity to COVID might be "unattainable." If that's true, which is almost certainly is... ...and Fauci still believes that rising cases justify new restrictions... ...then that means the restrictions will continue forever. And to ensure that he has the power to do that, Fauci's Democrat allies are pouring money into a Left-wing campaign to remove me from the U.S. Senate. **They saw me hold Fauci's feet to the first numerous times in front of the entire country, and they said to each other "Rand Paul has got to go."** And they have made that one of their top priorities for this election cycle. But, I am not giving up so easily. My fight against Fauci and the COVID mob isn't over until every last restriction is gone forever. [Will you chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 so that I can stay in that fight?](https://trk.klclick2.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3DtPrb_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi74hZjs4WskDPkVWM4NZQaUiFZcvsbQUHbh3-2Fxa8XOnkqGmcVMF82sYlnfGOyJVMx79mOjDp9OWFGKsyWHV-2FhvQlNDv75ElavRjZyQyR40iTeGG7aPvJKcImJ-2BAcq2lNeEzHvod1DVk-2BWaSPSiMEuhKziPJhkMadt6dfOOO9GvcXsT8kGLUklvkjfk2haXEmEHHlLEkFDWQaQAKyzaz64tVdGsNGgAXlukz9wQSGQ6-2FDG7ZEWdgcvdX84GggdYavZY-2FZDfm8oAKtzXsgxzh5rsmY6oWJklpKrqk-2BXT5QF7uGgyynXMv5TM93onH7jaf685NcYwZSSQ7zm0Hgjw-2B07DMw-3D-3D) Your contribution will allow me to hit back against dishonest Democrat attacks on my character and my record as a U.S. Senator. It will allow me to get the truth out about all the things I have done to protect your freedoms from Fauci and his fellow bureaucrats. And it will allow me to keep up with the deep pockets of the radical Left, and their millionaire and billionaire corporate donors. You can make a real difference in this race, so that I can continue making a difference in the U.S. Senate. I can hold off this Democrat assault on our liberty, but it will not be easy. And I can only succeed if patriots like you stand with me. So please, help me out today so that the Democrats cannot steal any more of your God-given freedoms. [Please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 immediately so that I can stay in this fight and stop Fauci from bringing back the mandates.](https://trk.klclick2.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3DUfN1_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi74hZjs4WskDPkVWM4NZQaUiFZcvsbQUHbh3-2Fxa8XOnkqGmcVMF82sYlnfGOyJVMx79mOjDp9OWFGKsyWHV-2FhvQlNDv75ElavRjZyQyR40iTeGG7aPvJKcImJ-2BAcq2lNeEzHvod1DVk-2BWaSPSiMEuhK-2BV6aZicsVSknxYxwyxiLx5ZcBvoxQOqMlyrmq9Bxco-2Bv1o0bwzL-2FuxJ8psfN4jKXhPamZkFiKqMDxOjFfYi84YKunM2BP7jQGnTJk00c7PVu3iVaxgKbyuAtL0wU5u9FHFfq-2FuIQwSLZzctui7H-2FW0CfL2HuY4wrxWSybTY6FjuEY5vXdNzNQf19Kta-2BGCE6g-3D-3D) In Liberty, Rand Paul ****

The mayor of New York, Eric Adams, has continued forcing children to mask -- and even just recently fired a city employee for speaking up against the mask mandate. All of this is in the wake of Fauci saying that Americans "need to be prepared for the possibility" of the most tyrannical mandates returning. Even worse, Fauci said elsewhere that herd immunity to COVID might be "unattainable." If that's true, which is almost certainly is... ...and Fauci still believes that rising cases justify new restrictions... ...then that means the restrictions will continue forever. And to ensure that he has the power to do that, Fauci's Democrat allies are pouring money into a Left-wing campaign to remove me from the U.S. Senate. They saw me hold Fauci's feet to the first numerous times in front of the entire country, and they said to each other "Rand Paul has got to go." And they have made that one of their top priorities for this election cycle. But, I am not giving up so easily. My fight against Fauci and the COVID mob isn't over until every last restriction is gone forever. Your contribution will allow me to hit back against dishonest Democrat attacks on my character and my record as a U.S. Senator. It will allow me to get the truth out about all the things I have done to protect your freedoms from Fauci and his fellow bureaucrats. And it will allow me to keep up with the deep pockets of the radical Left, and their millionaire and billionaire corporate donors. You can make a real difference in this race, so that I can continue making a difference in the U.S. Senate. I can hold off this Democrat assault on our liberty, but it will not be easy. And I can only succeed if patriots like you stand with me. So please, help me out today so that the Democrats cannot steal any more of your God-given freedoms. In Liberty, Rand Paul ** | | | P.S. Are new COVID mandates about to be shoved down your throat? Are rising "cases" going to be used to justify sweeping new government emergency powers yet again?** Anthony Fauci says yes -- and he also says these emergency powers might keep coming back forever. His allies in the Democrat Party are trying to ensure that by getting rid of Fauci's number one nemesis in Congress -- which is me. They are pouring money into a well-funded campaign to remove me from the U.S. Senate. | | | | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for US Senate | No longer want to receive these emails? . RANDPAC PO Box 72598 Newport, Kentucky 41072

It is official! Yesterday, we officially filed to get Jevin on the ballot. This is incredible news for our grassroots movement, and we couldn’t have done it without supporters like you.

With Jevin officially on the ballot for Congress, we have an incredible opportunity to flip this seat blue and make history. President Biden won this district by 1.5 points, which means that Jevin has one of the best chances to flip this seat and make history as Arizona’s first Black congressman!

subject: In The Trenches
body:
We're laying down the foundation for change. | | |
#### APRIL NEWSLETTER
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ff367e6efdc1/in-the-trenches?e=339f142c50)
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
### A Note from Jahmal:
Kids ask me, "How do I get out the trenches, Jahmal?" That’s a Great question!!! “I want to do something else Jahmal, but I don’t know how to do it.” “I’m good at doing this Jahmal, but people gone laugh at me." “I want a new start Jahmal, but I have responsibilities and I gotta get mine no matter what. I gotta get mine.” Look I hear you and I understand you. I am you.

One of the things I’m proudest about as it relates to me running for office is the fact that **I'm laying down the foundation for the next generation of alternative high school students that feel like they’re in the trenches.** Showing up for them and letting them know that I know firsthand what it’s like to be them. I take this role I’m in very seriously and it’s an honor to serve and have God use my life to inspire others to get out the trenches. Ay to get out the trenches mindset you have to set goals for yourself. Specific ones too. Stay away from people that’s just maintaining.

On a real note tho y’all. I need major donations to my campaign. **Aren’t we tired of hearing the same thing and getting the same results?** Support me for US Congress and I’ll make sure I focus on the young people that feel like they live in the trenches. You watch.
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=62ea203dbf&e=339f142c50 "DONATE NOW")
---
| **We are less than 100 days from the election** , and I couldn't have made it this far without your continued support. I hope you will continue to fight for this district, and make sure that we win this seat.

I hope that over this month, you are able to take action. Whether you join one of our events, [make a donation](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=8942f82b76&e=339f142c50), or [volunteer with us](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=f900b9d70a&e=339f142c50), **you are helping us build a multi-generational grassroots coalition that is going to fight every day for the future of this district, and this country**. Yours in service,

Jahmal Cole
---
| |

---
Last month, we hosted a fundraiser at the Wilson Store. We had great food, a raffle and great conversations about the future of the district. Here is my "Frontrunners" speech.

[Register here](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=a535a7414f&e=339f142c50).

That’s a Great question!!! “I want to do something else Jahmal, but I don’t know how to do it.” “I’m good at doing this Jahmal, but people gone laugh at me." “I want a new start Jahmal, but I have responsibilities and I gotta get mine no matter what. I gotta get mine.” Look I hear you and I understand you. I am you. One of the things I’m proudest about as it relates to me running for office is the fact that I'm laying down the foundation for the next generation of alternative high school students that feel like they’re in the trenches. Showing up for them and letting them know that I know firsthand what it’s like to be them. I take this role I’m in very seriously and it’s an honor to serve and have God use my life to inspire others to get out the trenches. Ay to get out the trenches mindset you have to set goals for yourself. Specific ones too. Stay away from people that’s just maintaining. On a real note tho y’all. I need major donations to my campaign. Aren’t we tired of hearing the same thing and getting the same results? Support me for US Congress and I’ll make sure I focus on the young people that feel like they live in the trenches. You watch. | "DONATE NOW" | We are less than 100 days from the election , and I couldn't have made it this far without your continued support. I hope you will continue to fight for this district, and make sure that we win this seat. I hope that over this month, you are able to take action. Whether you join one of our events, , or , you are helping us build a multi-generational grassroots coalition that is going to fight every day for the future of this district, and this country. Yours in service, Jahmal Cole | | THE ROAD SO FAR | "Jahmal Cole “Frontrunners Speech” at Wilson Athletic Store Chicago" Last month, we hosted a fundraiser at the Wilson Store. name: =?utf-8?Q?Rachel=20Tripp?=
subject: Bill McSwain raises over $1.4M in Q1 2022
body:
Bill McSwain, Republican candidate for Governor, on Tuesday reported $1,410,000 raised during pre-primary cycle 1. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/bill-mcswain-raises-over-14m-in-q1-2022?e=b1ec95759b)
---
| |
---
| | **PRESS RELEASE
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**April 5, 2022** **CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202-738-908**
---
|
# Bill McSwain Raises Over $1.4M in Q1 2022
_Pre-Primary Cycle 1 Report _
#
---
| **West Chester, Pa. --** Bill McSwain, Republican candidate for Governor, on Tuesday reported **$1,410,000 raised during pre-primary cycle 1, which ran January 1 - March 28, 2022. **

The $1,410,000 total reflects McSwain’s strongest fundraising quarter to date, including:

* The contributions of **1,832**** ** individual donors, **90%** of which were $100 or less
* Donations from **52** Pennsylvania counties

The strong result demonstrates Bill’s rapidly increasing support among Pennsylvanians who are ready to elect a conservative outsider who will stand up to career politicians in Harrisburg, uphold law and order, and restore our economy.

McSwain’s fundraising has grown exponentially since announcing his run for Governor in September 2021:

>From 2021-2022 to date, McSwain has raised **$2,985,288** from **10,099** individual donors representing **65 of 67** Pennsylvania counties. These reported totals are in addition to the funds invested in the campaign by Commonwealth Leaders Fund, which endorsed McSwain in January 2022.

McSwain had this to say about the Q1 filing:
---
|
> **_“I am incredibly grateful to the many friends and supporters from across the Commonwealth who have joined me at fundraising events, contributed online, and who are ready to elect a conservative outsider as Governor who is committed to protecting individual rights and putting Pennsylvanians first.
>
> Together, driven by our shared dedication to a robust economy, public safety, school choice for all families, a reinvigorated energy industry, and secure elections, we will work towards winning the nomination in May, victory in November, and a freer, safer, more prosperous Pennsylvania for years to come.” _**
---
| | | | | | | [](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=0b844b92d2&e=b1ec95759b)
---
| | [](billmcswain.com)
---
|
---

You can [update your preferences](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=de4180c8e2&e=b1ec95759b&c=043817336a) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=de4180c8e2&e=b1ec95759b&c=043817336a).
