name: =?utf-8?Q?Tracey=20Mann?=
subject: America in Crisis: China
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc
body:
China is treating America like its doormat, and I am sick and tired of watching the Biden administration and House Democrats twiddle their thumbs..... | | |
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

I’m writing to invite you to [**_join me_**](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=239345305a&e=a9d1410029) in fighting back against the ruthless, inhumane, and dishonest behavior of a country that has proven itself time and time again to be an enemy of American values and freedom: China.

China is treating America like its doormat, and I am sick and tired of watching the Biden administration and House Democrats twiddle their thumbs while our country gets manipulated and cheated. China steals our intellectual property, breaks their contracts with us, and violates nearly every agreement they make. China is a bad faith negotiator – they manipulate markets in their favor, which punishes other countries who actually play by the rules. They treated their side of the Phase One Trade Deal with America like a joke, falling $16 billion short of what they agreed to purchase from us just in agricultural products. And what has the Biden Administration done to hold China accountable for cheating American farmers? Nothing. As if all this weren’t enough, China has also threatened free navigation and trade by illegally claiming territory in the Pacific Ocean as their own.

This administration is evidently too scared to treat China firmly and to stand up just as firmly for America’s national interests. That’s why I am working to help Republicans take back the House in the upcoming election and stand against big government socialism and China.

I need your help.

_Please kick in $100.00 today and fight back against what China is trying to do to our country._

([Donate here](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=8b5b02e746&e=a9d1410029))

With you in the fight,

Tracey Mann

P.S. I will continue to stand for Kansas as we move forward, and I will do everything in my power to ensure that our kids have a bright future. Please _[( click here)](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=31239a1133&e=a9d1410029)_ to donate today and help take our country back

clean_body: Democrats will do anything to rig this election My friend, The people of Minnesota are worried about election integrity, and rightfully so. As I go around the state and speak with you, I am disheartened by the lack of trust in our voting system. I want to help restore that trust because Governor Tim Walz simply isn’t going to cut it. Here is your opportunity to do something more and have firsthand experience in protecting our elections. The power is in your hands. 2022 is the year of election integrity. Now is your chance to get involved in the process. As Senate Majority Leader, I brought Voter ID to the forefront. As your governor, I will sign it into law without hesitation. Thank you, Senator Paul Gazelka Candidate for Governor - | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for and Provided by Gazelka for Governor P.O. Box 175 Little Falls, MN 56345

| | | **_Learn More About Chuck_**

---
---
| | | Family, hard work and community. These are the things that have defined me as a person more than anything else and are the things that make New Hampshire a special place. Several local Salem community leaders became role models and mentors and got me involved with helping our community. With their encouragement, I ran for Salem Selectman and won. I ran for Town Moderator and won. Then I ran for State Representative and served for two terms from 1998-2002. I was elected to the State Senate in 2002 and was appointed to the Finance Committee. My experience running a business, meeting a payroll, and keeping a conservative budget helped prepare me for the challenges of crafting a balanced state budget. I quickly became known as one of the state’s leaders in budgeting and tax policy. I took a step back from politics in 2006. My daughter was starting her junior year in high school and Susan and I spent most of the next few years traveling to her field hockey and basketball games. We were her biggest fans. In 2010, I was reelected to the Senate. When I returned to the Finance Committee, I found the financial mess that the Democrats had put our state in. The state had an $800 million deficit. We quickly turned that around and put the state’s finances back on a sustainable path. For my work, colleagues gave me the greatest honor of my life — electing me the Senate President in 2013. In 2020, I led Republican efforts to retake the majority in the State Senate. New Hampshire was the only state in the country that was able to flip a blue state legislature to red and it was largely due to our strong fight against the Democrats’ proposed state income tax. Last year, we passed one of the most conservative and fiscally responsible budgets that New Hampshire has ever seen. It is balanced, cuts taxes for small businesses, provides more than $300 million in property tax relief, bans late-term abortions, and prohibits the use of discriminatory teaching in our schools. It puts New Hampshire on a path to long-term prosperity. The work ethic, commitment to family and sense of community that I learned at a young age have stuck with me as an adult and drive everything I do. I still wake up at 4am every morning to work at our business before going to Concord to do the people’s business. More often than not, I still take my first phone calls of the day while driving a tractor. Washington, D.C. has enough silver-spoon, Ivy League lawyers. I believe that I am a product of all the best parts of New Hampshire — the spirit of freedom, sense of volunteerism and responsibility of giving back to the community that has helped shape me into the person I am today. I want to bring New Hampshire to Washington and makes sure our voices are heard. I want to bring New Hampshire values to a place that needs them now more than ever. I want to work for you and I hope you will consider electing me to represent you in the U.S. Senate.

---

name: Elana Schrager, CaraveoForCongress.com
subject: TONIGHT: Congressional Nominating Assembly
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Tonight’s a HUGE deal for our campaign, Peter. It’s the Democratic 8th Congressional District Assembly, where delegates from each of the counties in the District (Weld, Adams, and Larimer) all come together to cast their vote for who they believe should represent Democrats on the ballot. **After tonight’s vote, the nominees will be finalized and it’s a straight shot to the June 28 primary.** Dr. Caraveo’s coalition has demonstrated huge strength in this process, giving her more than 60% of the vote at each of the county assemblies. But we need your support today to help her keep growing her coalition. Every single dollar we raise now will ensure that we can take on the extreme GOP pick in November. So, before I Zoom into the assembly, I’m hoping you can give Dr. Caraveo and the team a little boost — [**can you make a donation of any amount to show the strength of our grassroots coalition?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43817381/338831311/-679993507?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220405bCongAssem_esc4c_allop_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmY0MmM2Ni0zYWI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=upCvJ8TX5CGRCh0sYfVdpyV2CfpiHnS2s6QNBDgjz9A=) | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43817382/338831312/-679993507?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220405bCongAssem_esc4c_allop_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNmY0MmM2Ni0zYWI1LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=upCvJ8TX5CGRCh0sYfVdpyV2CfpiHnS2s6QNBDgjz9A=)

We’ll let you know how the vote goes, so stay tuned! Thank you, as always, for supporting Dr. Caraveo and the working families of CO-08.
Elana Schrager
Campaign Manager

| Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. Her parents raised her and her siblings on her father’s construction worker’s salary in Adams County. In the legislature, Dr. Caraveo has delivered for working Coloradans by standing up to the biggest corporate bullies and entrenched special interests.

Now, Dr. Caraveo is running for Congress to stand up for hard-working families she sees falling through the cracks. Dr. Caraveo would be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress and the only physician in Colorado’s congressional delegation.
